Name: Lancel
Description:
Fondée en 1876 par un jeune couple d’entrepreneurs visionnaires, la maison Lancel perpétue le style, l’audace et le savoir-faire depuis sa création.

A l’origine de designs iconiques comme le sac seau, le bagage souple, la radio portable ou encore le briquet automatique, la maison Lancel s’est imposée comme une référence de l’excellence à la française.

Name: ATEPELI - Ateliers du Portugal
Description:
Nos Ateliers du Portugal, a tradição cruza-se com a paixão. Integrada num dos maiores grupos internacionais de luxo, a Atepeli aplica o seu savoir-faire na produção de componentes de marroquinaria e calçado. Com três ateliers sediados no Norte de Portugal, preservamos um legado de qualidade e excelência. Na Atepeli, valorizamos todos os talentos, independentemente da sua área de especialização: industrialização, logística, métodos/melhoria contínua, qualidade... pois reconhecemos que são essenciais para impulsionar a inovação e garantir a excelência dos nossos produtos. Ao juntar-se a nós, terá a oportunidade de evidenciar o seu talento na resolução de desafios complexos e na criação dos produtos de luxo do futuro. Venha conhecer-nos e terá a possibilidade de colaborar com uma equipa de apaixonados e desenvolver todo o seu potencial. Um Atelier para Todos os Talentos: Inspirados pela Tradição, Impulsionados pela Inovação.

At Ateliers du Portugal, tradition meets passion. Part of one of the largest international luxury groups, Atepeli applies its savoir-faire to the production of leather goods and footwear components. With three ateliers based in Northern Portugal, we preserve a legacy of quality and excellence.

At Atepeli, we value all talents, regardless of their area of expertise: industrialization, logistics, methods/continuous improvement, quality... as we recognize they are essential to driving innovation and ensuring the excellence of our products. By joining us, you will have the opportunity to showcase your talent in solving complex challenges and creating the luxury products of the future.Come and meet us and you will have the possibility to collaborate with a passionate team and develop your full potential. An Atelier for All Talents: Inspired by Tradition, Driven by Innovation.

Name: Gruppo Mastrotto
Description:
Founded in 1958, Gruppo Mastrotto is one of the world leading group in the manufacturing of bovine leather for upholstery, footwear, leather goods, garment, automotive, nautical and aviation industries.
The Group has stood out over time in these sectors thanks to constant technological innovation and the capability to anticipate the new trends of style, applying its know-how to the specific requests of any single field of application.
Quality, research, innovation, technological development, attention to the safety of the employees and the environment are the goals that Gruppo Mastrotto has been pursuing every day for sixty years.
The Gruppo Mastrotto formula is simple: experience and professionalism and the most modern technology in the leather industry. This is the winning combination that drives the production of millions of square meters of leathers every year for distribution throughout the world.
The Group consists of 15 plants worldwide. In Italy, 10 plants in the leather district of Arzignano (Vicenza) and 1 in Santa Croce sull’Arno (Pisa); in the rest of the world, the Group is present with 1 plant in Brazil, 1 in Indonesia, 1 in Tunisia, and 1 in Mexico.
The Group’s production process consists of a complex series of treatments where the skills of our experienced workers come to the fore, thanks to increasingly advanced systems developed through a long-term, ongoing research effort.
Cutting edge production technologies and innovative manufacturing techniques are matched with the research activity of the Style Department, so that the leather produced is always the right combination of technical and stylistic content.
The perfect combination of technology, innovation and service results in Gruppo Mastrotto Express: bovine leather for upholstery, footwear, leather goods, garment, automotive, nautical and aviation industries; available in more than 1.400 colors always in stock, ready to be shipped within 48 hours worldwide, even for small quantities.

Name: Conceria Pasubio SPA
Description:
Nowadays Pasubio Spa is one of the key leather processing players for the automotive international scene.
Its success comes from the sacrifice and entrepreneurship of the Pretto family.
Its members have tirelessly worked to create a company which has set the benchmark in terms of quality, innovation and reliability in the tannery sector.
Today Pasubio is a shareholding of PAI Partners, https://www.paipartners.com/language/en/.

Name: ITALIAN SHOE FACTORY
Description:
With three generations of family artistry, design knowledge and experience, Italian Shoe Factory is the foremost manufacturer of custom made footwear & leather goods worldwide. The owner Amin Virani has been supervising the entire manufacturing process for over 25 years now, delivering exceptional quality & workmanship in handmade footwear and leather goods. Ask us about Private Label prototyping & manufacturing services.
 
Private Label Services
Looking to start a shoes or leather goods line? Our team will guide you through the steps of building a successful brand. With over 25 years of experience in private label manufacturing for footwear and leather goods, we give you access to decades of technical know-how and craftsmanship. We also offer shoe prototyping & sampling services, along with on-demand small batch production.

Bespoke Services
Behind every unique leather-working technique is a tale of tradition, beauty and quality. Each custom shoe carries the inestimable wealth of know-how and mastery accrued over decades of practice and dedication. A bespoke pair requires an average of 50 hours work by highly qualified artisans.

You will be amazed to see how we can transform your ideas into a beautiful one-of-a-kind pair of shoes.  You may  want an exclusive pair of shoes with the heel designed with your initial, or embellished with studs or crystals. Sole colored to match your attitude or want more comfort for your feet without sacrificing style. Select from the highest quality of Italian leather or your choice of dress fabrics and customize with us.

Contact us
To get in touch, you can book an appointment on our website or call us at +97150 55 66 024 for a consultation to visit the Italian Shoes Factory in Dubai. You can also email us sketches, pictures and requirements to info@italianshoefactory.com

Shoe repairs are also available on request. Worldwide shipping available.

Name: DANI S.p.A.
Description:
A passion for quality, innovation and an intense respect for people, animals and the environment. Since 1950, the DANI group has recognized and distinguished itself for its way of being, thinking and working.

Every week it processes from 25,000 to 27,000 fresh and salted hides to shape the most creative and daring ideas of stylists and designers, embellish the interiors of the most prestigious cars and give comfort and warmth to homes all over the world.

Not only aesthetics but also reliability. To give life to products that last over time, DANI's care starts from raw material sourcing and continues with scrupulous quality controls along the entire production chain.

Every day it chooses for the good of all of us, combining its production processes to sustainable solutions, to do its part and win a challenge, that of taking care of the planet, of its resources and future generations.

Talking about the future is a reality at Dani.

Name: Sadesa
Description:
Sadesa is one of the largest tanning groups in the world, specializing in high quality bovine leather for the most demanding footwear, leather goods and upholstery industries.
Sadesa operates ten industrial facilities throughout South America and Asia, with a worldwide raw material structure and a global sales network of offices and commercial alliances in the five continents.

Name: RINO MASTROTTO
Description:
At the heart of the Rino Mastrotto lies a steadfast dedication to serving a diverse range of premium and luxury sectors, matched with an unyielding commitment to excellence and a rigorous focus on sustainability. To this end, we prioritise the ethical sourcing of materials, from leather to textiles, that minimise our environmental footprint.
All companies under our umbrella represent the best-in-class, promoting innovation in both product creation and bespoke service development. Integrated within our group, they unlock distinct synergies by providing our customers with unmatched access to resources and services, qualifying Rino Mastrotto as a unique and valued partner in the luxury industry.
As a premier network of distinguished service and production companies, we serve a wide array of luxury and high-end sectors, including fashion, automotive, and interior design.
All our brands represent the best-in-class in product and service development. Their presence within our group fosters invaluable synergies.
Thanks to our unique experience and savoir-faire, deeply rooted in a long family history, we provide luxury brands with endless inspiration, superior design capabilities, unparalleled craftsmanship, and absolute quality in everything we undertake. When engaging with stakeholders, we form partnerships based on mutual value, potential realisation, and shared sustainability goals. The cornerstone of these relationships is transparency, trust, and a commitment to creating a sustainable future.

Name: CONCERIA ZABRI

Specializzata nella produzione di croste scamosciate lisce, rifinite e articoli altamente personalizzati. 
Macchinari innovativi, grezzo minuziosamente selezionato, tinture all’avanguardia, laboratorio chimico con personale specializzato e un’attentissima preparazione al packaging, fanno della Zabri la migliore conceria di croste scamosciate in Italia.

L’ideale per chi realizza il pronto moda ma anche le grandi quantità. 
Il servizio e la qualità sono i nostri punti di forza, oltre alle numerose certificazioni che abbiamo ottenuto ad oggi e che confermiamo con le varie verifiche. 
Scegliete la conceria Zabri, optate per la qualità a 360 gradi.

Name: VONTO
Description:
Inspired by the powerful landscapes of the United Arab Emirates, VONTO seeks to provide a unique design with the finest attention to detail through our highly skilled craftsmanship. We take it personal, to provide the highest quality of luxury for every one of our masterpieces. We are not just a brand, but a story, of a never ending exciting Arabian tale.

VONTO is a contemporary luxurious brand based & established in Dubai, UAE. Founded by young Emarati brothers, Nasser AlQubaisi & Mansoor AlQubaisi. VONTO is a luxury retail house manufacturing & offering premier high-end leather goods and exclusive products, marked & embossed with the unique VONTO pattern.

VONTO was inspired from the surroundings, mainly from nature. We sought to embrace elements that resonates within the UAE while also achieving contemporary feel that would appeal to the region. This resulted in a design pattern using geometric lines combined within a color palette of pine green & browns, inspired by the vegetation, mountains and deserts.

Name: GAB pelletteria
Description:
GAB è la capofila della Leather Goods Business Unit di HModa Group, unità indipendente che integra il know-how specializzato nella lavorazione della pelle.

GAB nasce nel 2009 a Firenze, dall’esperienza di Simone Lenzi e Claudia Guidarelli. L’azienda si specializza nella produzione di borse e piccola pelletteria per conto terzi, collaborando con importanti Clienti nel mondo del lusso. Nel 2021 entra a far parte del Gruppo HModa, polo che raggruppa produttori del lusso Made in Italy e centralizza le attività di coordinamento dell’azienda, lasciandole una sua indipendenza nelle attività operative. 

GAB si impegna a proiettare le sue energie nell’innovazione delle tecniche produttive e nella scelta dei materiali, sempre preservando la tradizione della pelletteria artigianale toscana. L’obiettivo è quello di continuare a distinguersi per l’attenzione alla sostenibilità e per gli alti standard qualitativi dei prodotti. GAB lavora con determinazione all’interno del mercato del lusso per proporre al cliente un servizio completo e curato in tutti i suoi aspetti e offre un servizio completo di modelleria, prototipazione e produzione, trasformando idee innovative in prodotti di alta qualità.

GAB: Gas A Bestia!
Il nostro motto riflette il nostro spirito: GAB è un’azienda veloce, dinamica e giovane. La moto per noi rappresenta passione, competizione e sacrificio: valori che definiscono ogni persona all’interno di GAB. Per noi sono le persone a fare la differenza, diamo spazio alle loro idee e al loro talento supportando continuamente anche la formazione e la crescita dei giovani talenti del futuro.

Name: Kharazah | خرازة
Description:
Kharazah has been committed to providing the finest in handmade footwear and leather products. Our long tradition of care and craftsmanship permeates every step of our process, from the exclusive choice of the finest grade leathers from Saudi Arabia and around the globe, to our signature hand-stitching.
The secrets of this specialist craft have been preserved through the generations with each model of footwear carefully designed and meticulously made.

Name: Picard Bangladesh Ltd
Description:
Picard Bangladesh Limited is a Bangladesh – Germany Joint Venture company formed in 1997. The company manufactures mid to high-end bags and small leather goods for international brands. Picard Bangladesh is one of the pioneers of leather goods manufacturing in the country. The company was formed with the view to combine the technical expertise of German manufacturing, along with the advantages of ample source of raw materials and competitive labour force.
In addition to manufacturing for the German brand PICARD, the factory is also involved in production for other brands based in Australia, Germany, Italy, Japan and Singapore. The organisational objective is to manufacture and export high quality bags and accessories at the best possible price, while providing an integrated sourcing solution.
The current eight-storied production plant occupies a space of 25,000 sqmt in Boro Rangamatia (Kathgora), Ashulia. The factory has a competent Sample team and a dynamic Business Promotion team who provide complete merchandising solutions. The production facility is fully compliant according to international building code standards & regulations. The factory also has a number of international audit certifications such as Sustainable Leather Foundation, BSCI, Sedex & OHAS 18001: 2007.
Picard Bangladesh is vertically integrated in terms of its leather product line & is able to provide sustainable supply chain services. The majority of the leather procured in Picard Bangladesh is from Austan Limited, an environmentally compliant tannery situated in Dhaka Export Processing Zone.
A customer focused outlook coupled with a dedicated and skilled team of professionals has enabled the company to achieve a prestigious position in the industry today. “Picard Bangladesh means quality & timely shipment” is the company’s motto. The vision for Picard Bangladesh is to grow sustainably and to be known internationally for its outstanding quality and service.

Name: Muhammad Shafi Tanneries Private Limited.
Description:
Muhammad Shafi Tanneries (Private) Limited, Karachi, Pakistan, established in 1959 (popularly known as MST) is the flag-bearer company of Shafi Group. It is one of the leading companies in the country in terms of export performance in leather sector.  The development of this level of excellence is the story of successful vertical expansion, managed by the members of Shafi Family who are pioneers in the production and export of light leather products in Pakistan. The elders of the present directors had been involved in trading of leathers as well as export of raw hides and skins since 1930.

MST employs about 1000 people and produces about 25 million square feet of leather annually. Its factory in Karachi is a modern, well-planned and one of the biggest light leather tanneries in the world. It is capable of not only following the fashion trends but also making innovations of its own in kid, goatskin, sheep and cow calf leathers for shoes and handbags. It is a long way to go, but with the blessings of Allah and with combined and concerted efforts of the management, staff and workers, we intend to fulfill our ambition of handling the leather from raw skins to finished products.

SHAFI GROUP as a whole and each company of the group has maintained growth from year to year.  It is for this reason that the name “SHAFI” has now become synonymous with the best in quality and reliability in business from Pakistan.

Name: ALMA1938
Description:
Established in 1938, Alma Leather has built an enviable reputation for supplying the finest design-led leathers across the globe. Our company is in the heart of East London, where we have been providing high-quality leathers for a wide range of industries and applications.
Our main focus is on interiors and furnishings, fashion and accessories, theatre and film. We have a diverse range of clients including interior designers, fashion designers, film production companies and theatre groups. Our experienced team of consultants and specialists are always on hand to provide friendly expert advice to assist with selecting leather for your next project.
We pride ourselves on our ability to understand the needs of our clients, and we are committed to providing the best possible service. We greatly understand the different types of leather available and their specific uses. Our team of experts can help you choose the right leather for your project, whether it's for a high-end luxury fashion item or an industrial application.
We have an extensive range of leathers available, including cowhide, sheepskin, suede, and nubuck, as well as a wide variety of colours and finishes. We are constantly updating our range to ensure that we always have the latest trends and colours available.
We take great care in sourcing our leathers, ensuring that they are of the highest quality and that they meet all the necessary ethical and sustainability standards. We only work with tanneries that are committed to responsible and sustainable practices, and we are constantly looking for ways to reduce our environmental impact.
Our dedication to quality and customer service has been recognized by our clients, and we have been fortunate to work with some of the most prestigious names in the industry like Audi, QNCC, One Hyde Park, Stephenson Harwood and more.

Name: Micro-Fresh
Description:
Micro-Fresh is an award-winning invisible technology that contains a natural active ingredient that blocks the growth of harmful and odour causing bacteria to keep products fresher for longer. It can be applied to almost any product during the manufacturing process.

Micro-Fresh supports footwear, textile, hospitality, health care, sportswear, and children’s sectors globally. Our Partners include; adidas, John Lewis, Next, M&S, Primark, Tesco, Asda, Sainsburys and Clarks Australia.
 
Our technology preserves treated products and prolongs life leading to less landfill, eliminating the need for single use plastics stickers or silica gel packets fulfilling our commitment to sustainability. 

Our main HQ and manufacturing facilities are UK based with distribution across; China, India, Pakistan, Portugal, Vietnam, Singapore and the USA.

Name: Corsa Leathers
Description:
Corsa Leathers is established in 2005. A leading Pakistan-Britain-based manufacturing company of leather and leather products. We collaborate with global brands, stores, shops, and enterprises to blend business goals and empower brands through custom product development aligned with their unique identity..

As a consumer-driven, design-oriented company, we transform business objectives into successful design strategies. Founded by Muhammad Akbar Hussain and now led by Talha Amin, our family-owned business boasts nearly 20 years of experience and exports high-quality leather goods worldwide, showcasing our commitment to global craftsmanship and style. In addition to our operations in Pakistan, we are registered in the UK as CORSA LEATHERS LTD.

Corsa Leathers offers a diverse range of leathers for garments, shoe uppers, and upholstery, including full-grain, top-grain, corrected-grain, split, aniline, semi-aniline, nubuck, suede, oil-tanned, vegetable-tanned, chrome-tanned, and chrome-free-tanned, sourced from cow, sheep, buffalo, and goat hides.

We design, manufacture, and market an array of leather fashion garments, jackets, gloves, bags, motorbike attire, motorcycle robes, boxing gear, cowboy and rodeo outfits, shoes and various accessories.

From our humble beginnings, we have expanded to supply premium leather products globally. By utilizing advanced technology, we remain dedicated to the craftsmanship of our local artisans while prioritizing sustainability. Our aim is to build lasting relationships with our customers, community, and the environment.

We are not just only a manufacturer; we are a business partner’

Name: Brusarosco
Description:
Brusarosco manufactures beautiful, innovative, and sustainable leather for the automotive industry, catering solutions for all interior applications including seating, steering wheels, and dashboards.

With roots tracing back to 1834, Brusarosco has honed the craft of transforming natural by-products into elegant, durable, and biodegradable leather for the automotive industry. In 1998, Brusarosco merged with Rino Mastrotto Group S.p.a, joining forces with four other Italian tanneries renowned for producing high-end leather for the luxury fashion, interior design, and automotive industries.

We operate one of Europe’s largest leather production facilities. Our renowned full-cycle tannery is the oldest tannery brand in Italy still active today, located in the heart of the tanning district Arzignano, Vicenza.

Brusarosco drives the automotive leather industry through progressive innovation. Our knowledge comes from centuries of experience, cross-industrial teams and modern research and development facilities. We challenge the ordinary, solve obstacles and design new solutions.

Sustainability is at the heart of Brusarosco’s identity and product value propositions. We are committed to the welfare of future generations and are leaders in extensive innovation, technology research and development programs, engineered to improve our production processes from a sustainability standpoint. In 2022, we achieved CO2 neutrality in energy, and we developed our unique and industry-leading 100% circular manufacturing concept ‘Zero Waste Leather’, which ensures that none of our waste ends up in landfills and that every scrap of material is repurposed or transformed into energy, leaving no trace behind.

Choose Brusarosco leather for your automotive interior value proposition and increase your customer satisfaction.

Name: Spirit Pole
Description:

Name: Olivenleder
Description:
Clean tannage. Clean leather.

Every effort to lessen the impact of leather production on people and planet deserves respect - but for us, that’s only the starting line.

Olivenleder – The Original
wet-green pioneered and patented a clean tannage that turns a by-product of olive farming into healthy, high-performance leather.

Why olive leaves?
Olive leaves are bursting with antioxidants. Through a gentle brewing process we concentrate their goodness into an aromatic syrup – our 100 % biobased tanning agent wet-green OBE. No metals. No glutaraldehyde. No petro-polymers. Simply clean leather in its purest sense.

dermatest certified "EXELLENT"

Patented process – zero mining, zero crude-oil chemistry

Prevents open-burning of olive prunings and the CO₂ they would release

What we enable
We develop next-generation, plant-based leather solutions for every application - automotive, fashion, footwear, interior, upholstery and even healthcare – so any tannery can switch to clean tannage without compromising colour range or performance.

The gold standard in tanning is Olivenleder:
Chromium-free, glutaraldehyde-free, zirconium-free – and 100 % transparent. No green-washing, just clean leather that stays in the biological loop.

Searching for a way to replace mining- or oil-derived tanning chemicals and move toward true circularity? wet-green is ready to help – whether you aim for full Olivenleder quality or simply want to make conventional recipes more sustainable.

Name: Cevahir Deri
Description:
Cevahir Deri, whose foundation dates back to 1935, started its activities in Bolu/Gerede in the east of Istanbul. The factory in Gerede was developed and modernized; Production of leather used in the equipment of security forces personnel (military, police, etc.) has been chosen as the field of specialization. Cevahir Deri, a company that is sought after, reliable and has a voice, has made Cevahir Deri a sought-after, and increasingly accumulated experience in this field. These products that pass challenging tests, feature Gore-tex specialty, breathable but waterproof have become synonymous with the name of Cevahir Deri in Turkey.
In 2005, the new production unit construction, which was completed in Tuzla Leather Organized Industrial Zone in Istanbul, has started production with one of the most modern machineries and leather industry in Turkey. With this new facility, besides shoe products, studies on saddlery, clothing, and upholstery clothing have been carried out and have been included in the product range and put on the market. We have factories in Tuzla, and branches in Ikitelli and Konya. Being aware of the changing conditions in the world we live in and acting with the awareness of environmental protection, Cevahir Leather has added Chrome-free, Metal-free, Wet white, and label articles. We produce 15 million sqft each year, which means 36 tons per day, 1200 Cowhide leather with our 120 employees. 40% of our production is based on Goratex (both waterproof and air-permeable) and waterproof products. We mostly use Turkish Rawhide, which lets us to be with better quality leathers and competitive prices.  In addition, we have been increasing the product range in our modern R&D Laboratories, being aware of the changing world conditions and environmental protection awareness. In this sense, we produce Nubuck nappa, antique, burnish, crazy, pull-up, floather, lining products and their different versions. Our company is an LWG gold member

Name: Sepici Leather
Description:
Founded in 1930, SEPICI has been a cornerstone of the leather industry for nearly a century. For over 96 years, our company has produced premium-quality chrome-tanned, vegetable-tanned, and sole leather, earning numerous national and international accolades, including the LWG Gold Certificate, Tannery of the Year Europe, and the Turkish Leather Industry Export Award.
In December 2024, we made the strategic decision to cease operations at our historic tannery in Torbalı, İzmir. This milestone not only marks the end of an era but also signals the beginning of a new phase—guided by sustainability, fair trade, social responsibility, and a more agile, innovation-driven structure.
Our newly established company, Sepici İç ve Dış Ticaret A.Ş., was founded by members of the Sepici family alongside seasoned professionals from outside the industry. This new structure carries forward our 96 years of knowledge and expertise, offering global sourcing services, subcontract tanning partnerships, and leather warehousing solutions to customers around the world.
At SEPICI, we go beyond supply and logistics—we offer services in product development, design innovation, and market research, acting as a creative and strategic partner to our clients. We collaborate closely with customers to develop exclusive leather collections, monitor global consumer trends, and ensure new products are launched on time and with maximum market impact.
We continue to serve our partners across Turkey, Europe, Asia, the United States, and Canada with a curated wholesale and retail portfolio of vegetable- and chrome-tanned bovine leathers in both semi-finished and finished forms.
Today, SEPICI stands not only as a symbol of tradition, but as a forward-looking partner committed to excellence, innovation, and long-term collaboration. With nearly a century of expertise behind us, we are shaping the future of leather—guided by knowledge, inspired by design, and powered by global partnerships.

Description:

Our vision is simple yet powerful – to present the exquisite artistry of Indian craftsmanship to the global audience while uplifting the lives of Indian artists who contribute their invaluable skills to our products.

Rooted in India and Headquartered in Gurgaon:
Our journey began in the vibrant and diverse landscapes of India, where we recognized the untapped potential of Indian artisans and their unparalleled craftsmanship. 

Sourcing from Different States of India:
India is a country known for its rich cultural heritage and artisanal diversity. We source our materials from various states across the country, each renowned for its unique expertise in leather crafting. By doing so, we not only support local industries but also ensure that every product we offer is infused with the essence of regional craftsmanship.

Empowering Indian Artists:
Our commitment goes beyond just creating high-quality products; we are devoted to empowering Indian artists and craftsmen. We understand the true worth of their priceless art and make it a priority to give them the recognition and value they deserve.

Showcasing Indian Craftsmanship to the World:
LeatherGanic's global vision drives us to present the rich tapestry of Indian craftsmanship to discerning customers worldwide. We aspire to become a global ambassador of Indian artistry and create a platform where traditional skills and contemporary designs converge, resulting in a harmonious fusion of heritage and innovation.

Our collections reflect the diverse beauty of India, from the colorful culture of Rajasthan to the serene landscapes of Kerala.

Embrace authenticity, support craftsmanship, and redefine style with LeatherGanic. Together, let's create a world where traditional artistry thrives and flourishes on the global stage.

Name: Top Celeb Style
Description:
As a trailblazing force in the fashion industry, we seamlessly merge the timeless art of bespoke tailoring with the convenience of e-commerce, ensuring that the epitome of personalized style is within reach for everyone. At our core, we are on a mission to redefine the relationship between individuals and their leather jackets, offering a unique blend of custom and ready-to-wear options that cater to diverse tastes.

Our Vision: Empowering Personal Style

Imagine owning a leather jacket that is a true reflection of your personality – from the design intricacies and color palette to the finer details that make it uniquely yours. This is the vision that propels us forward. We firmly believe that every individual deserves a jacket that speaks to their desires and preferences, and we are committed to making this vision a reality.

Solving Fashion's Personalization Challenges

In our pursuit of excellence, we've identified and addressed three pivotal challenges in the fashion industry:

Accessibility: While bespoke tailoring has always existed, it has often been a luxury reserved for a select few. Our solution? Custom leather jackets starting at $350, making bespoke accessible to all without compromising on quality. Say goodbye to the exclusivity of personalized fashion – welcome to a world where craftsmanship meets affordability.

Convenience: We understand that the bespoke process can be daunting. That's why, at The Jacket Maker, we've streamlined the experience. You'll have a dedicated design consultant at your disposal, ready to bring your custom project to life – no charges, no commitment until you're ready to make your jacket truly yours.

Perfection: Settling for "almost perfect" is a thing of the past. How often have you loved a product but wished you could tweak a detail? With us, you never have to compromise. Our commitment to perfection means you get a jacket that aligns with your vision, down to the last stitch.

Your Jacket, Your Story - TopCelebStyle

Established in 2004 by Mr. Sharib Ahmed, Ayman Tanning Co. Pvt. Ltd. began with a simple, strong vision: to create leather goods that blend tradition with innovation, and craftsmanship with scale. What started as a leather tannery has since grown into a full-fledged bag and accessories manufacturing house, proudly serving a discerning clientele that includes Galeries Lafayette, Pierre Cardin, KLiNGEL Group, Leas, and many more.

Whether it’s an exclusive design for a luxury label or a large-scale line for retail, we apply the same obsessive care and thought to every stage of the process.

Our success wouldn’t be possible without our people. With over 200 skilled production workers, our team is the soul of Ayman. Many have been with us for years, growing with the company and becoming part of its story. Together, they help us achieve an impressive monthly capacity of 30,000 wallets, 10,000 handbags, and 5,000 belts—making us agile enough for high-volume orders without compromising quality.

While leather remains at the heart of what we do, we’ve spent the past few years expanding our material expertise and broadening our design vocabulary. This allows us to serve a wider clientele while staying true to the artisanal roots that shaped us. Our facilities are equipped with modern machinery, but it’s the human touch—our craftspeople’s intuition, experience, and pride—that defines our output.

Ayman Tanning Co. Pvt. Ltd. isn't just a manufacturer. We're a team of creators, learners, and storytellers who believe in the quiet power of a well-made product. And we're just getting started.

Name: Axelsen & Son
Description:
Axelsen & Son aps was established as “Kaj Axelsen Leather Goods” in 1957 by Kaj Axelsen. The one-man company offered a product-range consisting of only glass cases, which he designed and produced at night and would sell and deliver by day under the name Montana Leather.

The company quickly grew in census and by 1962, 23 people were engaged in the production. More hands meant a different production machinery and by 1965 a 650m2 factory was built. By now the leather glass cases were supplemented with other smaller leather accessories as wallets and pencil cases. All products were designed with a desire to create, and link function with classic design in uncompromised qualities.

In 1968 a milestone was reached in the short history of the company – article 715 reached an order of 35.000 pcs. in one year.

During the 1970’ies, the company was founded as Inter Leather a/s and pioneered on the Eastern markets with retailers in both Hong Kong and Japan. As the world felt larger, and communication more intricately, an office was opened in Hong Kong.

Production being at its highest, with nearly 200 employees in Denmark, manifests Inter Leather a/s’ position as one of the leading manufacturers of leather goods in Scandinavia in the 80’ies.

Same decade Gert Axelsen, son of founder Kaj and Ella Axelsen, enters the business as junior director and later as owner of the company.

Globalization, increased competition and changed consumption behavior in the 90’ies were greater challenges than expected, and time was spent getting back to the original concept.

In 2006 a new brand, Treats, was added to the brand portfolio. Treats has a more feminine approach to the classic leather products, never forgetting the Nordic roots, but without any limitations from the minimalistic Scandinavian expression.

Name: VESTA CORPORATION S.P.A.
Description:
Vesta Corporation affonda le sue radici nella storia conciaria di Ponte a Egola (PI), dove, nel 1966, nel boom economico dell’espansione produttiva italiana, la ditta individuale denominata Vesta sviluppa la produzione di cuoio da suola, molto richiesto dai settori emergenti della calzatura.

Nel corso degli anni Vesta espande le proprie linee di prodotto ed oggi, attraverso la concia al cromo e la concia metal free, produce pellami leggeri di vitelli e mezzi vitelli, e pellami pesanti di toro, culatte e gropponi, per i brand dell’alta moda e della calzatura tecnica.

Vesta Corporation has its roots in the tanning history of Ponte a Egola (PI), where, in 1966, during the economic boom of Italian production, the individual company under the name Vesta began manufacturing leather for soles, much in demand in the emerging footwear industries.

Over the years, Vesta has expanded its product lines. Today it uses chrome-tanning and metal-free tanning to produce lightweight leather from calf and half-calf hide, as well as heavy leather from bull, rump and back hide, for haute couture and technical footwear brands.

Name: The Leather Studio
Description:
Greetings!
The Leather Studio is a Bangladeshi company inaugurated in 2002. The company manufactures mid to high-end leather products for international markets and brands. We are one of the pioneers of leather goods manufacturing in the country. The company was created with the view to combine technical expertise and craftsmanship, along with the advantages of ample sources of raw materials and a competitive labor force. The factory is also involved in production for other brands based in Australia, Germany, Italy, Poland, the USA, the UK, Canada, and the Netherlands. The organizational objective is to manufacture and export high-quality leather products at the best possible price while providing an integrated sourcing solution. 
The current three-storied production plant occupies a space of 40,000 sq ft in Ashulia, Dhaka, Bangladesh, and employs 300 workers, with an installed production capacity of 25,000 bags and 60,000 small leather goods per year. Additionally, the factory has a complete Sample team and a dynamic Business Promotion team who provide complete merchandising solutions. The production facility is fully compliant according to international leather products code standards & regulations. The majority of the leather procured is from Italy, Thailand, China, India, and Bangladesh. A customer focused out customer-focused dedicated and skilled team of professionals, along with an in-house design team, has enabled the company to achieve a prestigious position in the industry today. 
The company owns a globally registered brand name, The Leather Studio. The Leather Studio means quality & timely shipment, which is the company's motto. Our final goal is to build a long-term, lasting relationship with the customer. The vision for The Leather Studio is to grow sustainably and to be known internationally for its outstanding leather quality and service.
Thank You!

Name: SusLeather Project
Description:
Bangladesh has a long tradition of exporting leather products, and the leather sector stands as the second-largest export sector of the country. Despite this, the Bangladeshi leather tanning industry faces challenges related to low productivity and inadequate occupational health and safety (OHS) measures, posing obstacles to the sustainable development of this sector. The leather tanning process involves the extensive use of various chemicals, particularly arsenic, in transforming raw hides and skins into finished leather. The release of these harmful substances during the production process contributes to severe environmental pollution, adversely impacting the health of employees and local communities, as evident in Bangladesh. Therefore, Susleather research project aims to create new knowledge on sustaining Lean implementation and improving OHS in the leather tanneries of Bangladesh. By integrating Institutional Logics theory, this project  explores the challenges in sustaining initial improvement in Lean and OHS practices to improve and maintain good working conditions in the tanneries, both in terms of health and safety.

The Susleather project is financially supported by the Danish International Development Agency (DANIDA) and is being implemented in collaboration between researchers from the University of Southern Denmark (SDU) and Ahsanullah University of Science and Technology. Several Bangladeshi tanneries are participating in this action based research project.

Description:
RITA GIGLIONI E MAURIZIO PERINI FONDANO LA PELLETTERIA “2G” NEL 1975. PIENI DI CORAGGIO PRENDONO LE REDINI DI UN AMBIZIOSO PROGETTO DOPO AVER MATURATO DIVERSI ANNI DI ESPERIENZA NEL MONDO DELLA PELLETTERIA, INIZIANDO GIOVANISSIMI. NELLO STESSO ANNO PRENDONO IN AFFITTO UN PICCOLO LOCALE SITUATO DENTRO IL FAMOSO PALAZZO DEL MARCHESE, COSÌ NASCE LA PELLETTERIA “2G”.

DOPO ANNI DI DURO LAVORO, GRAZIE ALLA LORO BRAVURA E AL LORO IMPEGNO, DECIDONO DI SPOSTARSI DAL CENTRO STORICO E TRASFERIRE L’AZIENDA IN ALTRE SEDI COME S. MICHELE FINO AD ARRIVARE NEL 2010 IN VIA FONTE NATALI, CON UNO SPAZIO PIÙ GRANDE, IN UNA STRUTTURA IMMERSA NEL VERDE DI PIANCASTAGNAIO, IN TOSCANA.

DAGLI ANNI DELLA GIOVENTÙ SONO PASSATI AGLI ANNI DELLA CONSAPEVOLEZZA, ASSUMENDO NEL CORSO DEL TEMPO MOLTI DIPENDENTI E RENDENDO LA 2G UNA REALTÀ CONSOLIDATA CHE GLI HA PERMESSO DI AFFACCIARSI AI PIÙ ALTI BRAND LUSSO, PRODUCENDO BORSE, VALIGERIA E PICCOLA PELLETTERIA.

NEL 2019 IL FIGLIO, SIMONE PERINI, DOPO 14 ANNI DI ESPERIENZA COME MODELLISTA BORSE CAD PRESSO MOLTI BRAND LUSSO SITI IN TOSCANA, DECIDE DI PRENDERE LE REDINI DELL’AZIENDA, RISTRUTTURANDOLA, RENDENDOLA UNA REALTÀ SPINTA AL FUTURO E CAMBIANDOLE NOME: MENERVA S.R.L. IL NOME PROVIENE DALLA DEA ROMANA CUSTODE DEGLI ARTIGIANI, DANDO NUOVA FORZA ALLA STORIA DELL’AZIENDA DI FAMIGLIA GIÀ AFFERMATA. SIMONE DECIDE DI APRIRE LA SEDE DI SVILUPPO, PROTOTIPIA, MODELLERIA E TAGLIO A FIRENZE, PER AVERE UNO SPAZIO PIÙ VICINO AI BRAND LUSSO E PER DARE ALLA SEDE DI PIANCASTAGNAIO IL PROCESSO CHE PRECEDE LA PRODUZIONE E RENDENDO QUINDI LA MENERVA CAPACE DI POTER SEGUIRE IL CLIENTE DAL PASSAGGIO DEI DISEGNI AL PRODOTTO FINALE.

L’AZIENDA DI FIRENZE, NEI SUOI 1300 MQ, OSPITA MACCHINARI TRA I PIÙ SVILUPPATI TECNOLOGICAMENTE: MACCHINE DA TAGLIO AUTOMATICO, TRANCE E PLOTTER; OLTRE AD UN MAGAZZINO BLINDATO E GRANDI SPAZI PER LO SCARICO MERCI.

LA MENERVA COSÌ ORGANIZZATA, OFFRE AI CLIENTI LA POSSIBILITÀ DI AVERE UN PACCHETTO COMPLETO, UN PERCORSO DALL’INIZIO ALLA FINE

Name: RHIMI
Description:
Deux sœurs, deux sensibilités, une seule vision.

Filles du soleil et de la Méditerranée, nous avons grandi entourées des couleurs vives de la mer et des formes harmonieuses de l'architecture.
Cette fascination pour les arcs, les volutes et le jeu subtil d’ombre et de lumière a nourri notre amour pour les textures et les couleurs.

« Tout passe par l’œil et se fait une vie par le toucher. »

A la croisée des sens, l’œil et la main est née RHIMI, une marque française de sacs à main en cuir haut de gamme, conçue pour incarner l’élégance intemporelle et une féminité raffinée. Nous avons voulu rendre hommage à toute la mémoire poétique qui restait gravée dans nos esprits depuis notre jeune âge, et la ressortir de plus belle grâce à un savoir-faire français.

Conçu à Paris, chaque sac RHIMI réinterprète librement l’art de la maroquinerie. Nos créations sont inspirées des lignes fluides et des formes sculpturales de l'architecture méditerranéenne et sont ensuite réalisées à la main dans des ateliers spécialisés dans la maroquinerie.

Nous utilisons des matières de haute qualité, dont le cuir provenant de tanneries italiennes et espagnoles certifiées. Notre engagement est clair : offrir des pièces qui allient qualité, durabilité et créativité.

Chaque sac RHIMI est un voyage en lui-même, conçu pour collecter des histoires, les traduire en couleur et les retranscrire dans la beauté du design.

Chez RHIMI, le luxe se vit au quotidien, à travers des pièces porteuses de sens et de vies.

Name: Rathnam Leathers
Description:
Founded in 2004, Rathnam Leathers has grown into one of the world’s respected names in finished leather manufacturing, with a strong focus on premium leathers for lifestyle footwear and bags. What sets our story apart is not just the craftsmanship we bring to leather, but the people behind the brand.

Rathnam Leathers is a partnership firm, led by Mr. A.R. Senthilkumar and Mr. K.F. Shamsuddin—two individuals whose journey began from the ground up. Starting their careers as a supervisor and a technician, they combined their hands-on expertise and shared passion to build a brand that today stands as a trusted name in the global leather industry.

Their deep understanding of the craft, commitment to continuous learning, and visionary approach laid the foundation for what Rathnam Leathers is today—a brand whose leathers are proudly remembered and recognized in products from leading global brands.

Our growth is driven not only by technical excellence but also by a strong commitment to ethical and sustainable practices. We actively engage with internationally recognized sustainability platforms and are honored to hold Gold Certification from the Leather Working Group (LWG), Sweden Textile Water Initiative (STWI), SEDEX 4 Pillar Audited, Higg Index, and we are Honored to receive the 1st tannery in India on ZDHC (Zero Discharge of Hazardous Chemicals) Road to Zero Level 1—a mark of our responsible sourcing, reduced environmental footprint, and sustainable production.

We also take great pride in fostering a labor-friendly workplace. Our facilities are built on principles of fairness, safety, and respect for every worker, ensuring that the people who shape our leathers are valued and empowered.

Name: Atelier Methusalem Leather
Description:
DESPRE MTH

Am fost binecuvântat cu abilități!

Numele meu este Stefan Ilca și povestea mea este una simpla. Am crescut intr-o familie cu 5 copii și cu doi părinți creativi și harnici. Încă de mic am avut contact cu prelucrarea pielii. Mama mea fiind maistra intr-o companie unde se producea încălțăminte; ea aducea acasă pentru cusut manual fete de pantofi astfel ca toți cei 5 copii am fost învățați sa coasem de mana.

Dumnezeu m-a binecuvântat prin aceastā activitate din copilărie, deoarece am ajuns sa îndrăgesc lucrul manual și sa îmi dezvolt diferite abilități în direcția asta. Dorința mea este ca în atelierul nostru Methusalem Leather sa dezvoltam produse de calitate și unicitate

Misiunea 

Totul a început în copilărie când m-am atașat de numele Metusala ( în franceza Methusalem ). Methusalem este un personaj din Biblie care a trait 969 de ani… ( cel mai longeviv om ). Acest nume ne inspira longevitate de aceea vrem ca si produsele noastre sa fie de cea mai înaltă calitate sa poată fi pastrate din generatie in generatie

Sloganul nostru este: “Made to Last!”

Name: Cinturificio Vaccarini Roberto
Description:
Il cinturificio Vaccarini Roberto nasce nel 1982 grazie alla creatività di Roberto che fin da subito trasforma la sua passione per l’artigianato in una piccola ma vivace attività. Nel tempo si avvale della collaborazione anche della moglie Donatella e della figlia Silvia che con la medesima dedizione, partecipano alla creazione di prodotti artigianali altamente qualificati.
La conduzione familiare, l’amore per il lavoro, la creatività e l’impiego di materie prime selezionate e rigorosamente “Made in Italy”, fanno del Cinturificio Vaccarini Roberto, un punto di eccellenza che si afferma sia sul mercato italiano che su quello estero.
Tutti gli articoli sono prodotti in casa, senza avvalersi di terzisti, utilizzando solo vera pelle e vero cuoio, con finiture di qualità anche nella scelta degli accessori.
La sinergia con il cliente e la lavorazione totalmente artigianale, ci consentono di soddisfare ogni richiesta della clientela, personalizzando le creazioni di volta in volta; consentendo al cliente di scegliere pellami e finiture siamo in grado di realizzare prodotti unici ed esclusivi, dove le caratteristiche  più evidenti sono la cura dei dettagli e la realizzazione esclusivamente artigianale.

Name: Joycrafts Leather Studio
Description:
JOYCRAFTS represents an unwavering commitment to delivering a delightful handmade leather experience to its users.

The logo's core features a leather cutting knife, symbolizing the essence of craftsmanship. The water ripple pattern, reminiscent of traditional textiles, and the retro seal shape resonate with the resurgent trend of retro culture. The letters "J" and "C" subtly imply an inclusive and innovative Eastern design language, born from the shared cultural heritage of Japan and China.

The fusion of the Shinto shrine torii gate and the Chinese traditional archway in the logo embodies this concept.

Water, the epitome of virtue, embraces all things. The water ripple pattern, symbolizing inclusiveness, subtly echoes the shape of the leather cutting knife, metaphorically representing the unwavering attitude and relentless pursuit of excellence by JCL artisans. The interweaving of joy and crafts expresses the brand's initial aspiration for handmade creations and a commitment to meticulous craftsmanship. Water and light serve as consistent design elements throughout JCL. 
Water represents the inclusive spirit of Shanghai, the brand's birthplace, while light symbolizes the joy derived from the mastery of art.

The main logo of the brand harmoniously blends Japanese ukiyo-e style with the fusion of the Shinto shrine torii gate and the Chinese traditional archway. Inspired by the old gate of Fudan University, it pays homage to the century-old alma mater and the inclusive spirit of Shanghai. Through the reinterpretation of local culture and East Asian aesthetics, it redefines the lost sense of taste and refinement in our fast-paced lives.

JOYCRAFTS offers a distinctive paradigm for selecting leather goods and personal expression, catering to the discerning vintage enthusiasts who appreciate handmade products.

Name: Kani Leather
Description: Kani Leather Tannery founded in 1962 by Mr. Mehmet Nuri Toktas in Kazlicesme/ Istanbul/Turkey, the passion of tanning leather has passed from grandfather to grandsons today. Our leather adventure, has started in 1962, in 1990, Kani Leather Tannery has moved to the new plant in Usak province which is organized industrial Zone with waste water purification plant. Kani Leather Tannery with its wide range of products and innovations, produce finished sheepskin leather and lambskin leather with veg tan leather or chrome tanned leather. Kani Leather Tannery has strong investments in leather tanning technology, continues today with the modern facilities in the heart of the leather City Usak / Turkey. Kani Leather Tannery manufacturing leather for many countries of the world in our modern facilities under the management of our friendly management we took a more innovative and modern structure and now Kani Leather, which has a significant place in the Turkish and world leather market. Kani Leather Tannery provides services in sectors such as primarily clothing, handbags and shoes. High quality leather is produced by continuously developing the articulates for fashion by its strong R&D department, innovative structure and by the machinery park of the latest technology in Kani Leather Tannery, with having a production capacity for 6.000 skins (approximately 40.000 Square feet) of tanned leather hides daily. The most demanded leather articles of Kani Leather Tannery by it's customers are; Nappa Leather, Plonge Leather, Vegetable Tanned Leather, Stretch Leather, Washable Leather, Suede Leather, Chrome Free Leather and Full Grain Leather. Description:
Emerging from the vibrant heart of Stockholm, Sweden, Finchesa is a brand that is currently shaping the world of luxury contemporary leather bags for women. With a straightforward yet ambitious goal, we are at the forefront of redefining the boundaries between fashion and functionality, and in doing so, positioning Finchesa as a go-to name for modern women seeking high-quality, luxurious bags that perfectly balance style, practicality, and sophistication.

Our vision for Finchesa is cultivated in Stockholm, a city renowned for its unique blend of historical charm and forward-thinking style. This balance of old and new continues to inspire our designs, ensuring our creations are both timeless and innovative.

Finchesa stands for high-quality bags with a modern, minimalist design. Our creations, inspired by architectural principles and geometric simplicity, showcase clean lines and understated details that resonate with refined elegance. This devotion to minimalism allows the intrinsic beauty of our materials and craftsmanship to shine through.

Our materials come from Italy, known for its superior quality leathers. This dedication to sourcing the finest materials ensures each Finchesa bag not only exudes a luxurious appeal but also holds up against the test of time.

Our production also takes place in Italy, taking advantage of the exceptional craftsmanship skills available in the country's tradition-rich ateliers. This allows us to guarantee a product that not only meets our high standards for aesthetics and quality but also carries a piece of Italy's rich heritage within its stitches.

Our bags are designed for women who seek more than just an accessory. We cater to women who appreciate the beauty in details, women who value quality, women who believe in owning pieces that reflect their personal style. To these women, a bag is a statement, a testament to their lifestyle, a reflection of their identity.

Name: Artkiy Leather Goods Ltd.
Description:
Established in 1958, Artkıy Leather Goods began in a modest workshop in the heart of Izmir, founded by a skilled artisan with a background in tailoring. Over time, we have evolved into a trusted manufacturer specializing in business and travel essentials, men's and women's bags, and small leather goods. As a family-owned company spanning three generations, we are driven by a legacy of passion and craftsmanship.

We are dedicated to providing products that meet the unique needs of our clients. By blending traditional bag making with modern technology, each piece reflects the high standards of quality and precision we’ve upheld from the start. Partnering with prestigious brands, we focus on crafting durable, refined products using ethically sourced materials.

Our vision is rooted in the belief that durability and high quality are essential for sustainability in fashion. By manufacturing products designed to stand the test of time and using byproducts of the meat industry, we strive to minimize waste and encourage mindful consumption. We are also dedicated to ethical production, upholding fair labor practices and promoting equality.

With a rich history spanning over six decades, Artkıy continues to expand its B2B services, embracing innovation to enhance our offerings. Our brand celebrates the blend of timeless craftsmanship with progressive design, creating leather goods that honour our heritage while looking toward the future. Based in Turkey, we remain committed to excellence, delivering exceptional standards and professionalism to our partners in the contemporary and luxury markets.

Name: Vavcraft
Description:
VAVCRAFT is a leather accessories brand founded in 2021. We offer products that are meticulously crafted, combining sustainability, elegance, and craftsmanship at the highest level. Through e-commerce, we reach customers in more than 50 countries.

In our products, we use premium quality leather, specifically vegetable-tanned full-grain leather. This top layer of the leather, known as full-grain, not only provides durability against external factors but also preserves the natural appearance of the leather. Due to its ability to shape, change patterns, and tones with use, it is often referred to as "living leather." This enables us to offer products of superior quality in terms of durability and aesthetics.

Each of our products is entirely handcrafted with great care. Using traditional methods, we meticulously work on every detail. By employing hand stitching in our products, we ensure the robustness and durability of each stitch, guaranteeing that our products remain stylish even with daily use.

At VAVCRAFT, customer satisfaction is of utmost importance, and we carefully design each of our products. While focusing on aesthetics, we also emphasize practicality and compactness, adopting a minimalist approach.

Thank you for considering our brand, and we look forward to serving you with our exquisite handmade leather products.

Our artisans blend age-old techniques with contemporary designs to create products that not only tell a story but also stand the test of time.
At KAIA, we believe in empowering local communities through fair trade and skill development. Each piece we produce is a testament to our dedication to quality and craftsmanship, ensuring that our customers receive nothing but the best. From stylish handbags and wallets to bespoke accessories, our collections cater to discerning tastes while promoting the rich heritage of Kenyan artistry.

Artisan Craftsmanship: Our skilled artisans are at the heart of our brand, bringing passion and expertise to every creation.

Join us on this journey as we redefine luxury leather goods with a conscience. Follow us for updates on new collections, behind-the-scenes insights, and stories that celebrate the beauty of Kenyan craftsmanship.

Connect with Us

Description:
PÖ&ME est une marque française et surtout maison de maroquinerie parisienne depuis le dessin des sacs jusqu'au bout des étiquettes.

Créée et pensée à Paris, PÖ&ME répond à une volonté de nouer des liens avec la Chine, pays très cher à la société, la poésie, la mode & l’art. Les sacs sont Made in Quality : produits en Italie et en Chine, ils répondent à un gage de qualité unique.

Name: Khurma leather goods
Description:
Khurma is a brand that makes handmade leather goods. 
"Khurma" is mainly used in Armenian, Arabic, Persian,  and some other languages as an alternate word for date fruit.
Across many cultures, the date fruit symbolizes the gift of blessings from God and rebirth . 

We take inspiration from the rich hues and textures of date fruit which is similar to color palette of high-quality leather.

My  Mother had a dream while she was pregnant with me that she brought luscious date fruits from abroad to share with her relatives. This dream was a symbol of joy and delight and served as the inspiration for the brand's name and vision. Khurma strives to embody this vision by creating beautiful and functional leather products that bring joy and blessings to their owners.

Leather is a timeless material that has been used for centuries in high-end fashion accessories, and Khurma takes pride in continuing this legacy of craftsmanship.

At Khurma, we employ an artisanal approach to leather crafting.  Each product is carefully handmade ensuring that attention is paid to every detail to meet the highest quality standards. Khurma range of handmade leather products includes wallets, bags, and accessories, each uniquely designed with the same level of care and attention. Most of them are custom-made.

Founder Lilit Barfyan

Name: SHENZHEN TOPSUN LEATHER Technology Co.,Ltd
Description:
Topsun is located in Guangdong and boasts a comprehensive production line for synthetic leather coating, surface treatment, and professional leather testing equipment. We also have an integrated liquid silicone rubber production line, enabling us to produce finished leather products from raw materials. We integrate research and development, design, production, sales, and service, offering personalized organic silicone leather solutions.

As a new environmentally friendly material, made from 100% silicone polymers, It is resistant to hydrolysis, acid and alkali, corrosion, breathable, flame retardant, and waterproof. It does not produce odor or harmful gases even in high temperatures and ultraviolet exposure. It can be used for a long time without yellowing or aging.

It is widely used in many fields such as home decoration, automotive interiors, electronics, boats, yachts, sports, medical equipment, and children's products.

Name: Connie-Avoi
Description:
About Us - CONNIE-AVOI Leather Goods 

Here at Connie-Avoi, we take immense pride in the amazing handcrafted leather goods we create that go above and beyond the norm. Our adventure began in 2019 and we are based in the capital of Ghana, Accra. Since then, we have been committed to sharing the timeless skill of leather craftsmanship with the world. 

Our Craftsmanship 
Our company's core is made up of our artists, whose unflinching devotion to their work is what gives our products their spirit. We make a wide selection of leather items, such as shoes, sandals, slippers, wallets, belts, purses, bifold wallets, and more, with an unwavering attention to detail and a love for perfection. Every product we make incorporates modern styles and international trends with a nod to Ghanaian handcrafted heritage.  


Our Commitment to Quality 
Quality, in our opinion at Connie-Avoi, is the key to our success. We procure the best leather materials that are manufactured ethically, guaranteeing that every piece is not only beautifully crafted but also durable.  We embrace sustainable and environmentally friendly production methods, so our dedication to excellence goes beyond the product itself to include our operations and the environment.

Global Reach 
Our commitment to excellence and workmanship has allowed us to flourish well outside of Ghana. We are thrilled that people all over the world want our products, and we export to the US, UK, Canada, Italy, and several other African countries. Our global reach is a testament to the universal appeal that our leather products have.

Our Vision 
To serve as a bridge connecting people around the world with the cultural richness of Ghana through leather. We envision our leather products as cultural ambassadors, fostering a deep appreciation for the heritage of our nation.

Get in Touch 
We warmly encourage you to explore our exquisite line of leather goods, which are expertly and artistically made.

Name: River City Manufacturing (RCMFG)
Description: River City Manufacturing, a family-owned shop in Gallipolis, Ohio, manufactures leather, Biothane and nylon goods in their small town that sits along the Ohio River. Aaron found leather work as a hobby while recovering from a motorcycle accident–but it quickly became more than that. After he made Erin a leather tote for her birthday, they found an overwhelming interest from their friends and community, and soon after, RCL was founded in 2011. Starting in a spare bedroom, then a shed, a small studio, a garage workshop, a retail store with a workshop and shoe repair, they now work from a 5,000 square foot manufacturing facility. With all the growth over the years in business they’ve never lost sight of their love for leather. They now have several manufacturing clients from all over North America. Their RCL private label products continue to have a beautiful timeless design, rooted in practicality and made to last.

Welcome to Vionentus, where we believe that the way you carry your everyday essentials can be transformed into a stylish, smart, and secure experience. Our premium leather smart wallet is the epitome of our brand’s vision.

Crafted from the finest full-grain leather, the Vionentus Wallet features an integrated cardholder that fans out your cards and keeps them safe from skimming. With the click of a button, you can quickly access your cards and feel confident knowing they are protected. Plus, when paired with AirTag, you can rest assured that your wallet is always safe and within reach.

Our large-capacity slim wallet for AirTag incorporates RFID technology and can hold up to 5 cards in the main slots and has quick-access slots for an additional 2 cards and 6 folded banknotes. It is designed to meet the needs of modern life, with slim storage and quick card access.

Since our inception, we have been on a mission to upgrade your everyday carry, offering original, beautifully crafted, and affordable wallets. With over 60,000 satisfied customers worldwide, we have become a trusted brand in the industry.

At Vionentus, we are changing how you carry your everyday essentials. We invite you to join us on this journey and experience the convenience and style of our premium leather smart wallet.

1982 yılında deri ticareti ile sektöre atılan Akaylar Deri, 1993 yılında mamul nappa ve süet üretimine başlamıştır. Bir aile şirketi olan firmamız, 2002 yılında Sudan’da kendi wet-blue tesisini kurup tek bir ürün üzerine uzmanlaşma kararı almıştır. Sudan’da üretilen yarı mamul kıl koyunu(metis) derileri dünyaya pazarlayıp aynı zamanda İzmir Serbest Bölgesinde bulunan LWG Gold sertifikalı tesisimizde de bitmiş mamul süet üretimi yapmaktadır. 



Akaylar Deri, which stepped into the sector with leather trading in 1982, started to produce finished nappa and suede in 1993. Our family company, established its own wet-blue tannery in Sudan in 2002 and decided to specialize on a single product. The company markets semi-finished hair sheep (metis) leathers from Sudan to the world and also produces finished suede in our LWG Gold certified facility in the Izmir Free Zone.

Name: 5ème Génération
Description:
Derrière ce nom, il y a moi, Olivier MAINGUI, Artisan Maroquinier.

5ème Génération, c’est la concrétisation de tout mon savoir-faire.
Une histoire de famille, de père en fils. Un savoir, un amour du travail artisanal transmis de génération en génération et j’en suis la 5ème !

Trouver le nom de ma marque fut pour moi une évidence.

Tout commence en Belgique et ce sont les femmes qui sont à l’origine de la maroquinerie dans la famille jusqu’à mon arrière-grand-mère qui est venue s’installer en Normandie, aux Baux-De-Breteuil. C’est ensuite ma grand-mère qui poursuivit la maroquinerie puis mon père et à présent moi. L’atelier familial est maintenant depuis de nombreuses années au Fidelaire.
Dès les premiers instants de ma vie, j’ai donc baigné dans la maroquinerie. 
Mes parents avaient leur atelier au sous-sol de la maison. J’ai très vite touché à la matière ! Quand je descendais les voir, j’aimais toucher les peaux & sentir le cuir, cette odeur si particulière qui emplit l’atelier. J’ai très vite aidé mes parents dans les petites taches de maroquinerie.

Après toutes ces années je poursuis de façonner pour les autres, dont de très grandes marques, et en parallèle, je décide de passer de l’ombre à la lumière & de créer ma propre collection de petite maroquinerie pour Homme.

J’ai voulu ces modèles à mon image, motard & féru de belles voitures : sobres, chics, simples & efficaces ; conçus dans une matière noble, un cuir au tannage végétal qui se patinera subtilement dans le temps.

Ma compagne a de suite répondu présente pour travailler à mes côtés & partage avec moi cette belle aventure que nous souhaitons vous faire partager au travers de nos produits fabriqués à la main, dans notre atelier Normand, avec passion & authenticité.

Craftino Leatherworks merges luxury and practicality with a focus on enhancing your professional style. Our key offerings include:

- Lifetime Warranty: We guarantee the longevity of our products with a lifetime warranty.

- Customer Experience: Enjoy exceptional service at every step of your purchase.

Aujourd’hui, c’est toujours dans le même esprit de délicatesse et d’excellence que son fils Abdesattar JALAL MANSOUR mène Jocker Cuir et perpétue un savoir-faire authentique, hérité de père en fils, étendant ce savoir-au gainage en cuir, la tapisserie en cuir.

C’est ainsi qu’avec sa passion du raffinement et de son professionnalisme qu’il gagne la confiance des grandes enseignes de maroquinerie telles que Lanvin Paris, Azzaro, Pierre Cardin, Tumi ou même le prestigieux groupe Lacoste.

on ambition n’en demeure pas moins réduite, puisque depuis son arrivée, Jocker Cuir ne cesse de diversifier ses produits et d’élargir sa clientèle. Pénétrant ainsi des marchés aux quatre coins du globe, et proposant une panoplie de gammes depuis la petite maroquinerie jusqu’aux coffrets cadeaux personnalisés.

Name: ATLAS VIEW INDUSTRIES
Description:
ATLAS VIEW INDUSTRIES was established in 1974. We proudly present Atlas View as a leading leather manufacturer and exporter of premium quality leather garments. Our garments are famous among all Fashion Brands, Sports and Racing Clubs Worldwide.

We are a trusted manufacturer and exporter of premium leather motorbike suits, motocross apparel, and protective gear, supplying businesses worldwide. Our extensive product range includes leather jackets, gloves, shoes, protectors, and other accessories designed for riders, racers, and enthusiasts in the motorsport industry. We provide high-quality, custom-made solutions for businesses looking to offer durable and stylish gear to their customers, ensuring top performance and safety. With a focus on craftsmanship and innovation, we are committed to being your reliable partner for all motorbike and motocross apparel needs.

It all starts off as a side of tanned, various hides pull up. Then it is cut, tooled, dyed, constructed, stitched and burnished. The processes involved are time consuming and a lot of skill goes into crafting the end result, but we believe it is worth it!

Since 1974, we have been at the forefront of the motorsport apparel industry, continuously innovating to meet the needs of riders, racers, and enthusiasts. We take pride in our state-of-the-art R&D department, which drives our commitment to delivering cutting-edge designs and products that push the boundaries of performance. Our products are BSCI certified and meet CE quality standards, ensuring that every item we produce is of the highest quality and reliability. As a trusted B2B manufacturer, we are dedicated to providing businesses with top-tier solutions for all motorbike and motocross apparel needs, tailored to meet the specific requirements of your customers.

Name: WoMum
Description:
WoMum est une marque de sacs à main de luxe écoresponsable (labelisée LWG) qui a vu le jour en 2020. 

Situé au cœur de la Belgique, l’atelier est dirigé par une entreprise familiale avec plus de 50 ans d’expérience : père, mère, enfants se mobilisent sans limite pour créer avec passion.

Pour la fabrication, nous avons opté pour des matières exclusivement recyclées, que ce soit en termes de cuir véritable upcyclé, destiné à l’origine aux grandes marques de luxe ou du cuir végétal constitué de résidus de pommes. L'intérieur des sacs est constitué à partir de 2 à 3 bouteilles en plastique, générant un tissu d'apparence soyeux.

WoMum signifie être mère, donner vie. Cette marque met en lumière les femmes ayant traversé des épreuves comme la maladie, la perte d’un enfant ou encore une situation de vie précaire. Chaque sac porte le prénom d'une femme qui a marqué les esprits et l’incarne. J’apporte de la vérité et du sens en racontant leur vécu à travers ma communication et en faisant poser des femmes riches en histoire. Le sac devient alors la prolongation de nos êtres, un véritable symbole de vie.

Description:
EMELDA deri, merkezi İstanbul'da bulunan uluslararası bir Türk aile şirketidir. 1991 yılından bu yana deri sektörünün öncü ve yenilikçi firmaları arasında yer almaktadır. Çorlu'da bulunan tabakhanemizde en iyi kalite koyun ve kuzu derilerini en son teknoloji makina parkuruyla işlemekte ve müşterilerinin beğenisine sunmaktadır.

Çorlu tabakhane ile senkronize çalışan konfeksiyon atölyesiyle kaliteli ürünler üreterek iç ve dış pazarlardaki müşterilerine sunmaktadır. Avrupa, Kanada, Amerika, Rusya ve Çin gibi büyük pazarlarda kalite anlayışı ve yenilikçi modelleriyle önemli bir ihracat firması olan EMELDA deri konfeksiyon bölümü Türkiye pazarında da önemli bir yere sahiptir.

Ana Showroom'u Zeytinburnu'nda bulunan EMELDA deri konfeksiyon bölümü müşteri memnuniyeti öncelikli satış politikalarıyla Türkiye çapında 8 ve Rusya'da 1 adet olmak üzere öz sermayesi olan toplam 9 mağazayla hizmet vermektedir.

Name: Maison DOGNIN
Description:
THE LOVE OF SHAPE AND FORM 
What we are passionate about in developing our bags is to create new volumes. By thinking first and foremost about how they are going to be used: they need to be practical, lightweight, pleasing to carry or to wear, easy to use, and with the right capacity. 

But we also hope that they will be original, attractive, sometimes fun, and surprising. To embellish everyday life, or to dress up festive events. 

These are values that bring us back to ecology because it is Nature itself that offers us the spectacle of a profusion of shapes and forms, which are extraordinarily diverse and sometimes extraordinarily extravagant. 

Those shapes and forms have always fascinated human beings. Indeed, the lost ancient civilisations continue to make impressions on us through the beauty of the shapes and forms they created. 

Bringing elegance and seduction. Because the bag is a favourite or “fetish” object. The accessory of desire… 

LOCAL MADE
All our bags are made entirely in our workshop, which is located in the 18 th Arrondissement of Paris, in the heart of the Goutte d’Or District. 

This commitment was born out of a desire to recreate the spirit of a “craft workshop” or a “manufacture” as it is known in French, i.e. place of manufacture at which the quality of the work and of the workforce is paramount. 

It also expresses a symbiosis between creating and crafting, because the two are mutually enriching. And also aims to recreate the ecology of a product that is made entirely in one place. 

This anchoring and these values were recognised at the end of 2018 since one of our models, the SOLOGNE, was awarded the First Prize of the “Fabriqué à Paris” (“Made in Paris”) Label in the category Fashion and Accessories. 

INNOVATION AND FINE CRAFT TRADES
Fine craft trades form a precious heritage passed down from ancient times: transforming matter into the sublimely beautiful by the work of the hand to obtain a little extra soul, and an emotion. 

Hybridising innovation and the fine craft trades is a challenge for the future. In order to broaden the scope of what is possible, while also regaining harmony with the environment. 

This involves working on assembly configurations, and on assembling materials together. It contributes to generating new volumes, and particular consistencies.

About Gharial: A Journey of Passion, Craftsmanship, and Empowerment


Gharial founded in 2020, a testament to resilience, craftsmanship, and a commitment to empowering communities. Born from the vision of a young entrepreneur who dared to dream, Gharial stands as a symbol of quality, affordability, and women empowerment.

Gharial is more than a brand; it's the realization of a dream nurtured by a young entrepreneur who faced the challenges of building a startup from the ground up. At the core of our brand is the spirit of the Gharial—an embodiment of rarity, uniqueness, and luxury. Just as the Gharial's skin sets it apart, our products stand out in the world of fashion, offering a blend of elegance and affordability that resonates with the discerning consumer.

Gharial proudly champions women empowerment. In our production team, skilled and dedicated women play a vital role in crafting our exquisite leather goods. We believe in breaking barriers and creating opportunities, contributing to the empowerment of women in the traditionally male-dominated field of craftsmanship.

Luxury is not just a status symbol; it's a feeling, an experience. Gharial is committed to making this experience accessible to all without compromising on quality. Our dedication to affordability is rooted in the belief that everyone deserves to indulge in the finest, and through your support, we continue to turn this belief into reality.

Thank you for choosing Gharial—where passion meets purpose.

Name: MRM
Description:
Créée en Janvier 2023, la Manufacture Roannaise de Maroquinerie est une entreprise française implantée au cœur du bassin roannais, spécialisée dans la conception et la fabrication d’articles de maroquinerie de luxe. Notre manufacture s’inscrit dans une dynamique locale forte, en valorisant les métiers manuels et l’excellence à la française.
Jeune, dynamique et en pleine croissance, notre manufacture s’est rapidement imposée comme un acteur engagé et exigeant dans le secteur du luxe. Notre ambition : allier les techniques artisanales de la maroquinerie à une organisation moderne et rigoureuse pour offrir des produits d’excellence, entièrement conçus et fabriqués en France.
Portée par une équipe de professionnels passionnés, la Manufacture Roannaise de Maroquinerie s’inscrit dans une démarche de transmission des savoirs et de valorisation des métiers manuels. Nous attachons une importance toute particulière à la formation de nos collaborateurs, au respect des matières premières et à l’exigence de chaque étape de production. C’est cette attention portée aux détails et à la qualité qui nous permet aujourd’hui de répondre aux standards élevés de notre client.
Notre développement s’appuie sur des valeurs fortes : artisanat, exigence, qualité et engagement local. En choisissant de produire en France, au sein de notre atelier, nous contribuons à la pérennité de l’emploi dans notre territoire et au rayonnement du savoir-faire français à l’échelle internationale.

Description:
Nasza firma powstała z pasji do skóry, rzemiosła i zamiłowania do tworzenia wyjątkowych przedmiotów które towarzyszą nam w codziennym życiu.

Kładziemy ogromny nacisk na jakość naszych produktów. Wszystkie nasze akcesoria są wykonane z naturalnej skóry garbowanej roślinnie, która pochodzi z polskich garbarni, którą wybieramy osobiście, na miejscu. Dzięki temu mamy pełną kontrolę nad jakością materiałów, co przekłada się na trwałość, estetykę i wyjątkowość naszych wyrobów.

Co możemy zrobić dla Ciebie i Twojej firmy?
- Uchwyty meblowe:

Wykonamy skórzane uchwyty meblowe dla Twojego projektu. Nasze skórzane uchwyty cieszą się popularnością zarówno wśród klientów detalicznych w Polsce, jak i na całym świecie. - Personalizowane skórzane akcesoria:
