Name: Two Puppies Leather Studio Ltd.
Description:
Two Puppies Leather Studio – Honoring the Bond Between Pets and Their Owners

Welcome to Two Puppies Leather Studio, a boutique, locally owned business based in Rolleston, New Zealand. Since 2018, we’ve specialized in crafting bespoke leather keepsakes that celebrate the unbreakable connection between pets and their owners.

Our journey began from a deeply personal experience after losing our beloved dog. This inspired us to create lifelike leather carvings as a way to preserve cherished memories—an idea that has grown into a mission to help others honor their own unique bonds.

What We Offer

Handcrafted Products: From lifelike cardholders to personalized keyrings, each piece is designed and handcrafted with care using eco-friendly, locally sourced leather.

Exceptional Craftsmanship: Every item is meticulously created by hand—cutting, dyeing, carving, painting, sewing, and polishing to perfection.

Timeless Durability: Our leather products are made to last for decades, ensuring they remain a treasured keepsake for years to come.

Our Mission

At Two Puppies Leather Studio, we are passionate about creating meaningful, high-quality products that bring comfort and joy. By combining artistry, craftsmanship, and heart, we strive to provide keepsakes that tell a story and preserve cherished memories.

We’re proud to collaborate with local businesses and communities to expand our offerings and bring these heartfelt creations to more people. Together, we aim to provide meaningful experiences and thrive as a collective.

Explore more about us and our work at twopuppies.co.nz. Let’s connect and create something beautiful together!

Name: Atelier Lily B.
Description:
Des gestes, du sens.
Atelier Lily B propose un travail engagé autour de la matière et de sa sensorialité.

Chaque modèle, en prêt-à-porter ou sur mesure, est pensé pour l’usage : lignes épurées, ergonomie précise, détails ingénieux.

Tous les matériaux sont sourcés en France et sélectionnés pour leur grain naturel et leur tenue dense.

L’atelier mène également un travail de recherche : valorisation des chutes, développement de systèmes de fermeture sans métal, optimisation des montages pour gagner en légèreté et durabilité.

La matière est au cœur du processus, sans apprêt ni artifice, pour des objets sobres, solides, faits pour accompagner le quotidien.

Name: Myriam Couture Ltd
Description:
Myriam Couture is a Woman-led enterprise dedicated to the artistry and innovation of adding value to locally sourced leather and specializes in producing a diverse range of high-quality, durable, and stylish leather goods, including school bags, exquisite wallets, elegant women's bags, versatile tote bags, card holders, and more. 
Our commitment to craftsmanship and sustainability is at the heart of everything we do with our vision to be at the forefront of the leather industry in Uganda, renowned for our superior products, sustainable practices, and significant contribution to community development through value addition, knowledge dissemination and import substitution.

Mass Production of Leather School Bags in Uganda: 
Myriam Coutures is proud to be a key player in the "Mass Production of Leather School Bags in Uganda" research project, focusing on creating a sustainable value chain in leather processing. Our aim is to mass-produce high-quality, durable, and affordable leather school bags, revolutionizing value addition in Uganda's leather industry, commercializing research outcomes, and driving community development. This initiative is a testament to our commitment to innovation and societal impact.

Beyond our impactful school bag project, Myriam Couture designs and manufactures a comprehensive collection of leather accessories. Each piece is meticulously crafted to meet the highest standards of quality and aesthetics, offering our customers products that are both functional and fashionable. 
Our range includes: Wallets & card holders

                                And a growing array of custom leather solutions.

Quality & Durability: We use premium leather and employ skilled artisans to ensure every product stands the test of time.
If you have any question, please contact us at info@myriamcouture.com

Name: BELTRAMI EMORE SRL
Description: We are an artistic leather goods company based in Modena, founded by Mr. Emore Beltrami in 1962. We are specialized in the processing of exotic leathers, calves and high-end tassels, with a wide choice of models and types of manufacturing. We work for well-known and emerging brands that appreciate our craftsmanship and product construction methodology. In addition to belts, the leading item since the opening of the company, we also produce wallets, keychains, bags, backpacks etc. with artisanal techniques, developing models on customer drawings and on a vast historical from which we draw on. The products are entirely made in the factory and this guarantees 100% Made in Italy. We have always put attention to the environment and our leathers are purchased from certified and environmentally friendly tanneries. The skins are traceable throughout the supply chain and we pay particular attention to everything related to the Washington Conventions (CITES) on the protection of the species.

Name: Network Leathers
Description:
Network Leathers was established in 1989 and over the years our products have found a consistent market in most of the European countries , USA , Russia and Australia. In our 30 years of operations, we have closely worked with respectable brands , sometimes assisting them to establish themselves in the market from scratch . Over the years we have understood that for brands to succeed in the markets, consistent quality and timely delivery is a must and it is our constant endeavor to achieve this for all our customers.

Our manufacturing facilities are located in two of Kolkata’s prestigious leather hubs , namely Kasba Industrial Estate and Bantalla Leather goods Complex. These facilities give us a capacity to turn out 50,000 pieces of wallets , purses and accessories per month.

To this end, we are ably assisted by a team of 150 inspired craftsmen and supervisors. Our team successfully combines modern production techniques with authentic craftsmanship to deliver products which have found a lot of appreciation with end consumers.

Name: Bajo la piel

Bajo la piel, es una iniciativa que se desarrolla por un grupo de profesionales que buscamos dar a conocer la historia interna de nuestro pueblo, especialmente en el ámbito de la marroquinería. 

El objetivo es obtener información documentada con visión digital, ordenada, documentada y actualizada de todo el proceso de fabricación de los productos en piel.

Descubre la rica tradición de la industria de la piel en Ubrique, donde la artesanía se encuentra con la innovación. Acompáñanos en un emocionante viaje a través de la historia, las técnicas artesanales y los secretos bien guardados de la producción de productos de piel.

We make leather goods by hand. They take time, but they are designed to last a lifetime.

We can easily change any aspect of your design based on your needs as well. 

A few of our products are typical like bifold wallets and belts. Most of our products are our own designs. We design, prototype, and test in house to make sure that they meet our standards. 

All of our products are made with full grain leather. When the hide goes to the tannery, the end result of that is full grain leather. This is the strongest leather material that is out there. While this does have higher cost than "Genuine Leather", the durability is more than worth it.

Name: Literally Leather
Description:
Merhaba! Ben Deniz, bir deri mühendisi olarak Literally Leather markasını kurdum. Literally Leather, mamul derilerden el yapımı olarak ürettiğim cüzdan, kartlık, gözlük kılıfı ve anahtarlık gibi yüksek kaliteli deri aksesuarları sunan bir markadır.

Her bir ürün, büyük bir titizlikle ve özenle, tamamen el işçiliği ile üretilmektedir. Vegetal (bitkisel tabaklanmış) deriler kullanarak, doğaya ve insan sağlığına dost ürünler tasarlıyor ve üretiyorum. Deri mühendisliği bilgim sayesinde, derinin tüm işlenti aşamalarını en iyi şekilde yönetiyor ve yüksek kaliteli deri ürünler ortaya çıkarıyorum.

Literally Leather olarak, müşterilerimize hem şıklığı hem de dayanıklılığı bir arada sunuyoruz. Kullandığım diğer sarf malzemeler de yüksek kalitede olup, ürünlerimin kalitesini daha da artırmaktadır. Her bir tasarım, benzersiz ve özgün olup, Literally Leather’ın imzasını taşır.

Literally Leather ile siz de el yapımı deri ürünlerin zarafetini ve kalitesini keşfedin!

Name: Shandong Kaishili synthetic material technology co., ltd
Description:
Shansong Kaishili synthetic material technology co., ltd is a high-tech company engaged in the development, manufacturing, and marketing of Microfiber base, Microfiber leather & Microfiber Suede leather etc. Artificial leather & synthetic leather supplier.
Those products have been widely used in the Sofa, Car seat, clothes, shoes, bag, belt, and luggage leather business.

Features & Benefits are as follows:

1, Industrialization
As an integrated microfiber base and PU leather products dual-qualified enterprise, our products surely have both great price advantages and quality control advantages.

2, Environmental Innovation 
The company has made continuous breakthroughs in solvent-free and water-based Microfiber products, greatly reducing environmental pollution, and striving to create natural, comfortable, and ecological synthetic leather products that replace genuine leather.

3, Products Certification
The company has passed the ISO9001:2016/ISO9001:2015, ISO9001:14000 quality system certification, Europe SGS Reach Certification & GRS Scope Certificate, etc.

4, University's joint action
In cooperation with Qingdao University of Science and Technology, a characteristic chain integrating production, learning, and research has been created. We have an investment fund there, which is used to support Scientific Researchers on the environmental performance of products and breakthroughs in leather technical Subjects.

5, Brand Cooperation
As one of the eight microfiber base & PU leather manufacturers in China. In the past 12 years, we have been a supplier of LV, NIKE, ADIDAS, FORD, HYUNDAI, NISSAN, GEELY, JAC, FAW, etc.

As one of the eight microfiber base & PU leather manufacturers in China, we sincerely wish to be your friends & expand the market together.

Name: Sunny International Leather / Sunny Int. Exotic Leather Co. Sdn Bhd.
Description:
Sunny/Anson International Leather Company Limited was established in 2000 as a trading company with a strong base in the global exotic leather industry. From humble origins, we have positioned ourselves as a leading source in providing a wide variety of quality reptile skins. 

Our range of sustainable, genuine exotic leather choices range from python, sea snake, lizard, alligator and ostrich.

Sunny was born out of a desire to revolutionize the exotic leather space by vertically integrating our operations, such that we have the capability to supply you with the highest quality finished skin you can get in the market, at the most competitive price points. 

Our tannery, situated in Malaysia, is housed in a brand new facility equipped with the latest machinery and technology, capable of churning out a wide array of tanned reptile skins and hides, sustainably sourced w/ the highest quality and given the best QC processes. Chaque pièce est façonnée de A à Z par un artisan, dans le respect de la matière, du rythme naturel et des gestes traditionnels. Sellerie, maroquinerie, bottier, peau lainée et confection de vêtements : cinq métiers, cinq univers réunis dans une même exigence de qualité et de beauté.

Ancré dans son territoire, notre atelier est aussi un modèle de micro-économie sociale et rurale. Ici, la fabrication est locale, durable, sincère et chaque création raconte une histoire, la vôtre.

Labellisé Entreprise du Patrimoine Vivant depuis 2008, Le Sac du Berger incarne un artisanat d’excellence qui relie passé et présent, nature et culture, utilité et poésie.

Name: Curtume J. Kempe
Description:
FAMILY TRADITION
The history of the tannery began in 1960 with Tannery Rota and Mr. Jeronymo Kempe working as employee. In 1967, Mr. Jeronymo Kempe entered the Tannery Rota membership framework. A few years later in 1985, Mr. Jeronymo Kempe bought this Tannery, which happened to be called Tannery J. Kempe. It continued the production of cowhide and articles for saddlery. In 2000, the businessman Gervasio Costa, Mr. Jeronymo’s son in law, bought Tannery J. Kempe. Gervasio Costa always liked challenges, and even though the Tannery was small at this time, he saw it as a major challenge. Fortunately with many years of experience as an entrepreneur, he saw quite a few ways to improve the Tannery J. Kempe. He initiated a plan of action for the company. This included improving the production and machinery, increasing the production lines and the demand in the domestic market, and lastly entering the international market with a quality product. Currently Tannery J. Kempe specializes in the manufacture of tanned hides to 100% vegetable. In our processes we use a mixture of natural tannins, which guarantee the products feature noble, elegant, distinguished and excellent acceptance in the Brazilian market and most of the demanding world markets. Our main products are intended for the manufacture of shoe soles, insoles, welts and fachetes for footwear, outsole for ballet shoes, manufacturing belts and belts, rustic furniture, saddles, harnesses, ties and goals; gloves, bags, briefcases, suitcases and small artifacts. In our production processes there are still some by-products generated. They are used as raw materials to fuel industries and manufacturers of animal protein, gelatin, pets, glue and industrial tallow.

Name: ATELIER JOS
Description:
JOS LUXURY LEATHER GOODS
We are a company of creation, development and production of luxury leather goods.

We use a unique and 100% manual method in our production line.



We have been operating in this segment for more than 10 years, developing and producing luxury pieces for our brand "JOS", and also for national and international brands and companies.

In addition to Portugal, we provide our services to brands and companies in Switzerland, Germany, Holland, Spain, France, Canada, Angola, Brazil and the United States.



Bringing a vast knowledge in the area of development and production of luxury leather goods, Juliana Oliveira founded in 2012 in Lisbon, Portugal "JOS" and opened her first luxury leather goods atelier

Juliana has developed exclusive and 100% manual production techniques in luxury leather pieces, not using any type of machine to produce her pieces, using only hand tools throughout her production line, she has also created an exemplary production line, with a unique organization and having as a priority the well-being of her entire work team as well as maintaining the high quality of the pieces they produce,  all JOS artisans are trained by Juliana Santos, in order to perform a work of excellence.

Juliana is a reference in this segment of luxury leather goods, where she also works as a teacher and consultant, helping companies in the luxury leather goods manufacturing segment to organize the production sectors and train their employees, helping these companies to compose an organized, clean, productive and healthy environment, in order to reach a level of high excellence within this segment.

Name: Ateliers du Vignoble Nantais - AVN
Description:
AVN – Ateliers du Vignoble Nantais

AVN perpétue l’excellence artisanale dans la maroquinerie au cœur du vignoble nantais. Notre atelier est reconnu pour la fabrication d’articles de maroquinerie haut de gamme, du sac au portefeuille.

Un savoir-faire d’exception: 
Chez AVN, la passion du cuir se transmet de génération en génération. Nos artisans associent techniques traditionnelles et innovations technologiques pour répondre aux exigences de qualité et de précision de nos clients. L’exigence du geste, le souci du détail et la recherche constante de la perfection guident notre quotidien.

Rejoignez une équipe engagée:
Travailler chez AVN, c’est choisir un environnement moderne, convivial et stimulant, où la transmission des compétences est au cœur de notre démarche. Grâce à notre école de formation interne certifiée Qualiopi, nous formons chaque année de nouveaux talents aux métiers de la maroquinerie, sans prérequis d’expérience.

Le bien-être, une priorité :
Nous croyons que l’épanouissement de chacun fait la force du collectif. Chez AVN, l’équilibre entre exigence professionnelle et convivialité est une valeur essentielle, partagée par l’ensemble de nos équipes.

Envie de rejoindre une entreprise qui valorise l’artisanat, la qualité et l’humain ? Découvrez nos opportunités et écrivez avec nous la prochaine page de la maroquinerie d’excellence.

Name: Sulha Afrika
Description:
Sulha Afrika is a social enterprise making waves in the fashion industry.

We work towards the United Nations Sustainable Development Goals of Climate Action, responsible consumption and production, as well as Gender equality. 

There is a need for society to not only be educated on conscious consumption, but they should also be enabled to make the responsible choice by providing these solutions to them.

Sulha Afrika seeks to do value addition on raw hides and skins from the livestock and fishing industries into high-quality and circular  genuine leather products. We make and sell genuine leather bags, belts, shoes, accessories, and indigenous shoes while economically enabling women and youth from low income backgrounds.

We seek to offer an African solution to global sustainability

Name: JVL Leather Forever
Description:
JVL Leather Forever — O tempo do seu lado

A JVL Leather Forever é a maior marca e produtora de moda em couro do Brasil. Fundada em 1998, na cidade de Tapejara (RS), mantém até hoje sua matriz administrativa e industrial no local onde tudo começou. Nascemos com o propósito de transformar o couro em peças que atravessam gerações — com elegância, resistência e significado.

Combinamos tradição e inovação para criar produtos de design atemporal, feitos para quem busca mais do que moda: busca confiança, autenticidade e durabilidade. Acreditamos que o verdadeiro luxo está naquilo que permanece — por isso, nossas peças estão sempre com o tempo do seu lado.

Mais do que uma marca, somos uma empresa feita de pessoas. Valorizamos o bem-estar de cada colaborador e cultivamos um ambiente de trabalho saudável, onde o respeito, a gentileza e o sentimento de pertencimento são parte essencial da nossa cultura. Acreditamos que cuidar de quem faz é o primeiro passo para entregar algo que realmente vale a pena.

Atendemos o atacado em todo o Brasil e também operamos com e-commerce, marketplaces e sete lojas próprias: duas em São Paulo, duas em Tapejara, duas em Gramado e uma em Balneário Camboriú, além de um escritório na mesma cidade. Consolidamos assim uma presença nacional, sempre fiéis ao que acreditamos: couro com propósito, feito para durar.

Name: Del Vacchio Leather
Description:
Tre generazioni di passione per la pelle
L'eccellenza italiana nella concia di pellami ovicaprini
La storia della famiglia Del Vacchio nel mondo della concia inizia, negli anni ‘70, con Francesco Del Vacchio. Vent’anni dopo, insieme ai figli Eugenio e Luigi, fonda a Solofra la conceria Del Vacchio Leather Diffusion specializzata nella concia di pellami ovicaprini per pelletteria, calzatura ed abbigliamento.

Artigianalità 4.0 
Il valore aggiunto dei nostri articoli risiede nella creatività dei nostri artigiani, che integrano abilmente la tecnologia nella loro manualità. Questo connubio permette di realizzare pezzi unici, simbolo del Made in Italy, che non solo rappresentano l’eccellenza artigianale, ma offrono anche soluzioni innovative e sostenibili al mercato della moda italiana e internazionale. La sostenibilità è al centro del nostro processo produttivo, riflettendo il nostro impegno per un futuro più responsabile.

Creatività & Innovazione
Al servizio del fashion system internazionale
Il nostro obiettivo è portare artigianalità e creatività nel mondo, con un forte impegno verso l’economia circolare e la sostenibilità. Siamo rivolti al mercato globale e seguiamo attentamente tutte le sue evoluzioni per soddisfarne e anticiparne i bisogni.

L’innovazione nei processi di concia e la creatività delle nostre proposte si traducono in collezioni che, ogni anno, vengono presentate nelle più importanti fiere internazionali. L’esperienza costruita all’estero ci ha permesso di entrare in contatto con una varietà di clienti ed esigenze, rafforzando il nostro know-how.

Name: sirp
Description:
sirp is built on a rich history of creative collaborations with prominent fashion houses  and international design brands. 

We work with designers around the world offering tailored and customized solutions backed by state-of-the-art industrial capabilities in leather finishing. 

Our flagship production includes singles and double coated splits, trimmed backs, and calf skins, as well as aniline finish hides.

Through exclusive mold, and paper coating water-based finishes, we craft original leather grains and tailor them to the aesthetic needs and technical specifications of each individual design application. 

Natural elegance, durability, and strength add to the maximization of cutting yield in the most creatively demanding applications for handbags, small leather goods, belts, shoes, and interior furnishings. 

sirp portfolio of textures and soft covering options is completed by aniline finish full and top grain leathers as well as fabrics and recycled leather backing materials.

Name: Gala Gloves SRL
Description:
Since 1930, Gala Gloves boasts a long family history of teaching the generations that followed to research brand new styles, where the quality of materials and the mastery of their workmanship give shape to unique and priceless accessories.

Nowadays, the artisanal studio a few kilometres from Naples, is led by Alessandro Pellone, the master glove-maker who nurtures a focussed vision: to bring the sophistication of Made in Naples craftsmanship to the world’s attention.
Elegant and refined. Gala Gloves leather gloves are works of art hand-crafted by specialist artisans who, for more than 80 years, on a daily basis, produce precious accessories following one of the most fascinating artisanal Neapolitan crafts: the art of leather glove making.

Every pair of gloves is produced thanks to a long and meticulously detailed process divided into 25 separate phases: from the hide selection to the stitching, which is followed by six steps of thorough quality control, in the pursuit of the imperfect perfection unique to manual work.
Gala Gloves leather gloves are made by hand. This means that every single stroke of the artisan’s hands during the cutting, balancing and drafting stages, just like every detail of the quality materials used, cannot be entirely replicated.

This is how unique pieces are made.

Oltre alla fornitura di pelli, Veneta Italiana Pelle offre anche servizi di consulenza e supporto tecnico ai propri clienti, aiutandoli a scegliere i materiali più adatti per i loro progetti e a sviluppare soluzioni personalizzate. L'azienda si distingue per la sua capacità di innovare continuamente, integrando tecniche tradizionali con nuove tecnologie per offrire prodotti sempre più performanti e rispettosi dell'ambiente.

Name: Mubi Leather
Description:
Mubi leather is a sustainable made in Kenya brand that manufactures Premium and Authentic Kenyan-made leather bags and accessories.
We do this by creating an impact in our community by working with local artisans and being environmentally conscious through all our processes, that is, 
Starting from ethically sourcing our raw materials, 
a friendly and healthy working environment for the artisans,
 eco-friendly packaging using 100% plastic-free/ paper and reusable packaging bags for our products, and 
Conservation of the environment by upcycling leather offcuts from the workshop floor through arts and crafts as opposed to bumping them into landfill which would cause harm to the environment.
We exist to manufacture authentic, highly functional, and premium leather products for our customers. 
Our Brand targets professional men and women who commute with their laptops and other electronic gadgets, hence our products are intentionally designed to cater to their needs. 
For example, our bags are designed to have a separate padded compartment that is meant to safely hold a laptop and protect it from shock but also has more sufficient space that accommodates their other essentials like books, chargers, wallets, and phones.
Through this passion and business, Mubi Leather has created jobs for artisans which earns them income for their families. For every bag you buy, our skilled artisans earn and make a living.

Name: SHOPKOP
Description:
In today's fast-paced world, traditional Indian art forms, particularly handcrafted items, have been overshadowed by machine-made goods, and artisans have been replaced by automation. At SHOPKOP, we strive to rekindle people's connection to our cultural heritage by bridging the gap between crafts and people. Our niche market focuses on creating opportunities for the iconic Kolhapuri Chappal, a style of sandal renowned for its unique craftsmanship. SHOPKOP is our first step towards supporting the growth of hardworking artisans who have been creating these beautiful products for generations, yet often fail to receive recognition for their artistry. Our vision is to bring them to the mainstream.

As a leading manufacturer of Kolhapuri Chappals, we take pride in our craftsmanship and celebrity designer status. We recognize that the market is inundated with counterfeit Kolhapuri Chappals, and we are committed to delivering authentic products to customers worldwide. At SHOPKOP, our mission is to promote the authenticity and cultural significance of this iconic footwear style while supporting the artisans who bring them to life.

Name: Soydan A.S.
Description:
İsa Soydan ile başlayan deri maceramız babadan oğula geçerek bugünlere gelmiştir.Güleryüzlü yönetim kurulumuz yönetiminde günümüzün modern tesislerinde dünyanın bir çok ülkesine deri imalatı yapmaktayız.1947 de başlayan maceramız bugün Çorlu’daki modern tesislerde devam etmektedir. 

Önceleri sadece ayakkabılık deri imal eden Soydan 1971 yılında giysilik deri imalatına başlamıştır. Uzun yıllar Türk deri piyasasının büyük bir kısmını karşılamaktayken, ilerleyen yıllarda yurtdışına da açılarak bu alana da kendimizi daha iyi kanıtlamışızdır. Şimdilerde sadece Türk derileriyle kısıtlı kalmayıp,  Amerika, Avustralya, Yeni Zelanda, İngiltere, Güney Afrika, İspanya. İtalya vs. gibi ülkelerin de derilerimizi kullanmaktadır. 
1975 yılından itibaren yeni neslinde katılımıyla daha yenilikçi ve modern bir yapı almış olup şu anda Türk ve dünya deri piyasasında hatırı sayılır bir yeri olan Soydan Deri olarak, 1990 yılında Kazlıçeşme’ki tesislerini bırakarak Çorlu’daki yeni ve modern tesislerimize geçiş yaptık.Tüm bunları  Soydan A.Ş. olarak sizlere birinci kalite hizmet vermek için çalışmaktayız.

Name: Zadelspecialist Het Edele Dier
Description:
Fijn en goed rijden begint bij een juist passend zadel voor het paard en de ruiter.

Tijdens een pasconsult bekijk ik of het zadel bij het paard en bij de ruiter past, het is heel goed mogelijk dat dit niet het geval is. Geregeld past het zadel goed op het paard, maar past het zadel niet bij de bouw van de ruiter.

Denk bijvoorbeeld aan korte benen waarbij de knieën tegen de wrongen aankomen of juist lange benen die helemaal geen steun krijgen van de kniewrongen. Dus veel aspecten die lekker paardrijden in de weg kunnen staan en lichamelijke klachten kunnen geven, zoals rugpijn of verkramping tussen de schouders. Als terugkoppeling krijg ik dan, lukt wel, ik ben eraan gewend of zelfs, ik neem altijd een pijnstiller voordat ik ga rijden. Bij een goed passend zadel voor paard en ruiter is dit vaak allemaal weg te nemen!

Omgekeerd komt ook vaak voor, de ruiter zit perfect in het zadel, maar het paard kan niet goed functioneren door een niet correcte pasvorm. U blijft steken op een bepaald niveau, het paard wil bijvoorbeeld geen goede wendingen maken, galop wissels, verzamelen, staakt, bokt/steigert enz. dan kan dit aan de pasvorm van uw zadel liggen. Bij een goed passend zadel heeft het paard de ruimte bij de schouders, ligt het zadel stabiel voor en zijwaarts en is de ruimte bij de schoft en wervels voldoende om lekker te kunnen bewegen. Als het zadel de correcte boom heeft dan zijn er vaak maar kleine aanpassingen nodig om dit resultaat te behalen.

Tijdens een pasconsult zult u ook altijd gevraagd worden om te rijden. Tijdens stand kan een zadel perfect liggen, zodra een paard beweegt verandert zijn zelfhouding en zal de beweging in combinatie met het gewicht van de ruiter ook van invloed zijn op het gedrag van het zadel. 

Voor meer informatie www.hetedeledier.nl

Name: Si-TPV
Description:
Our Si-TPV silicone vegan leather can be laminated with an ambitious of substrates using high memory area, or other adhesives. Other kinds of synthetic leather, by contrast, Si-TPV silicone leather not only integrates the advantages of traditional leather in terms of sight, smell, touch, and green fashion but also by providing various OEM &ODM options, giving designers unlimited design freedom.

The Key benefits of Si-TPV silicone vegan leather, offers a long-term skin-friendly soft touch, and an aesthetic sense of sight in terms of stain resistance, cleanliness, durability, color personalization, and design freedom. No DMF and plasticizer usage, odorless, as well as better wear and scratch resistance, heat and cold resistance, UV resistance, and hydrolysis resistance that effectively prevents leather aging to ensure non-tacky comfortable touch even in heat and cold environments.

Si-TPV Silicone Vegan Leather products are widely used in all seating, sofa, furniture, clothing, purse, handbag,  belts, and shoe applications,  with specialized sectors in automotive, marine, 3C electronic products,  apparel, accessories, footwear,  sports gear, upholstery& decorative, public seating system hospitality, healthcare,  medical furniture, office furniture, residential furniture, outdoor recreation, toys, consumer products where there is a stringent demand for high-quality specifications and material selection, that can meet the eco-friendly requirements of end customers.

Name: B.WANT.B
Description:
Every single product is made using and recycling Indian truck tarpaulins, with a detailed selection of the parts to be used, with scissor cutting panel by panel, we use only vegetable or semi-vegetable tanned leather for the details. 

The workmanship is 100% Made in ITALY, selecting the details of the tarpaulin that will make the bag you are buying unique, the fabric of the cordura tarpaulins in Cotton Wax texture, after traveling for thousands of km on the roads of India. new life on your bag, with craftsmanship in every single step, traveling with you again on new roads, in new places, for new adventures. 

Each bag tells its story, its experience, every imperfection on the fabric tells of a uniqueness not a defect, the imperfections on the leather are the sign of a natural product and not a defect. 

Thus, each bag is unique in its kind, maintaining only the "cut" of the model as a peculiarity, but every small and unique detail that we use of the tarpaulin, makes the bag you are buying a unique piece

TOOPEER is also committed to sustainable development and environmental responsibility. The brand adopts environmentally friendly materials and focuses on transparency and social responsibility in the supply chain. TOOPEER believes that high-quality leather goods production should not only pursue excellent quality, but also focus on environmental protection and social sustainability.
Whether you are pursuing fashion, quality, or environmental awareness, TOOPEER is your ideal choice.

Un de ses savoir-faire les plus emblématiques est, depuis la création de l’entreprise, le cloutage qui est toujours réalisée à la main, clou par clou, par nos maroquiniers minutieux et passionnés, selon des dessins propres à la Maison Laffargue.

Description:
LEAURY stands among the finest and most luxurious manufacturers of handcrafted premium-grade leather shoes, bags, and accessories.

Since 2010, we’ve been devoted to the art of crafting exceptional leather goods, a passion that led us, in 2023, to proudly adopt the name LEAURY, derived from “LEATHER” and “LUXURY.”

Our journey is rooted in a love for timeless craftsmanship and a commitment to creating pieces that stand the test of time. Each product reflects our dedication to enduring quality, elegant design, and authentic artistry.

We take pride in sourcing the finest full-grain leather from reputable tanneries around the world. Through a meticulous selection process, every hide is chosen for its unique texture, character, and natural beauty, ensuring every piece we craft is as distinct as it is luxurious.


Today, LEAURY’s premium leather products, including luxury leather bags, handcrafted shoes, and refined accessories, are designed to combine heritage craftsmanship with contemporary elegance.

Name: DiMar Group Spa
Description:
Our story begins in 1981 when Angelo Cionco established the first work room  in Valentano with 8 employees including Fabio Martinelli. In 1990 Martinelli decides to open his own work room.
The two entrepreneurs joined in 1999, Di.Mar Srl was born and a Leather-goods district was established, which had about 80 employees..

In 2012, in response to customer growth demands , we decided to create more companies, each dedicated to a brand: Di.Mar S.r.l., Bottega Pieffe S.r.l., I.P.V. Srl based in Valentano and Cover S.r.l. based in Campli in the Teramo area, reproducing a step by step that has already taken place in the Valentano district.

In 2015 DiMar Group Srl was born and in March 2019 the 5 companies merge to form DiMar Group Spa (a company owned by the Martinelli and Cionco families), thus celebrating 20 years from the official birth and with the aim of ensuring new momentum towards production models based on the principles of Sustainability for people (the company has been SA8000 certified for 3 years) and the environment , process and product innovation based on principles voted to Lean Thinking and Circular Economy.
Today DiMar Group Spa has more than 432 direct employees and over 150 artisans who collaborate exclusively with the company, operating on two production districts: Valentano, in the province of Viterbo, and Campli, in the province of Teramo.

For DiMar Group, people are fundamental for the management of processes and transformation activities, leading to the creation of high quality "Made in Italy" products. Furthermore, in order to deal with the new market challenges the company is structuring itself with a managerial team alongside the owner, to bring organizational and managerial proficiency and tools, guaranteeing besides a modern corporate governance also the generational passage for the next years.

Name: Star Leather Industries
Description:
Founded in 1991, Star Leather Industries Private Limited (SLI) is one of Pakistan’s leading manufacturers and exporters of premium finished leather and leather goods.

At the core of our operations is a fully integrated leather factory where every stage of production, from processing raw hides to producing finished leather, is handled in-house. This allows us to maintain high standards and ensure the consistency of our products. With an annual production capacity of 8.5 million sq. ft. of leather, we are well-equipped to meet the diverse demands of our global clientele. In addition, SLI also operates a safety gloves manufacturing unit that uses leather sourced directly from our tannery. This seamless integration gives us full control over the quality of our gloves, ensuring they are durable, comfortable, and reliable.

We proudly export our premium leather products to major international markets, including Italy, Japan, China, Germany, Vietnam, and Spain. Our long-standing relationships with global clients reflect our commitment to delivering quality products and building strong partnerships.

At Star Leather Industries, we emphasize innovation and sustainability. Our skilled leather technicians continuously engage in research and development to create new articles that meet the latest fashion trends. Our success is driven by our skilled and experienced workforce who uphold our core values of quality, integrity, and professionalism.

We are members of the Pakistan Tanners Association (PTA), Karachi Chamber of Commerce and Industry (KCCI), and the Korangi Association of Trade and Industry (KATI), reflecting our active role in advancing the leather industry both locally and globally.

Whether you’re a startup testing your first design or an established label scaling production, our no MOQ policy, craftsmanship, and global export capabilities make us the team behind your success.

Name: Leatherific
Description:
At Leatherific, we craft exceptional leather goods that embody elegance, strength, and craftsmanship. Every design reflects our dedication to quality blending traditional artistry with modern style to create products that last a lifetime.

Every Leatherific product tells a story of tradition, precision, and pride. From luxury leather dog collars and leashes to weightlifting belts, wrist straps, coasters, and mousepads, each piece is carefully handmade using ethically sourced, full-grain leather. Our artisans combine age-old leatherworking techniques with contemporary aesthetics to craft products that are as elegant as they are enduring.

What sets Leatherific apart is our commitment to authentic quality, sustainable craftsmanship, and customer satisfaction. We ensure that every product not only looks premium but also feels built to last whether it’s for your pet, your workout, or your workspace.

With a growing global presence, Leatherific proudly represents UK design and Indian craftsmanship on the world stage, offering customers the perfect balance of strength, style, and sophistication.

Name: Threadx
Description:
ThreadX is a company committed to revolutionizing the leather industry, transforming raw leather into high quality products like leather jackets and leather goods. We combine the finest leather with modern craftsmanship, specializing in techniques such as embroidery, appliqué, stud detailing, and glass beading to create unique, premium designs for the global market.

Our mission is to elevate Pakistan's leather exports by bringing together the best local artisans and cutting-edge production methods. We empower artisans with the tools and training to showcase their skills on the global stage, helping them meet international standards. ThreadX is here to take the leather industry to new heights, ensuring that Pakistan’s renowned leather quality gets the global recognition it deserves.

Name: Aamati Green Pvt Ltd
Description:
AAMATI Green isn’t just innovating—we’re rewriting the rules of materials science. Imagine a world where luxury leather isn’t extracted from animals or synthesized from petroleum, but grown from nature’s abundance—specifically, the 1.3 million tons of mangoes India wastes annually. Our patented bio-fabrication technology, developed with CSIR-CLRI, transforms this agricultural surplus into high-performance, plastic-free leather—biodegradable, carbon-negative, and indistinguishable from premium animal leather in quality.

This is circular economy reimagined:

-Farmers gain new revenue from what was once trash.
-Brands get a sustainable material that doesn’t compromise on aesthetics or durability.
-The planet breathes easier—no microplastics, no slaughterhouses, no toxic tanning.

Unlike “vegan leather” reliant on PU/PVC (essentially plastic waste in disguise), We're proud to create India's first commercially viable plant-based leather – a solution that addresses agricultural waste while offering a genuine alternative to animal and synthetic leathers.

Join us as we redefine sustainable materials and build a future where luxury meets responsibility.

#SustainableFashion #CircularEconomy #Innovation #PlantbasedLeather #CleanTech

Name: Asian Adores
Description:
Welcome to Asian Adores, a premier manufacturer and exporter of high-quality leather goods, with over three decades of experience in delivering exceptional products. Headquartered in Mumbai, we are also proud to be trusted corporate gift suppliers, offering a comprehensive range of customizable gifting solutions under our registered brand, ADORA - Total Gifting Solutions.

Our product portfolio includes an array of premium items such as folders, folios, laptop and travel bags, wallets, card holders, and much more, all meticulously crafted to blend functionality with elegance. With over 26,000 customizable products displayed on our website https://adoragifts.trustpass.alibaba.com, we provide tailored solutions that meet the diverse needs of our global clientele.

At Asian Adores, we are committed to upholding the highest standards of quality craftsmanship, timely delivery, and competitive pricing. We proudly export to the USA, UK, Europe, and Australia, consistently delivering products that adhere to international standards of excellence. Our reputation is built on fostering long-term partnerships through exceptional service, reliable delivery, and uncompromising quality.

When you choose Asian Adores, you choose a trusted partner dedicated to elevating your brand through premium leather goods and corporate gifting solutions.

Name: Shades Accessories
Description:
Shades Accessories is a leading provider of premium leather accessories that cater to the modern professional's style and needs. We offer a wide range of leather products, including briefcases, wallets, belts, and more, all designed to enhance your professional style and leave a lasting impression on your colleagues and clients.

Our leather is carefully selected for its durability and elegance, and each piece is meticulously crafted by our skilled artisans. Name: Conceria Antonio
Description:
Founded in 1900, Conceria Antonio is a multi-generational leather tannery headquartered in Beirut, Lebanon. With over a century of experience, we specialize in producing premium cow, buffalo, goat, and sheep leather — both finished and unfinished — tailored for global industries including fashion, footwear, upholstery, leather goods, automotive, garments, and military applications.

Our raw hides are sourced exclusively from Europe to ensure the highest quality, and every piece is tanned, colored, and finished using advanced techniques rooted in tradition. We serve clients worldwide who demand durability, consistency, and value.

From full grain and nubuck to water-repellent split and suede, Conceria Antonio delivers exceptional leather solutions that meet European standards of performance, sustainability, and style.

We believe that the success of our clients is a reflection of our own. That’s why we focus on long-term relationships, tailored service, and a relentless pursuit of innovation.

Name: Cam.Pel. srl
Description:
The Business was started in 1957 by Vincenzo  Campanile, a very talented person inspired by a great passion and expertise in “crafting” leather goods. His sons Gianfranco and Pippo presently run the business focused on manufacturing the above mentioned accessories for very high level national and international Luxury Maison. The high quality of products and  well run production process have allowed the company to  keep stable relationships with the customer-brands served so far.
The company presently employs high specialized workers and advanced technology along the entire production cycle. A network of very qualified sub-contractors has been created in order to enlarge the global production capacity and afford also potential seasonal peaks of in-coming orders from customers.
Projecting, modeling, prototyping, sampling are the first computer-aided manufacturing steps and represent the inputs to following process phases that involve workers and machines permanently under the control of quality department and planning office.
Product lines presently manufactured include bags, folders, small bags, wallets, briefcases, purses, organizer, diaries, business card holders, key rings, cases for writing instruments  and hi-tech accessories .

Name: SYRAAH
Description:
Imagine owning a piece of art that not only enhances your style but also changes lives. Welcome to SYRAAH, where every leather bag is more than just an accessory—it's a story, a legacy, and a force for good.

Our mission is bold: to empower 1,000 skilled artisans, transforming their lives and communities through the creation of beautiful, handcrafted leather bags. In a world of mass production, we stand out by celebrating the art of craftsmanship, where each piece is meticulously crafted by hands that have honed their skills over generations.

But this isn't just about bags. It's about making a difference. Every purchase you make directly contributes to the livelihood of an artisan, helping them secure a better future for themselves and their families. We're not just selling products; we're building futures, one stitch at a time.

Our leather bags are unique, just like you. They carry the marks of the artisan who crafted them, the stories of the materials sourced with care, and the promise of quality that will last a lifetime. Each bag is a testament to the power of human touch in an age of machines, a blend of tradition and innovation, elegance and durability.

At SYRAAH, we believe in the power of community. By following our journey, you’re not just supporting a brand—you’re joining a movement. A movement that values people over profits, quality over quantity, and stories over trends. We’re here to redefine what it means to be a fashion brand in today’s world, and we want you to be part of this revolution.

So why not be part of something bigger? Follow our page to stay connected with a brand that’s changing the game. Share our story, because together, we can make a real impact. And when you carry a SYRAAH bag, know that you’re carrying more than just leather—you’re carrying hope, empowerment, and a brighter future for artisans who need it most.

Join us. Let’s craft a better world, one bag at a time.

ClaCa Design is ook in te huren voor upcycle / hergebruik projecten. 

Ook kan je ClaCa Design inhuren voor upcycle projecten.

De tassen uit de circulaire collectie worden allen van gebruikt leer gemaakt en zijn allemaal uniek.
De collectie is gelanceerd in 2022 en volop in ontwikkeling. 

Wil je als Kringloop organisatie, Circulair Ambachtscentrum of instelling met naaiatelier  samenwerken met @clacadesign om een circulair naiatelier te ontwikkelen of naar een hoger niveau tillen? 

Neem dan zeker contact op!
○○○○○○○○○○○○○○○○○
Dutch Design uit een Italiaanse  

Claudia heeft werken met  hergebruik van materialen in het hart en daarom is inmiddels de circulaire lijn CIRCO van leren tassen ontwikkeld. Er wordt echter ook met zeildoeken en banners gewerkt.

Name: Studioart Leather Interiors
Description:
Studioart è un brand italiano che valorizza la storicità e l’eccellenza della manifattura in pelle attraverso soluzioni innovative per l’interior design contemporaneo.

Specializzata nella produzione di rivestimenti murali e pelli decorative per interni, offre soluzioni modulari, su misura o custom a servizio di architetti, interior designer e brand internazionali, con un’estetica distintiva e una forte attenzione alla qualità dei materiali.

--

Studioart is an Italian brand that enhances the heritage and excellence of leather craftsmanship through innovative solutions for contemporary interior design.

Specializing in the production of leather wall coverings and decorative leathers for interiors, it offers modular, bespoke, or custom solutions for architects, interior designers and international brands, with a distinctive aesthetic and a strong focus on material quality.

Each collection is the result of a creative workshop where design, technique, and sustainability converge to shape sophisticated, versatile surfaces with a bold tactile impact. Name: Nigam Industry
Description:
WHO WE ARE!
We are reliable and professional Manufacturer of Leather Working Gloves, Welding Gloves, Canadian Rigger Gloves, Assembly Gloves, Impact Gloves, Driver Gloves, Mechanics, PU Leather & Winter Gloves based in Sialkot-Pakistan since 2005. Our knowledge and expertise of 16 years with Highly Qualified and Experienced Supervision makes us trusted leader with in our industry. We have our own Tannery, Production and Packing Department together under on roof, which provides us competitive advantage in terms of maintaining Quality, Low (internal) Transportation costs and providing competitive prices with swift delivery solutions.

WHY US !
Our Products & Materials:
We are qualified to affix CE-Marking on our famous products and have more than 46 styles with CAT II certified as per latest EU Regulation 2016/425. We assure you that when you are buying a pair of gloves from our company then you are buying a carefully inspected and Un-Harmful products. Our raw Materials including leather are REACH compliance and we use to test each leather batch for Chome VI through International Accredited Laboratory.


Production Capacity:
With 325 Sewing Machines, 40 Hydraulic Click Cutting Presses, 1 Travel Head Press, more than 550 employees, 2 Silicone Unit, 1 Screen Printing Unit and Edge of having Own Tannery makes our capacity to produce 3.5 to 4 Million Pairs Annually. 

Customized Products:
We have our own Research & Development Department who is always keen in checking every latest invention in the field of gloves. We can also make customized products on your request or you can also send us your own design in order for us to send you free counter-samples. We can also place your logo on manufactured gloves.


"TRUST US"
If you are interested, send for the sample of our products for your kind consideration. We are just a call or a mail away from you.

Thanks & Best Regards,
NIGAM INDUSTRY

Name: L/Unica Manufactura
Description:
Nascida em 2024 com o compromisso de preservar e aprimorar o Savoir-Faire na marroquinaria de luxo, a L/Unica Manufactura é uma empresa integrante de um grupo internacional com forte tradição no setor. Juntem-se a nós nesta emocionante viagem da marroquinaria de luxo!

Our trailblazers established Amin International Ltd in 2003 in Unnao. For over 20 years, we have been a premium manufacturer and exporter of high-quality leather, non-leather, and hybrid products. With a strong legacy of craftsmanship and innovation, we take pride in offering a diverse range of products. 


We are a brand seeking relatability and superior craftsmanship. Our partners trust us for our excellence, innovation, and customer satisfaction.
At Amin International, we believe in constant evolution. We are embracing new technologies and setting industry benchmarks without interruption. Sustainability is at the heart of our operations. We engage in efforts to reduce our environmental footprint. We responsibly source our materials from LWG, GRS, and GOTS certified tanneries and companies. Our manufacturing process too aligns with the highest environmental and social responsibility standards.
We offer bags, accessories, and travel essentials designed to meet global market needs. We have tailored our business model for global sourcing. Over the years, we have forged strong partnerships with leading brands across Europe, the USA, and the UK. Our presence in the domestic market is prominent too.

OUR PRODUCTS:
Travel bags:- Duffel bags, Weekender bags, Trolley bags, Garments bags, game bags etc.

Business Bags:- Laptop Bags, File Bags, Portfolio Bags, Business Trolley Bags etc.

Utility Bags:- Body Bags, Wash Bags, Messenger Bags, Clutch Bags etc

Small Leather Goods:- Wallets, Card Cases, Coin Pouches, Passport cases,Folders etc.


"Join our team at Amin International Limited and be part of a dynamic, forward-thinking company that's shaping global success through innovation, integrity, and excellence."


 Visit us at: www.aminint.com

Follow our Instagram page-@amininternationallimited 
Follow our Facebook page- Amin International Limited

Name: Society of Leather Technologists and Chemists
Description: The Society of Leather Technologists and Chemists is a non-profit International Society serving the leather sector and dedicated to the future of the leather industry. In our changing world information is the key to success therefore the Society was formed to encourage interest in all branches of the leather industry and it covers both the theoretical and practical interests of not only those involved in making leather but also the hide and skin trades, machinery, chemical and dye and finish manufacturers as well as allied industries such as effluent treatment. The interests of the Society cover chemistry of course but also physics, management, microscopy, bacteriology and engineering.

Name: Faire De Lance
Description:
FDL favorise les rencontres entre marques et ateliers de production autour de projets créatifs orientés vers le monde et la mode de demain, pour assurer le dynamisme et la valorisation du made in France.

Ce dispositif a été initié en 2020 pour faire face à la difficulté accrue de réaliser prototypes, mini-séries et productions en France, et pour lutter contre la perte de nos savoir-faire.

La forte valeur ajoutée de FDL, c’est son rôle de conseil. Le dispositif met en effet en relation porteurs de projet et fabricants français, en ayant pris soin d’intégrer la spécificité de chaque projet et la spécificité de chaque industriel. Un gain de temps précieux et une garantie pour chaque partenaire.

Porté par CTC et soutenu par la Fédération Française de la Maroquinerie, la Fédération Française de la Chaussure, la Fédération Française de la Tannerie Mégisserie, le Conseil National du Cuir et ADC Au-Delà du Cuir, ce dispositif innovant souhaite participer à la relance du fabriqué en France pour les secteurs de la chaussure, maroquinerie, ganterie et accessoires de mode (gants, ceintures, etc.).

Name: Centre des Métiers du Cuir de Montréal
Description:
Le Centre des métiers du cuir de Montréal (CMCM) est un centre de formation et de services incontournable pour les artisans du cuir. Chaque année, une dizaine de formations, dont les cours de loisir offerts à tous les publics et les perfectionnements aux maîtres pour les artisan.e.s plus aguerri.e.s, ces derniers offerts en partenariat avec le Conseil des métiers d'art du Québec (CMAQ). Outre ses formations prisées, le Centre offre des services indispensables au travailleurs et travailleurs du cuir, tels la location d'espace d'atelier, l'utilisation de machinerie et l'achat de matériels et d'outils, entre autres.

Depuis sa fondation en 1994, le CMCM n'a cessé d'innover et de s'adapter aux divers besoins du marché. Sa plus récente réalisation est l'installation d'un laboratoire de découpe laser 2D-3D à la fine pointe de la technologie. Toujours à  l'avant-garde, le CMCM est également le seul au Canada à offrir une formation en chaussure et en maroquinerie. Fier des artisans et artisanes d'ici, le CMCM a innauguré sa propre salle d'exposition dans les années 2000.

Name: BAROK ARTISANAT DU MAROC
Description:
Barok est une marque de luxe marocaine lancée en 2020 avec un produit phare de l’Artisanat du Maroc : la babouche.

Valoriser l’Artisanat du Maroc en y apportant du design, de la rigueur et un très haut niveau de finition est notre mission.

Notre société emploie des Maîtres Artisans à plein temps avec un contrat de travail et une assurance maladie.  Ils ont tous été formés par nos soins pour apprendre la rigueur et le sens de la finition irréprochable. 

Depuis la création, nous avons fait de nombreux pas vers la valorisation de l’Artisanat du Maroc. Nous avons collaboré avec le designer international Hicham Lahlou sur une édition limitée Alflila qui respecte à la lettre le savoir ancestral de nos Maîtres Artisans de Fès et les finitions d’une grande marque de luxe. En plus d’être un succès commercial international, la babouche Alflila que nous avons créée a été exposée au Muséum On The Seam à Jérusalem comme une oeuvre d’art contemporain ayant eu un impact social positif durant le confinement. 

Nos collections de babouches sont vendues au coeur du quartier Soho à New York. Elles ont fait le tour du monde avec des artistes internationaux. La babouche Barok est très apprécié par des stylistes et des créateurs américains, allemands, indiens et bulgares et de nombreux influenceurs internationaux sont ravis de la porter lors d’évènements mode. 

Nous avons innové en créant la Balaine ; une babouche en laine avec de la peau de mouton tanné de façon végétale à l’intérieur de la babouche. 

Nous avons aussi lancé une collection Summer In Fez avec des couleurs acidulées et un intérieur en cuir d’agneau absorbant selon une méthode de tannage disparue.

Nos babouches se prêtent très bien à des cadeaux d'entreprise VIP.

Highly qualified personnel, cutting-edge technologies and close attention to details seamlessly combine to ensure the highest possible quality, leading to the creation of unique products. The continuous balance between technological innovations and artisanship puts the company at the forefront of leather goods production.

Frassineti is a long-time OTB supplier, crafting luxury leather goods for some of its brands, such as Jil Sander, and has recently become part of the Group through its Staff International subsidiary.

Name: THE CUT PRODUCTION
Description:
The Cut Production è un’azienda altamente specializzata nella produzione di borse e accessori in pelle per i più importanti marchi internazionali del lusso. 
Situata alle pendici del Monte Amiata, nella cittadina di Abbadia San Salvatore in provincia di Siena, tra silenzi e spazi aperti ed incontaminati, l’azienda riesce a dare vita negli anni ad una realtà che diventa punto di riferimento dell’area amiatina nel settore della pelletteria. 
Nata nel 1996, ha sapientemente alimentato le centenarie tradizioni del taglio e della lavorazione della pelle trinciata, tipiche dell’antico borgo medievale, con le più moderne tecnologie di produzione e commercializzazione. Oggi, con i suoi 250 dipendenti, rappresenta un’eccellenza del Made in Italy, riconosciuta in Italia e all’estero. I grandi marchi del lusso trovano in The Cut Production le risposte alle più elevate esigenze di produttività e dinamismo unite all’attenzione e alla cura nella realizzazione di prodotti di alta sartoria, dove la maestria e la tradizione artigianale si fondono con l’innovazione tecnologica.
Le diverse sezioni produttive dell’azienda sono dislocate su 8.000 mq nei quali è impiegato personale competente, motivato e profondamente specializzato. Tutto ciò consente di coniugare quantità e qualità, grandi volumi e ampie tipologie di prodotto. 
Le tecnologie di avanguardia di The Cut rispondono alle più diversificate esigenze dei top brand del fashion&luxury per la produzione di ogni tipo di prodotto in pelle di alta qualità: dalle borse agli indumenti, dai prodotti nautici alle cinture.
The Cut Production è il connubio fondamentale tra qualità Made in Italy, produzione hi-tech e antiche tradizioni produttive. Abbiamo imparato dai nostri successi ad adeguarci in maniera flessibile alle esigenze dei nostri clienti.  Flessibilità, responsabilità, professionalità, qualità i nostri valori

Name: Bagage France Luxe
Description:
L’histoire de la société Bagage France Luxe (BFL), dirigée par Eric Martin-Lalande, s’inscrit dans la longue durée et sur un territoire.

En 1986, Pascal Martin-Lalande, père d’Eric, reprend une entreprise basée à Fougères (35) et spécialisée dans l’habillement. Dix années plus tard, il recentre son activité sur le secteur du luxe en créant les ateliers FIM (France Inter Mode). Ces ateliers se composent aujourd’hui d’un ensemble de sites : 7 sites de production, 3 sites de conditionnement, 11 ateliers de fabrication (dont 2 labellisés « Entreprise du Patrimoine Vivant »), 5 bureaux d’études.

Créée en 2011 à Fougères par Eric Martin-Lalande et son épouse, Bagage France Luxe concentre exclusivement son activité sur la maroquinerie de luxe. Elle est à ce titre dépositaire et garante d’un ensemble de techniques propres, liées à la fois à l’industrie et à l’artisanat. L’entreprise met son savoir-faire au service de la production à la main de sacs en cuir, en toile et en tissu. Elle fabrique également des ceintures de luxe, pour femmes et hommes.

Aujourd’hui, BFL constitue un réseau d'ateliers présent sur 3 sites : Fougères, Liffré et Laval.

Ces ateliers aux valeurs familiales emploient plus de 600 personnes, artisans spécialisés dans la maroquinerie de luxe.

Name: Conceria Ausonia s.r.l
Description: Nei primi anni la produzione era principalmente di cuoio da suola e vacchetta. Erano gli anni dopo la guerra, si lavoravano i pellami manualmente con lunghi bagni nelle vasche, sia per la preparazione che per la concia. Per ottenere un buon materiale erano necessari da sei a otto mesi. Nel tempo sono stati introdotti nuovi macchinari e nuove soluzioni concianti, molto più raffinate. Tutto ciò ha contribuito a snellire il processo produttivo e oggi riusciamo a realizzare un buon prodotto in quattro o sei settimane. Cresce il giro di affari e di conseguenza anche lo stabilimento aumenta la sua capacità produttiva, oltre che la sua superficie, dotandosi di tecnologie sempre più avanzate. Oggi Ausonia, con oltre 18.000 m² di stabilimenti, è in grado di produrre fino a 70.000 m² di pelle al mese.

Name: ARC NEXT
Description:
Ultra-sustainable, ultra-strong, ultra-versatile. You won’t believe how durable this premium cactus leather is. Ranging from 0.4mm to 2.2mm in thickness, it’s perfect for crafting luxury handbags, wallets, footwear, car interiors, furniture, and more—combining style, strength, and sustainability in every piece, designed for a better future. 

We produce over 1.4 billion animal hides every year for leather, fueling deforestation, water pollution, and immense carbon emissions. While synthetic alternatives exist, most rely on plastic, making them far from sustainable. Arc Next Cactus Leather is changing the game—our plant-based, durable, and luxurious leather is crafted from resilient cacti, offering a premium alternative without harming animals or the planet. Strong yet flexible, ranging from 0.4mm to 2.2mm, it’s perfect for everything from handbags and wallets to footwear, car interiors, and furniture. Sustainability has never looked this good.

Every day, we help save around 100 cows from slaughter—that’s 28,800 lives spared every year. By choosing cactus leather, you’re not just making a fashion statement—you’re making a real difference for the planet, for the animals, and for a more sustainable future.

Name: Lappara
Description:
Lappara : Marque de maroquinerie d'excellence

Lappara, c'est la volonté de créer LA pièce d'apparat, le bijou compagnon d'une ou plusieurs vies.

Lappara, c'est faire le choix de l'Excellence : Par la qualité, le soin apporté au moindre détails et aux finitions : C'est l'exigence dans l'exécution de chaque geste.

Lappara, c'est l'Elégance : La pièce d'apparat par excellence, comme un bijou qui vient sublimer une tenue, un accessoire qui vient renforcer l'élégance de celui ou celle qui la porte.

Lappara, c'est aussi une touche d'audace : A travers l'associations de cuirs, de couleurs, pour une pièce unique et reconnaissable.

Lappara, c'est bien évidement une Expérience client unique : A travers l'approche sur mesure des pièces d'exceptions, à travers l'écoute et le suivi apporté à chaque client.

Lappara c'est une marque de maroquinerie d'excellence, où je développe et fabrique chaque pièce avec les techniques sellier : Parce que mon métier c'est Sellière-Maroquinière.

Les techniques sellier, le métier de sellière-maroquinière : C'est une passion, un savoir faire ancestral, ce sont des gestes parfaitement exécutés à la main pour créer l'excellence.
Chaque cuir est rigoureusement sélectionné, chaque pièce est le fruit d'un développement bien pensé, chaque point est minutieusement réalisé, chaque tranche est magnifiée, toutes les étapes sont soigneusement perfectionnées pour créer des pièces artisanales d'exceptions.

Pour en savoir plus sur la marque, les créations et les évènements n'hésitez pas à suivre l'atelier sur :

https://www.instagram.com/lappara.maroquinerie

Name: Jeengar
Description:
Our Mission:
Jeengar is more than a brand; it's a bridge to a 500-year-old legacy of craftsmanship. Our mission is to honor and elevate the master artisans of Rajasthan by creating timeless leather goods that tell a story of heritage, empowerment, and enduring quality.

Our Story:
Our name, Jeengar, is our origin. For centuries, our community was the ‘Jeen-Gar’—the saddle-makers for the royal families of Rajasthan. This legacy of crafting pieces of strength and beauty is the foundation upon which our brand is built. Today, we channel that same integrity and skill into creating modern heirlooms for a discerning global audience.

Our Partnership Model:

Il più grande valore della nostra azienda è il nostro personale, che opera da anni per un mercato di alto livello ed è fortemente specializzato per offrire un prodotto artigianale di altissima qualità. La peculiarità che contraddistingue tutti coloro che operano nella nostra realtà è certamente una versatilità e un’apertura mentale che li rende in grado di adoperarsi per una produzione fortemente diversificata. Cucito a mano, intreccio, intarsio, sono solo alcune delle tecniche nelle quali siamo maestri nel settore.
Insieme al Team interno altamente specializzato, Gaffe S.r.l. si avvale di una consolidata rete di partner esterni, in linea con i più rigorosi AUDIT.
Lavoriamo con competenza e passione per mantenere elevati standard di artigianato italiano e per offrire ai nostri clienti un prodotto di alta qualità .

Since 2021, we started our journey to explore the amazing parts of our Kingdom's culture. Our tour aimed to accurately document the most important aspects of the extinct cultures of handicrafts. The goal is for Basma to become a supportive and encouraging partner for every artisan and craftsman with passion and creativity. This involves understanding and feeling the simplest and deepest stories behind his crafts, which represent his own region. The objective is to create products with exceptional designs and creative ideas, thereby ensuring our heritage becomes an imprint in our lives.
In Basma, all of our products pass through many stages to meet high-quality standards. The aim is to become a Saudi brand that competes locally and internationally, offering unique products from our culture and the land of our Kingdom.

We are a Socially Compliant Company under SEDEX (SMETA) Certification and BSCI (under renewal) Code of Conduct. We condemn all forms of child labour in our organisation.

Name: Diamond 8 Leather Co
Description:
Diamond 8 Leather was born from discipline, craftsmanship, and the drive to create. After more than two decades of military service, our founder, Randall Copiskey, sought a new mission — one rooted in purpose, pride, and the American spirit. What began as a one-man workshop has grown into a movement dedicated to quality, community, and legacy. 

We believe craftsmanship is an act of service — a promise that what we make by hand will outlast us. Each Diamond 8 piece carries a story of grit, precision, and integrity. From custom collaborations to production gear, every detail reflects the pride of shooters, makers, and everyday Americans who earn what they carry. 

Based in Crivitz, Wisconsin, Diamond 8 Leather is building a generational company committed to supporting families, empowering youth trapshooters, and preserving the heritage of American manufacturing. Our mission is simple: Honor the craft. Serve the community. Build for the next generation. 

This is more than leather. It’s legacy — built by hand, fueled by grit, and made in America.

Name: Comal Handicraft Leather Bag
Description: Comal Handicraft Leather Bag was established in 2007 in beawar, Rajasthan. The company was established under ‘Mr. Chetan Lal Chouhan, the patronage of his father “Shri Maniram Ji Chouhan„ The company is renowned for manufacturing, supplying, and exporting all handcrafted products like Handmade Leather Bags, Leather Diaries, and So many other Leather Goods Leather Aprons, etc. His father started his career as a leather work Artisan in 1973. He was trained at The National Institute of Design and Central Leather Research Institute of India. He formed The Jawaja Leather Association along with Professor Ravi Ji Mathai. He was honored by The prime minister of India for making the best leather goods in 1977. Mr.Chetan Lal Chouhan. modestly starting his carrier in 1993 as a Leather Work Artisan, Mr. Chetan Lal Chouhan, launched his own company in 2007 and up to 2011, his business remained limited only to the domestic market. But Mr.Deepak Chouhan thought of taking forward his traditional family business. Because we have 50+ years of combined experience in this business. As an aspiring Entrepreneur, with a dream to grow further, he decided to enter the Export market with the help of his strong and determined family team. under the leadership of the company’s Founder, “Ms. Chetan Lal Chouhan„ and CEO “Ms. Deepak Chouhan„ The company has been able to achieve tremendous success in this domain. His in-depth business knowledge, brilliant managerial skills, and zeal for achieving organizational targets on time have helped the company stand ahead of our industry counterparts. It is only due to the strong will to excel, dedication, conviction, and tireless efforts of the team that the company is exporting goods to a lot of countries. all types of products are made by hand here. And the leather used in our products is made using the Vegetable Tanning Leather Process. And because of this, today this company is included in the famous company making leather goods in India.

Name: THE COBBLEROAD
Description:
Hi there! We are THE COBBLEROAD, a team of professionals that has been making leather products since 2014. Our goal is to do quality things. Our mission is to inspire you every day. All our products are handmade with a passion for craftsmanship. We love minimalism. We believe in pure form esthetics and functionality without excess. Each of our products embodies our vision. We never specify how, when, or by whom our accessories are to be worn. We simply create them for people who share our values and our visual, tactile, and emotional perception.

BRAIN CHILD
THE COBBLEROAD is the brainchild of Mr. Satya Salil Pattnaik ( Founder and Director) – with his aspirations of venturing into business and his rebellious nature to do something different, it wasn’t a big surprise to most people who know them specially his parents.


WHO ARE THE PEOPLE BEHIND THE COBBLEROAD?

After completing 4 years of engineering in Electrical and Electronics and attaining 2 years of work experience in an electrical meter manufacturing company, Mr.Satya Salil Pattnaik took the road less travelled – all he had was his experience in identifying great designs, his communication skills and a deep passion towards sales. A self-taught marketer, he emphasizes that everyone spend at least an hour daily learning something new and leads example.

The biggest support to this company when it was a startup in year 2014 was provided by Mr. Ashar Imam who is a medical Doctor in JAMIA HAMDARD UNIVERSITY involved in teaching Anatomy with special interest in Preclinical Human Anatomy and Hospital management. He is a published author and speaker with a range of experience in teaching and hospital administration. He was one of the initial investor who believed in this firm and decided to give his ideas and help the company grow in different ways.

Name: Marghepell srls
Description:
Marghepell è un’azienda situata a Santa Croce Sull’Arno (PI) specializzata nella lavorazione di pelli al vegetale da pelletteria e arredamento.
La nostra produzione si basa su pelli provenienti dalle migliori zone dell’Europa.
Vengono utilizzate vacche per le pelli più leggere e tori per quelle più pesanti.
Questi bovini sono destinati all’industria alimentare, perciò, nessun animale viene abbattuto direttamente per la concia delle sue pelli. 
La nostra lavorazione è al 100% conciata al vegetale, un processo basato sull’utilizzo di Tannini naturali provenienti dagli alberi quali Mimosa, Castagno e Quebracho. 
La “concia al vegetale “è la più tradizionale e riconoscibile; l’unica capace di impartire al cuoio proprietà inconfondibili, versatilità d’impiego e unicità del prodotto.
La pelle conciata al vegetale non contiene sostanze tossiche e nocive. Il ciclo produttivo viene, inoltre, curato in ogni dettaglio per ridurre al minimo l’impatto ambientale.
I nostri clienti producono borse, portafogli, valige, cinture, accessori per animali ed oggetti di arredamento.
Forti dell’esperienza tramandata di generazione in generazione da più di 80 anni, creiamo prodotti di qualità grazie alla nostra profonda conoscenza delle materie prime, dei processi produttivi e del mercato di riferimento.
Ricerca, sviluppo e sperimentazione sono alla base della nostra realtà conciaria, cercando di soddisfare sempre le esigenze del cliente.

Description:
Started Back in 2020 At Unique Leather Bags, we are passionate about creating high-quality, handcrafted leather bags that are timeless and unmatched in craftsmanship. Our bags are designed for both men and women and are perfect for travel, work, or everyday use.

Our bags are made with love, and we take pride in every stitch and detail. We use only the highest quality leather to ensure that our bags are durable, long-lasting, and beautiful. Our bags are available in a variety of styles, including backpacks, totes, messenger bags, and duffel bags.

We believe that every bag should be unique, which is why we offer personalized leather bags that are one-of-a-kind. Our bags make great corporate gifts, and we can customize them to meet your specific needs.

At Unique Leather Bags, we are committed to providing our customers with the best possible experience. We believe in slow fashion and take the time to create bags that are not only beautiful but also sustainable. We are a brand driven by women, and we are committed to the principles of ethical production and sustainability.

Our bags are handcrafted in our shop, and we take great care to ensure that every bag is made to the highest standards. We use full-grain leather, which is the highest grade of leather available. This leather is never sanded down or processed, so it retains all of its natural strength and beauty. Over time, our bags develop their own patina, becoming softer and more beautiful the longer you carry them.

At Unique Leather Bags, we are always looking for new ways to innovate and create bags that are both functional and stylish. We are proud of our collection of handcrafted leather bags and wallets, and we are excited to share them with you.

Name: PAC EXPORT
Description:
La société PAC EXPORT est une société familiale, dont notre tant Madame CAUNAC est à l'origine, où l'activité principale était le travail du cuir, avec des créations des sacs et de ceintures pour les marques de haut de gamme.
En 1966, née LA CREATION GUY CAUNAC, qui jusqu'en 1981, fabriquera pour sa propre marque des articles en cuir.
En 1981, l'atelier devient FLORELLE, et désormais sous-traite pour les grandes marques, comme BALMAIN, ROCHAS, DIOR, CHANEL… l'activité se déploie tant, que 49 salariés travaillent dans cet atelier sur le commune de Gensac.
En 1999, le marché évoluant et la fabrication des grandes marques se faisant désormais en Asie, FLORELLE devient sous-traitant pour la marque MEDIPACK, et abandonne le travaille du cuir pour la bâche de l'armée.
En 2010, PAC EXPORT reprend la gamme de sacs de premiers secours en bâche en vente directe et développe depuis 2020 une gamme essentiellement sur-mesure.

Name: MODEL EXIMS (INDIA) PRIVATE LIMITED
Description:
Recognized since 1982 | Crafting Excellence in Leather

Model Exims carries forward a proud legacy that began in 1982 with the vision of our founder, Late Haji Mehboob Alam. What started as a modest production unit for vegetable-tanned belt and sole leather has evolved into a leading manufacturer and exporter of premium finished leather and leather goods.

By 1986, we had pioneered chrome tanning — a vital step that allowed us to expand into safety footwear and upholstery leather on buffalo hides. Over the decades, continuous innovation and a steadfast commitment to quality have defined our journey.

In 2011, Model Group was restructured, and Model Exims — under the leadership of Mr. Mahmood Alam and Mr. Badre Alam — emerged as a leading-edge leather manufacturing and export company. Today, we proudly supply finished upholstery leather, shoe and belt leather, bag and automotive leather, as well as safety shoes, safety uppers, safety garments, belts, bags and pet products to partners across the globe.

Our Commitment

At Model Exims, our aim is simple yet profound — to deliver quality leather and complete customer satisfaction. 

To achieve this, we invest in innovation through a dedicated in-house laboratory focused on research and development, ensuring our products exceed global standards for quality, performance, and durability.

Our modern tannery is equipped with state-of-the-art machinery for consistent quality control and continuous process improvement. We believe that trust and timely delivery are the foundations of lasting relationships — and we take pride in honoring every commitment.

Sustainability & Responsibility

We believe in growth that respects the environment. Our operations integrate advanced pollution control and water treatment measures, with effluents further processed at a Common Effluent Treatment Plant (CETP), reflecting our dedication to sustainability.

Model Exims — Crafting world-class leather for a better tomorrow.

Kallfeldts Läderfabrik är en pålitlig underleverantör med gott renommé i den svenska läderbranschen. Företaget grundades 1989 av Göran och Birgitta Kallfeldt i Nissafors. Sedan drygt sex år tillbaka drivs företaget av nuvarande ägare Rickard, Johan, och Hillevi som förvaltar, förädlar och förfinar. 

"Med naturen i ryggraden och hantverket vid knogarna bär vi ett 30-årigt arv in i framtiden. Tryggt grundade i småländsk jord sedan 1989.
Händerna och hjärtat är fortfarande våra viktigaste verktyg – vi stansar, präglar, limmar, syr, tänker, känner och bryr oss. Och vi är lika noggranna oavsett om vi jobbar stor- eller småskaligt"
