Name: Calico Trends
Description:
Introducing Calico Leather: Where Sustainability Meets Excellence 

At Calico Leather, we are dedicated to producing premium quality leather that not only meets the highest standards of craftsmanship but also champions sustainability and ethical practices. As a by-product of the meat industry, our leather is a testament to our commitment to resourcefulness and environmental responsibility. 

Here’s why Calico Leather stands out:

 Sustainable Sourcing: Our leather is derived from hides that are by-products of the meat industry, ensuring that valuable materials are not wasted but repurposed into beautiful, durable products.

 Eco-Friendly Production: We prioritize environmentally friendly manufacturing processes, minimizing our carbon footprint and promoting a greener future.

 Uncompromising Quality: Each piece of leather undergoes rigorous quality control to ensure it meets our stringent standards, delivering unmatched durability, suppleness, and rich texture.

 Collaborative Partnerships: We work closely with top furniture makers and designers to provide customized leather solutions that elevate their creations and resonate with their customers.

 Innovation and Style: Our wide range of finishes, colors, and textures allows for unique and personalized designs, setting new trends in the leather industry.

Calico Leather offers a diverse range of leather products for various applications:

 Automotive Leather: Durable and luxurious leather tailored for car interiors, combining style with performance.

 Shoe Leather: Supple and resilient leather designed for high-quality footwear, ensuring comfort and longevity.

 Belt Leather: Sturdy and flexible leather perfect for belts, offering both durability and a premium look.

 Safety Leather: Robust and reliable leather suitable for protective gear, providing essential safety features.
 Upholstery Leather: Soft and elegant leather ideal for furniture and home décor, adding a touch of sophisticat

Name: Prestige Tannery Limited
Description:
Welcome to Prestige Tannery, a family-owned business proudly crafting premium leather products for over 40 years. Nestled in the heart of Punjab, Pakistan. Our legacy is built on a foundation of exceptional craftsmanship, dedication, and passion for leather.

Our Heritage
For four decades, our family has been at the forefront of the leather industry, transforming raw materials into exquisite pieces of art. Our journey began with a simple vision: to create leather products that embody quality, durability, and timeless elegance. Today, we continue to honour this tradition, combining honoured techniques with modern innovations to deliver unparalleled products to our discerning customers.

Our Products
Polo Boots and Gear
We specialise in crafting top-of-the-line polo boots and gear, designed to meet the rigorous demands of the sport. Our polo products, including boots, saddles, and gloves, are meticulously handcrafted from the finest leather. Each piece is tailored to provide maximum comfort, support, and performance, ensuring that you can focus on your game with confidence.

Leather Jackets
Our collection of leather jackets is the epitome of style and sophistication. From classic designs to contemporary biker jackets, we offer a wide range of options to suit every taste. Each jacket is made from premium leather, expertly crafted to offer the perfect blend of comfort, durability, and elegance. Whether you are a fashion enthusiast or a motorcycle aficionado, our jackets are designed to make a statement.

Craftsmanship and Quality
At Prestige Tannery, we take immense pride in our craftsmanship. Every product is fully handmade by skilled artisans who pour their expertise and passion into each piece. We use only the highest quality leather, carefully selected for its superior texture, strength, and aesthetic appeal. Our commitment to excellence ensures that every item we produce not only meets but exceeds the expectations of our customers.

Name: Pelletteria DREAMPELL Srl
Description:
Un’azienda di pelletteria Made in Italy che guarda al futuro, capace di anticipare le evoluzioni del mercato rispondendo alle esigenze delle griffe, nazionali ed internazionali, che ricercano la fornitura totale concentrata in un solo interlocutore.

Il valore dell’artigianalità e della formazione

Quando si parla del Made in Italy nel mondo si pensa immediatamente alla moda e alla pelletteria di lusso, che si fondano, indiscutibilmente, sulla storica e sull’identità delle maestranze presenti nel nostro paese.
Dreampell si fonda proprio su questi capi saldi: capacità e tradizione ben radicata.
Produrre un pezzo di pelletteria Made in Italy significa mettere in campo la storia dell’artigianalità italiana, di Firenze e di quei conciatori che nel 1500 portarono in toscana la maestria e la conoscenza di un sapere da tramandare di generazione in generazione.

Il Valore del Made in Italy
|
Il Valore dell’Artigianato Fiorentino

Il Made in Italy è ancora uno dei marchi più potenti al mondo ed in molti si chiedono: com’è possibile? Semplicemente perché la qualità del prodotto finito è l’unione delle maestranze artigianali che seguono attentamente una filiera di alto valore, frutto di ricerca, innovazione e formazione continua del personale che è rintracciabile, nella sua totalità, solo in Italia.

Description:
Founded in 1988 in Arzignano, in the province of Vicenza ( Italy), Marchetto Pellami (from September 2024 a brand of AVA Leather Group) is today a point of reference in the field of tanning, producing and selling top quality leathers around the globe. Marchetto Pellami serves high-quality leathers to sofa manufacturers and the footware industry.

Our leather is:
- Fit For Use: leather is only one of the components used for the manufacture of the finished product sold in shops. It is part of a wider design, but also envisages the features each material must have for proper manufacture of the finished product.
- Good look: the experience of our technicians is of fundamental importance to obtain a finished product conforming to the customer’s requirements, also as regards looks. 
- Sustainable materials: by adopting stringent policies of business conduct and environmental sustainability, we can guarantee our customers and their customers that the products have been manufactured in an environment where there has been no exploitation of people, no impoverishment of the environment or unethical work practices.
- Good workmanship: the skill of our technicians and operators is of fundamental importance for the success of the product: starting with the choice of the material in wet blue, through the dyeing and finishing, to selection of the finished product. 
- Safe to use: free from harmful chemicals, non allergenic, low emission: the chemical products used by Marchetto Pellami throughout the production chain are guaranteed by expert and reliable suppliers.

Our portfolio extends beyond just supplies; we specialize in the creation of handcrafted leather accessories and wallets, each piece a testament to the art of leather craftsmanship. Located in India, we are committed to supporting the leather crafting community with not only the finest materials but also with personalized products that meet the diverse needs of our customers.

Whether you're a seasoned artisan or a leather crafting enthusiast, Sneaky Leather Supply Co is dedicated to providing you with the highest quality Seiwa Tokonole, Seiwa Ace Bond Leather Glue, John James Saddlers Harness Needles, and Julius Koch Tiger Ritza 25 Thread, alongside our bespoke leather accessories and care items.

Embrace the beauty of customization with our tailored services. Let Sneaky Leather Supply Co be your partner in crafting excellence, as we embark on a journey of creativity and quality together.

Description: Gidue Pellami nasce in provincia di Vicenza nel 1987 dall’intraprendenza di Giacomo Agosti, che valorizza il settore della finitura delle pelli con ricerca e innovazione. L'azienda è specializzata nella nobilitazione delle pelli conto terzi. È attorno a questa particolare lavorazione che l’azienda ha costruito la sua intera filosofia produttiva, fatta di macchinari innovativi e originali, unici nel suo genere, e persone altamente qualificate. Il metodo unisce le tecniche di lavorazione del Bycast all’utilizzo di speciali macchinari di rifinizione, per dare vita a un processo innovativo che nobilita le scelte meno pregiate delle bovine in fiore e che lascia inalterate morbidezza e naturalezza della pelle.

No client is too big – or too small! As we take great pride in our work and believe in building lasting relationships and cooperation’s with our clients.

Name: Daag
Description:
GWARANCJA WYSOKIEJ JAKOŚCI

Pokochasz dotyk naszych produktów. Skóry używane przez nas do produkcji toreb pochodzą od wyselekcjonowanych i sprawdzonych dostawców z Polski, Włoch i Niemiec, nie zawierają szkodliwych substancji, są starannie sortowane, a ich jakość jest szczegółowo sprawdzana na każdym etapie realizacji.

HANDMADE IN LUBLIN

Szyjemy od 29 lat w Lublinie. Ponad ćwierć wieku naznaczone doświadczeniem. Jak nadać produktom piękną i unikalną formę zachowując przy tym ich naturalny zapach i niepowtarzalną w dotyku strukturę? – To codzienne wyzwanie nadające sens naszej pracy. Finezyjny wzór, wyrafinowana skóra, mistrzowskie dłonie i doskonałość jedynego w swoim rodzaju szwu, który łączy życie i fascynacje naszych klientów.

UCZCIWOŚĆ NA PIERWSZYM MIEJSCU

Jesteśmy producentem produktów skórzanych oferujemy je bezpośrednio na naszej stronie. Daje nam to możliwość pominięcia tradycyjnej marży detalicznej i oferowania wyrobów w bardzo atrakcyjnych cenach.

Nitmoi loves to create clean, clear, functional products for everyday use. Our ideology stems from a desire to provide personal items that have a unique feel and character. We enjoy combining classic aesthetics with durability and are not afraid to go back to the bare essentials.

Nitmoi is owned and run by Johannes van Veen. Through the brand Nitmoi, Johannes expresses his minimalist design philosophy and love for sustainable materials. All the products are designed and handmade by himself in his studio in Utrecht, the Netherlands.

Sustainability is at the core of Nitmoi, by creating durable designs and use of sustainable and high-quality materials. Creating products with a timeless quality that are built to last.  A sustainable answer to the fast fashion industry.

Name: SSS
Description:
Our company specializes in the sale of leather for the footwear, leather goods, and decoration sectors. With extensive experience in the sector and more than 45 years in business, we have become a benchmark for our vast product portfolio and flexibility in responding to our customers' needs.
We offer natural cowhide, goatskin, and sheepskin leather, vegetable-tanned or chrome-tanned, as well as sustainable and innovative alternatives, such as non-animal (bio-vegan) and recycled leather products. This diversity allows us to closely follow international fashion trends, ensuring solutions that combine quality, innovation, and environmental responsibility.
We are recognized as a true “leather supermarket”: we offer a wide variety of items in stock, allowing customers to choose exactly what they are looking for. For added convenience, our minimum order is just one piece of leather, ensuring speed and flexibility throughout the process.
Our strategy is to combine variety, sustainability, and competitiveness. We work with different market segments, from luxury brands to small businesses and independent designers, always adapting to the requirements of each customer.

With a vision focused on the future, we continue to invest in sustainable solutions and strengthen our international presence. We are prepared to be the trusted partner of companies seeking quality, diversity, and innovation in the supply of leather.
We look forward to seeing you.

Name: Mipel Lab
Description:
Important supply chain project designed to promote the excellence of Made in Italy production in the leather goods sector worldwide.

MIPEL Lab is an innovative and revolutionary physical and digital platform  designed to introduce brands from all over the world to top Italian manufacturers.

An exclusive club, the meeting point between supply and demand for Italian leather goods production: luxury brands, designers and private labels can search for the Italian leather goods producers that best meet their needs all in a single place. The latter can, in turn, count on a simple and effective tool to position themselves on the market and highlight their production capabilities.

MIPEL Lab has two souls:
- A new exhibition organized in partnership with Lineapelle and held twive a year (February and September) at FieraMilano-Rho.
- A cutting-edge digital matchmaking platform developed live all year long.

Name: Biaggio Exports LLP

Description: Our product range includes Wet Blue, Wet White and Metal Free leathers as well as an innovative “Let’s Design Together” (“LDT”) concept where you participate in designing process and decide sophistications of your order as a customer. Regardless of quantity and location, all goods of ours are collected and sorted with care and processed elaborately in order to satisfy the requirements of the international manufacturers of leather products as well as our customer expectations. With our experienced team and trustworthy brand, we take the full responsibility for ensuring the promised quality to the greatest extent.

Name: Francesco Lionetti
Description:
FRANCESCO LIONETTI is a high crafsmanship company founded in Firenze in 1922. 
We produce leather and wood interior accessories for luxury hotels and restaurants, villas, museums and yachts and fashion accessories for women and men providing the full control of the entire manufacturing process from designer and raw materials processed in our in our own tannery to absolute tailor-made craft work.

Name: LeatheRE
Description:
Leathere is a startup working on developing vegan leather made of mango waste from Colombia, while at the same time providing job opportunities for Colombian citizens.

Our purpose is to solve two of the world's biggest problems - Unemployment and Food waste.

Our products are made of 90% mango waste and 10% biomaterials, this includes eco-friendly textiles that give strength and durability to our products.

Name: BALYS
Description:
A privately-owned Tunisian company founded in 2022, Balys specializes in creating, developing, manufacturing, and distributing luxury leather products. Offering a broad range of high-end creations, including Leather Goods and Fashion Accessories for women, men, and even pets, Balys is dedicated to ultimate luxury and the highest level of craftsmanship.

Our slogan, "WE'RE ALL UNIQUE" reflects our commitment to providing a personalized experience, ensuring that each piece tells a story as unique as its owner.

Name: Santosh Pargal & Co.
Description:
Santosh Pargal & Co. is an LWG-certified tannery located in Sonipat, Haryana, India that has been in operation for 35 years. We are committed to promoting sustainability and ethical practices in the leather industry and have implemented various measures to minimize our environmental impact.

As a Sedex-audited tannery, Santosh Pargal & Co. follows strict ethical and social compliance requirements, including labor standards, health and safety practices, and supply chain management. We utilize RO and ultrafiltration systems to treat wastewater and reduce water consumption in their tanning process.

Santosh Pargal & Co. is engaged in the manufacturing and export of finished leather and leather goods, including footwear, bags, belts, and other accessories. We are dedicated to using sustainable practices throughout our production processes and are committed to being responsible members of the leather industry.

Name: THE LONDON LEATHER WORKSHOP
Description:
The London Leather Workshop was founded in 2012 by Italian designers and makers Sara Battiston and Melissa Bruscoli.

With 20 years of experience in the fashion and accessories industry, we offer services for accessory designers and accompany them from design consultancy to product development and prototyping to material sourcing and manufacturing.
We work with UK based and international customers, from start-ups to established brands.

THE TEAM: We are a small, highly specialised and passionate team with extensive experience in the designing, prototyping and manufacturing of fashion accessories.
Our highly skilled collaborators (machinists, pattern cutters, artisans, and prototype makers) help us deliver each project to the highest standards and punctuality.

SKILL SHARING: We share our expertise, knowledge and skills with amateur leatherworkers, as well as professionals looking to improve their skill set. We collaborate with prestigious UK universities and are proud to partner with The Prince’s Trust Enterprise Programme, supporting young entrepreneurs at the early stages of their business.

OUR PHILOSOPHY: We believe in providing personal, transparent and uncompromising quality of service. Our small team works in realistic human timeframes and pays all employees and collaborators fair wages. We take great pride in our craftsmanship, based on attention to detail, using traditional and innovative methods combined with problem-solving and can-doing approaches.
We always build close and personal working relationships with our clients and are always happy to go the extra mile to help them with their projects.
We are passionate about supporting the growth of sustainable and eco-conscious businesses that share our ethos: appreciation of artisanship and respect for the environment.

Contacts: info@thelondonleatherworkshop.com

Shortlisted for the Best of Royal Greenwich Awards 2021
Mentor for The Prince’s Trust Enterprise Programme
Member of Heritage Craft

Name: Yiz Leather - Tannery
Description:
Yiz Leather was founded in 1905 by Hekimoğlu Mehmet Efendi in the Gerede district of Bolu, Turkey.
Since its establishment, the company has been operated by five generations, successively led by İsmail Gür, Mehmet Gür, Zeki Gür, Yunus Nadi Gür, and Mehmet Zeki Gür, and continues to this day.
Since its inception, Yiz Leather has focused on research and development (R&D) and innovation, introducing revolutionary advancements in the leather industry, and has become a leader in its field.
R&D MILESTONES
1993
The world’s first washable leather was developed by our company after more than 9,000 research and development tests.
2011
In collaboration with German chemical giant BASF, we successfully introduced the use of reactive dyes on leather, resulting in the production of the first reactive-dyed leather.
2016
Using specially formulated chemicals developed in-house, we have applied a "botox system"to correct imperfections on leather surfaces, improving their appearance and texture.
2017
While many manufacturers today mask the presence of the carcinogenic compound CR6 using various chemicals, our R&D efforts have identified the root cause of CR6 formation and eliminated it from our production process—ensuring leather that is completely free from carcinogens.
2018
We identified and eliminated the primary cause of visible veining in leather through our research.
CURRENT STATE
Yiz Deri operates across three facilities in Gerede, Bolu — 9,000m² + 9,000 m² + 4,000 m²—totaling 22,000 square meters of production space. As of 2025, Yiz Leather employs over 150 staff members across all operations. Our factory, specially designed by Swiss and German engineers, has reduced manual labor in the tanning process by 90% through advanced automation systems.
All our leather is produced in accordance with the Reach standards, without harming the ecological balance.

Name: Nabore GmbH
Description:
NABORE is an innovative upcycling company that specializes in transforming discarded materials into sustainable, durable, high-end materials. We believe in reducing waste and promoting sustainable living through our creative solutions. From automotive to furniture or fashion, in our first patented NABORE product line our team brings new life to your leather waste and transforms it into new high-performing materials. Join us in our mission to create a more sustainable future, and check out our products at NABORE.com.
Are you looking for sustainable and eco-friendly solutions for your leather waste? Our products are customized for you, offer superior strength and durability while minimizing environmental impact with 1,29 kg CO2e/m². With this value, NABORE outperforms all previous leather substitutes, contributes to a CO2e optimized end product and can be reintroduced into the production process after the "end-of-life".  Join the growing number of well-known luxury brands who are already using NABORE for high-quality accessories and the first car manufacturers who are planning to use it in serial production. 
NABORE was founded in 2021 in Bopfingen, Germany. We align high-performance products with sustainability, “Made in Germany” reliability and high delivery capability.

#zerowaste #upcycling, #recycling #nabore #naturalbondedresources, #leather #circularity #circulareconomy #sustainability

Yet our true strength lies in our people. Our team brings together master artisans and young talents in an inclusive, dynamic environment, where knowledge-sharing, professional growth, and the appreciation of diversity are key values.

Through this balance of tradition and innovation, expertise and freshness, precision and creativity, 2ME LAB continues to grow as a trusted partner for the luxury industry, delivering not only products but true expressions of quality, design, and innovation.

Name: Robelko
Description:
Robelko is an independent, global materials and sourcing business operating at the intersection of luxury brands, tanneries and specialist manufacturers.  We combine deep market knowledge, technical expertise and commercial judgement to support brands and suppliers navigating an increasingly complex luxury materials landscape.

Established over 40 years ago, Robelko represents a curated network of leather tanneries, material manufacturers and finished-goods producers supplying the luxury and premium fashion sector across handbags, footwear, belts and accessories.  Our supplier base spans Europe, the Americas, Asia and Africa, while our brand clients are primarily based in the UK, Europe and the US, with manufacturing taking place globally.

Robelko's role goes beyond traditional brokerage.  We act as a trusted intermediary between brands and suppliers, guiding material selection, development, pricing, risk management and delivery across both development and bulk production.  Our work includes seasonal material research, bespoke article and finish development, quality assurance, production troubleshooting, and sustainability and traceability guidance, including certification stands such as Leather Working Group.

In addition to sourcing and representation, Robelko supports brands with advisory input on supplier strategy, production optimisation and market entry in to leather and leather goods.  The business also operates an independent leather inspection service, providing quality assurance and risk mitigation for luxury brands prior to involving and global manufacture / distribution.

Name: Madison Stitch
Description: Madison Stitch was founded by John Pryor out of the Madison Flitch furniture studio during the COVID-19 crisis in Spring 2020. Looking for a way to stay afloat during the pandemic, John started making and selling face masks. Expecting to sell only a few dozen per week, John made and sold over 15,000 masks over 8 weeks. To meet demand, John connected with stitchers across the city, including refugee communities from Myanmar and Afghanistan who understood how to make things by hand with quality workmanship. Now selling bags and other hand-stitched products, Madison Stitch platforms the original designs and craft of the stitchers who rose from the margins to provide critical supplies to local hospitals during the pandemic.

Name: Nuova Icos Srl
Description:
Nuova ICOS nasce nel 1970 dall’amore per l’arte della concia dei fratelli Vincenzo e Noè Famiglietti, nel cuore del distretto conciario della Città di Solofra.

Nel 1990 l’azienda si trasferisce nel nuovo stabilimento solofrano in località Carpisano che, con forti investimenti in materia di tecnologia conciaria, permette l’ampliamento dell’offerta dell’azienda sino a proporre una grande quantità di articoli per i settori della calzatura, della pelletteria e dell’abbigliamento.

Nel 2000 l’ingresso nel management di Bernie ed Eugenio Famiglietti avvia un upgrade della filosofia aziendale che pone l’etica alla base di ogni scelta aziendale. Ed è in questa gestione aziendale virtuosa che si inserisce il rating di legalità, attribuito a Nuova ICOS, dall’Autorità Garante della Concorrenza e del Mercato, AGCM. Un riconoscimento che attesta il rispetto di elevati standard di legalità ed, in generale, l’attenzione riposta nella corretta gestione aziendale.

Nuova ICOS è, oggi, costantemente impegnata in progetti atti ad implementare sistemi e tecniche conciarie volte all’ottimizzazione dei processi produttivi ed organizzativi in grado di assicurare una crescita economica che salvaguardi l’ambiente e il benessere di coloro che ci vivono.

Questo processo evolutivo è alla base di una realtà industriale dalla forte vocazione artigianale capace di collocarsi, in sinergia con i maggiori stilisti e manifatturieri italiani, in una posizione di rilievo nella filiera del fashion system italiano ed internazionale.

Name: MARAI
Description:
Wir sind ein Traditionsbetrieb aus dem Emmental in der Schweiz. Seit vielen Jahrzehnten produzieren wir Felle und Leder aus hochwertigem Schweizer Rohmaterial. Dabei kommen nur natürliche Gerbstoffe zum Einsatz. 
Für die Herstellung unserer Leder verwenden wir ausschliesslich Felle, die als Abfallprodukt der Schweizer Milch- und Fleischproduktion übrigbleiben und in der Regel entsorgt werden. Wir sammeln die Felle bei regionalen Metzgereien ein, konservieren und lagern sie im Emmental und lassen in zwei Partnerbetrieben in Süddeutschland und in Portugal wunderbares Leder für die unterschiedlichsten Anwendungen herstellen. Die Felle lidern wir im Emmental.

Aus dem Ziegenleder kreieren wir elegante, hochwertige Taschen, Accessoires und Bekleidung. Die Schweizer Schaffelle verkaufen wir als Dekorationsartikel, und verarbeiten sie auch zu Wohn- und Modeaccessoires.

Wir verkaufen das Leder auch anderen Unternehmen, Brands, Designer:innen und Handwerker:innen, die daraus ihre eigenen Produktionen herstellen.

Ahoy there, sea travelers and adventurers of the land! At Pirate Goods, we understand the allure of the high seas and the tales of yore. Rooted in the vibrant heart of Kyiv, Ukraine, our brand brings the spirit of pirate adventures into every meticulously handcrafted leather piece we create.

Our journey began not with a compass, but with a passion for quality, design, and timeless charm. Every item in our collection carries a tale of craftsmanship, evoking memories of adventurous voyages and treasured moments. Whether you're a swashbuckler in the concrete jungle or an explorer of the vast oceans, our leather goods are crafted to be your loyal companion.

Our promise? Premium quality and intricate detailing, befitting the most discerning of pirates. Our handcrafted leather goods are more than just accessories; they're artifacts, each bearing the mark of a craftsman who has poured heart, soul, and a sprinkle of pirate magic into its creation.

But our adventures aren't bound by Kyiv's city walls. With sails set for global horizons, we proudly ship our treasures to fellow pirates around the world. Because every sea legend, every whispered tale in a tavern, binds us together in our shared love for the pirate life.

Join us as we chart the course for new horizons. Dive into a world where leather meets lore, craftsmanship marries adventure, and every product tells a tale. From pirate to pirate, we welcome you aboard the Pirate Goods ship. Let the adventures begin!

Name: El Veenu
Description:
El Veenu did not begin as a brand idea.
It began as work.

For decades, our family has been involved in leather manufacturing and exports from Rajasthan, supplying handcrafted leather goods to global buyers. Alongside this, we have run a factory outlet in Jaisalmer, where leather products are made, handled, sold, repaired, and discussed every day. This proximity to both craft and customer has shaped everything we do.

El Veenu is our direct-to-consumer expression of that legacy.

The same artisans, materials, and methods that have defined our export and retail work now come together under one name. Our products are crafted using genuine vegetable-tanned leather, cut and stitched by hand, and finished in a way that allows the leather to age naturally over time.

We design with practicality in mind. Years on the shop floor have taught us what customers return for, what lasts, and what quietly becomes part of everyday life. Our bags are not made to follow seasons or trends, but to be used, worn in, and carried across years.

Rooted in Jaisalmer and shaped by generations of leather craftsmanship, El Veenu is built on experience, not experimentation.

Name: Emelgi Leather Goods
Description:
Our Story
Emelgi was born from a love of slow craft, nature, and timeless design. The name comes from a simple twist on “MLG” (Mufti Leather Goods), a nod to identity and creativity combined. What started with a handmade knife sheath has grown into a leather goods brand dedicated to craft, care, and connection.

Our Vision
We create handcrafted wallets and accessories inspired by the natural world - from the ripple of a breeze to the textures of the English countryside. Every piece is made from vegetable-tanned leather, a sustainable and traditional process that uses natural tannins rather than harmful chemicals. This means each product is unique, with natural markings and a patina that evolves beautifully with time.

At Emelgi, we believe possessions should be worn in, not worn out. Our goods are designed to last - carrying not just your essentials, but your memories too.

Our Craft
Each item is made slowly, by hand, with intention. Every stitch is considered, every cut deliberate. More than just leather goods, we create companions built to age gracefully and tell a story - yours.

Description:
Once upon a time, in a world brimming with dreams and aspirations, a brand was born from the depths of a father’s love for his daughter. Inspired by the enchanting spirit and boundless imagination of his little girl, a man named Ali embarked on a wondrous journey to create a luxury items brand that would captivate the hearts of women worldwide. Name: Rolford Leather
Description:
Rolford Leather began in 1974 when Colin Cross left as a leather salesman at Keunen Brothers tannery to start his own company. Today, Rolford Leather is a renowned company known for quality and excellence, led by Colin's sons Adrian and Alasdair Cross.

Rolford Leather was founded in 1974 by Colin Cross, who had worked at Keunen Brothers tannery. His love for leather and commitment to quality led him to start the company in Rushden. Under his supervision, Rolford Leather became a hub for exceptional leather production.

Colin led Rolford Leather to rapid growth and expansion to a second location due to the high demand for quality products. Adrian and Alasdair took over after Colin's retirement and continued the company's legacy.

The Cross brothers have 50+ years of experience in leather production. They trained at UK tanneries, honing skills in crafting exquisite leather. Their global exposure contributes to their expertise.

Adrian and Alasdair's international exploration expanded their knowledge of global leather production. Their wisdom improved Rolford Leather's production process, and their leadership led to innovation and success.

Rolford Leather is a top name in the UK leather supply industry. It has a diverse clientele, including leather goods companies, equestrian entities, established manufacturers, and independent designers passionate about using their top-notch leather.

Adrian and Alasdair Cross fuel Rolford Leather's journey with expertise and commitment. The company sources the finest leather from leading tanneries, each crafted to meet high standards.

In the vast landscape of leather, Rolford Leather, under the stewardship of the Cross brothers, shines as a luminary, illuminating paths with its consistent quality, commitment to excellence, and the enduring legacy of the Cross family's leather mastery.

Rolford Leather is your one-stop shop for all your leather needs.

Tel: 01933 461 324
Email: info@rolfordleather.com

Name: MM Creations
Description:
M M Creations is a Kolkata-based company that has been manufacturing and exporting premium quality leather products since 1990. Founded by Mr Md. Shamim Ansari, the company specializes in the manufacturing of finishing leather goods. M M Creations is committed to providing its customers with the highest quality products and services.

The company has a team of skilled craftsmen with years of experience in the leather industry. They use traditional techniques to create products that are not only beautiful but also durable and long-lasting. M M Creations uses only the finest, naturally tanned leather in its manufacturing process, ensuring its products are of the highest quality.

The company has a sound financial condition and secure infrastructure, which has enabled it to serve countries across the sea for many years. M M Creations is committed to ethical and sustainable manufacturing practices and is ETI-SMETA approved, complying with all the standards set by the Ethical Trading Initiative (ETI) and the Sedex Members Ethical Trade Audit (SMETA).

M M Creations has an extensive range of leather products, including bags, wallets, belts, jackets, and other leather accessories. The company invests a lot of time and energy in manufacturing its products, ensuring that each and every step of the production process is performed accurately, leaving no room for error. Each item is personally inspected by its craftsmen, who are trained to have an eye for detail. After a review by one of its specialists, a certificate of authenticity is drawn up, guaranteeing the highest quality for every product the company crafts.

M M Creations is committed to providing the best customer service to its customers. The company believes that customer satisfaction is the key to its success. Its customer service team is always ready to answer any questions or concerns that customers may have.

In conclusion, M M Creations has been a leading leather goods manufacturer

Name: Bad Burro Works
Description:
During the COVID19 lockdowns, seeing so much uncertainty and confusion in our world, we all had a strong desire to start something new. We have always loved to challenge ourselves and work with our hands, so we tried all sorts of new crafts, things like welding and woodworking, but nothing felt right. However, with leather being something we have always been surrounded and intrigued by, we couldn’t think of a better thing to take a crack at. After quickly falling in love with the tranquility of hand-stitching and the excitement of making new items, we knew we had found our grove. But what could we bring to the table that was new and exciting? We have always been proud of where we came from and had a passion for customizing our belongings to reflect this. Therefore, we set out to create a line of leather goods that are the highest quality, visually attractive, and practical, but also allowed for the option of being customized to any one person’s identity with their own name, logo, or anything they felt right for them. 

In our native South Texas, the use of leather and a focus on its expert craftsmanship is a staple in the area's culture. From the saddles that see long hot summer days working behind cattle to the city boots dusted off once a year for the rodeo, we believe that every piece of leather has a story. Our goal is to take this timelessly classic craft and integrate it with something modern and personal and create our own stories. We feel that anyone and everyone should take pride in the things that make them who they are, therefore, we strive to make every piece customizable with things like your name, a meaningful date, a ranch brand, company logo, and so much more.

Our company exports to markets worldwide, including Germany, Italy, Spain, the UK, Hong Kong, Chile, and other EU and global regions.
With decades of craftsmanship, EU-compliant tanning standards, competitive MOQs, and consistent quality control, ANS Leather supports brands, wholesalers, retailers, and importers with reliable manufacturing and customised solutions.

Náš zakladatel Petr Bures přináší bohaté zkušenosti a odborné znalosti v oblasti grafického a webového designu, práva duševního vlastnictví a šití kožených a textilních výrobků. Name: CACTOPIA
Description:
CACTOPIA is an early-stage sustainable innovation startup developing plant-based biomaterials as an ethical and eco-friendly alternative to animal and synthetic leather. We are working at the intersection of biotechnology, material innovation and circular economy design to build the future of cruelty-free and climate-conscious fashion.

Our mission is to create high-performance cactus-based vegan leather and bio-composite materials using natural fibers like hemp and banana, empowering farmers, protecting animals, and reducing the environmental footprint of global leather and plastic industries.

We aim to build a sustainable production ecosystem that generates rural employment, promotes regenerative agriculture, and enables fashion without suffering — aligned with the UN Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs).

What We Are Working On:
 Development of cactus-based vegan leather
 Natural fiber–reinforced biocomposite materials
 Zero-cruelty and carbon-reduction manufacturing ecosystem
 R&D collaboration with research labs, industry experts & incubation networks
 Circular economy product design for fashion & accessories

Our Vision:
To lead the global shift toward cruelty-free, biodegradable and environmentally responsible materials, redefining how the world experiences fashion — without harming life or the planet.

Our Values:
Compassion | Sustainability | Innovation | Responsibility | Community

"Leather Without Cruelty. Style Without Compromise. Turning Deserts Into Design".

Name: Meraki
Description:
Meraki was born from a longing to preserve the quiet beauty of Bengal with its rhythms, its colors, its soul. In a world rushing toward the new, we wanted to honor the timeless. The weavers, the leather artisans, the dyers, the hands that create not for speed, but for meaning. We wanted their stories to be seen, worn, and carried into the world.

Every Meraki piece carries a fragment of our homeland: the deep indigos of our rivers, the warm browns of monsoon soil, the intricate textures shaped by generations of artisans. These are not just materials they are memories, poetry, and heritage. 

We believe craftsmanship is a language. And through Meraki, we translate Bengal’s language into forms that transcend borders. Each piece is made to last, to live, and to tell its own evolving story through handcrafted details and textures that age with grace

Meraki is not just a brand it's a celebration of where we come from and a tribute to where we are going. 

Mission:
Rooted in Bengal, Meraki exists to share the soul of our homeland with the world. Through every piece, we translate the language of our land—its colors, its craft, its quiet poetry—into forms that travel beyond borders. Our mission is to preserve heritage, celebrate artistry, and create objects that carry emotion, story, and timeless beauty.

Vision:
To become a global home for modern heirlooms—pieces that honor traditional craftsmanship while resonating with contemporary life. We envision Meraki as a bridge between cultures, a brand that uplifts artisans, preserves fading techniques, and inspires people everywhere to choose objects with meaning, longevity, and soul.

Name: Perwanger S.R.L.
Description:
For more than 200 years, the Perwanger tannery from South Tyrol, based in Arzignano (Italy), has pursued the idea of developing the best possible leather for people who are passionate about the outdoors and want to compete with nature's challenges.

The Perwanger company produces exclusively technical, water-repellent and breathable leathers. Due to the excellent properties of the product, Perwanger leathers are used in demanding sectors such as high-performance alpine sports for the production of premium footwear.

But even though Perwanger leathers are used for the toughest applications and in extreme sports, aesthetics are also of particular importance. Thus, the unmistakable and strikingly bright colours paired with lively surfaces have become the hallmark of our leathers.

We have had our leathers tested by OEKO-TEX for several hundred substances that are harmful to health. The result is the coveted "Leather Standard" seal of quality - free of harmful substances!

We are proud that our leathers are particularly breathable, waterproof, robust and durable. This is why they are used for the hardest work and most extreme sports. 

At Perwanger, the love of valuable leather has been combined with the love of nature for 200 years. For five generations, we have known that product quality only comes with quality in the work process. We always make sure that what we do is in harmony with how we do it. Today, this is perhaps called sustainability.
We are convinced that with this tradition we will continue to produce and develop qualitatively convincing leathers for modern consumers today and in the future.

We are happy to tell you why Perwanger is different, what is particularly close to our hearts and where we see our responsibility.

Name: NORD PELLAMI | calfskin linings for footwear

We are actively committed to a transparent production chain and guarantee the traceability of our leathers back to the countries of origin, through the adoption of the ICEC TS SC 410 Raw Materials Traceability Certification systems "traceability of leather upstream from the tannery" and TS PC 412: traceability of the hides upstream from the tannery up to the breeding site with the addition of traceability checks of the production phases of the same at the tannery. We work to implement our verification and control system on supply farms, aimed at drafting Due Diligence documents in compliance with European standards on Animal Welfare and deforestation.

Art by Petr Bures je firma, která spojuje umění, řemeslo a kvalitní materiály pro tvorbu jedinečných a originálních designů. Náš zakladatel Petr Bures přináší bohaté zkušenosti a odborné znalosti v oblasti grafického a webového designu, práva duševního vlastnictví a šití kožených a textilních výrobků. Jeho vášeň pro umění a ruční práci inspirovala vznik Art by Petr Bures, kde se specializujeme na ruční výrobu, které splňuje nejvyšší standardy kvality a řemeslného zpracování. Naše produktové řady zahrnují kožené peněženky, doplňky, kosmetické taštičky a další umělecky inspirované předměty. Snažíme se vytvářet produkty, které jsou krásné a funkční zároveň. Vyberte si z dostupný produktů nebo si navrhněte svoji vlastní unikátní kombinaci, Art by Petr Bures má něco pro každého něco.

Established in 1988 as a premier tannery in Pakistan, we have built a strong reputation for providing superior-grade crust and finished leather to top exporters. Today, we proudly manufacture and export premium leather safety gloves and garments to international markets, including Europe and America.

Why Choose Phooly Enterprises?
 Unmatched Quality & Craftsmanship – We use carefully selected genuine leather and implement rigorous quality control to ensure durability, comfort, and resistance to wear & tear.
 Competitive Pricing & Scalable Solutions – Our cost-effective production processes, bulk discounts, and flexible pricing models help importers maximize profitability.
 Reliable Global Supply Chain – We mitigate import risks with a transparent business approach, professional compliance, and proven industry experience.
 Commitment to Sustainability – Our eco-friendly tanning processes align with global sustainability standards, making us a responsible choice for ethical sourcing.

Industries We Serve
 Personal Protective Equipment (PPE) Distributors

 Retail & E-Commerce Businesses

As a trusted manufacturer and exporter, we prioritize long-term partnerships, timely deliveries, and superior customer service. Whether you’re looking for a reliable supplier of leather safety gloves or premium leather garments, Phooly Enterprises is your go-to solution.

Desde sus inicios en 2013 crean bolsos, mochilas y complementos hechos a mano con cuero nacional certificado por Leather Working Group (LWG).

The company’s investment in employee development fosters a culture of continuous improvement, ensuring that the workforce remains at the forefront of industry trends and technological advancements.Top tanners has more than 3 units presence in more than 5 countries. Welcome to Retelah. Retelah offer high-quality leather jackets that are stylish, durable, and affordable. Our jackets are crafted from premium materials and designed with attention to detail, ensuring they will last for years. We offer a wide range of styles, from classic to trendy, so you're sure to find the perfect jacket to suit your personal style.

A leather jacket is a timeless and iconic piece of outerwear that has been a staple in the fashion industry for decades. Made from high-quality leather, these jackets exude a sense of sophistication and class while also offering excellent protection from the elements.

Leather jackets are versatile and can be styled in various ways, making them a great investment for any wardrobe. They can be dressed in dress pants or jeans and a t-shirt for a more casual look. They are also suitable for various occasions, from a night out on the town to a casual day at work.

At the same time, leather jackets offer durability and longevity, making them a great investment for any wardrobe. With proper care and maintenance, a leather jacket can last for years, making it a great addition to any fashion-forward professional's closet.

Overall, leather jackets are a fashion statement that never goes out of style, offering a perfect combination of style, versatility, and durability. They are an investment that will continue to pay off for years to come, making them an ideal addition to any wardrobeWelcome to Retelah.

Les pièces sont confectionnées à la main et avec soin à partir de chutes de cuir de grandes maisons de luxe, de customisation d'invendus de grandes marques ou encore de matières textiles biologiques ou recyclées, revalorisant ainsi l'artisanat français et s'inscrivant dans une approche slow fashion. Name: Crocodile Wildlife Park
Description:
Crocodile Wildlife Park is situated over 5 acres of land in Mymensingh, Bangladesh. We are one of the licensed captive breeding crocodile farms in Bangladesh. We intend to start the export of crocodile skin in the global leather market from the year 2026. Our process of farming is captive breeding of saltwater crocodile. Afterwards, harvest skin from the hatched crocodiles, which shall be exported for leather production.
Our vision is to supply premium quality crocodile skin for the international market. We look forward to be one of the largest crocodile farms in south Asian sub-continent.

Name: Korkchi
Description:
Some brands sell products. Others invite you into a world.
At KORKCHI, we don’t simply craft women’s sandals—we sculpt emotions into every curve, every stitch, every step.

Rooted in the ancient rhythms of Mediterranean craftsmanship and elevated by modern European design sensibilities, our work lives between luxury fashion, timeless minimalism, and handmade precision. Inspired by silence, mystery, and elegance, we walk a path where few dare to tread.

We don’t chase trends.
We don’t mass-produce.
We don’t explain everything.

Instead, we create objects of meaning—pieces that whisper rather than shout. Each collection is an expression, not just of style, but of intention, heritage, and contemporary femininity.

Our recent growth in the Gulf and European markets has been a quiet one. We believe in earning admiration, not demanding attention. When people talk about KORKCHI, they speak in feelings, not figures.

Behind the scenes, our collaborations extend from Turkish artisans to European fashion consultants, building a bridge between heritage and innovation. KORKCHI is where art meets product, culture meets modernity, and the ordinary becomes symbolic.

And yet—we’ve only just begun.

We are not here to compete.
We are here to elevate.
To walk softly.
And leave a lasting impression.

KORKCHI – where art takes a step.

Name: Cordillera Leather
Description:
Cordillera es una marca chilena que nació hace más de 8 años con un sueño claro: transformar el cuero genuino en accesorios que acompañen a las personas en su día a día y en sus viajes. Desde pequeños detalles como straps para anteojos o billeteras, hasta mochilas, bolsos de viaje y carteras, cada pieza está pensada para ser funcional, duradera y con mucho estilo.

Nuestra esencia está en combinar lo clásico con lo innovador, siempre con manufactura nacional y trabajando con cueros de las mejores curtiembres del país. Nos mueve apoyar la economía local y mantener un compromiso real con la sostenibilidad, eligiendo materiales de origen ético y cuidando el medioambiente en cada etapa.

Más que accesorios, lo que buscamos crear son compañeros de vida: productos hechos con pasión, detalle y la calidez de lo artesanal.

Hacemos personalización de todos los
productos mediante grabado láser o cuño. Graba un  logo, nombres, iniciales, figuras y mucho más. 
Desarrollamos y te acompañamos a ejecutar tu idea desde “0”.

My Signature. Your Story.

Ben je op zoek naar een leren tas die precies bij jou past in kleur en uitvoering? Of ben je op zoek naar een origineel relatiegeschenk? Samen komen we tot de gewenste unieke persoonlijke leren laptoptas, werktas, festivaltas, schoudertas, heuptas, telefoontas en bijpassende accessoires.

Ik hou van tassen en maak graag anderen blij met een heel eigen tas in kleur en vormgeving. Voorop staan kwaliteit, aandacht voor de klant en het product en praktisch gebruiksgemak.

Bij jlovesbags kun je veel zelf bepalen. Welke kleur of kleuren? Waar komen de ritsen, vakken en hoeveel? Wat vindt je mooi, makkelijk en praktisch in het gebruik?
Ook de uitstraling is afhankelijk van je smaak en stijl. Wil je het stoer, sportief, elegant of zakelijk? Neutraal of kleurrijk? Je bepaalt het allemaal zelf.

In deze tijd van duurzaamheid maar ook ter herinnering is hergebruik van leer voor een tas mogelijk.

Op bestaande modellen is de keuze vrij in soort en kleur(en) leer, voering, accessoires en fournituren. Dat maakt elke tas uniek. Iedereen heeft een eigen smaak en wensen voor gebruik.

Heb je eigen ideeën bij een tas? Dan is maatwerk mogelijk. Hiervoor wordt het patroon aangepast met daarbij passende prijs en levertijd. De tas krijgt dan jouw naam.

Naast tassen maak ik ook cadeau artikelen en relatiegeschenken van leer zoals babyschoentjes/slofjes, riemen, make-uptasjes en portemonneetjes.

Heb je een vraag of idee? Of zoek je inspiratie? 

Bel of stuur een mail dan bespreken we de mogelijkheden tijdens een bezoek aan mijn atelier.

Telefoon: 06-12205282
E-mail: jose@jlovesbags.nl

Name: Iwee upcycling Ledermanufaktur
Description: In der Upcycling Ledermanufaktur iwee (ich war einmal ein…) beginnen alte Ledersofas ein zweites Leben. Sie werden zu Taschen und Lederaccessoires verarbeitet. Aus scheinbar wertlosen Materialien neue Produkte zu schaffen, ist die Grundidee von iwee. Das ist Upcycling. Den Stoffkreislauf verlängern. Unsere Erde schonen. Das wertvolle und sehr langlebige Material Leder verbraucht in der Herstellung viele Ressourcen. Da das Leder hier eine zweite Chance bekommt, entfällt dieser Ressourceneinsatz bei der Taschenherstellung. Das schont die Umwelt enorm. Das ist gelebte Nachhaltigkeit. Upcycling ohne Greenwashing Bla-Bla.

Geleneksel zanaatkârlığı çağdaş tasarım anlayışıyla birleştiren Puera, fikir aşamasından numune sürecine kadar her adımı titizlikle ele alır. Estetik, fonksiyon ve kaliteyi merkezine alan yaklaşımıyla, markaların vizyonunu güçlü ürünlere dönüştürür.

Additionally, we provide white labeling services, enabling businesses to offer our high-quality, ethically crafted leather goods under their own brand name.

At MARAKI, we believe that luxury and social responsibility go hand in hand. We support the communities in which our artisans live and work by providing fair wages, safe working conditions, and opportunities for growth and development. Name: CultCart
Description:
At CultCart, we believe in quality. We believe it's worth the investment, and we believe that our customers appreciate the same values: handcrafted excellence with energy-efficient manufacturing processes. The leather goods industry is a global one. We believe in the power of custom-made jackets, bags, and footwear to express your individual style. We know that you're a leather enthusiast who wants to be able to order your jacket or bag just the way you want it—and we want to make that possible for you.

Our business is based on a commitment to quality and craftsmanship, but we also know that we cannot do this alone. That's why we partner with other companies who share our values: handcrafted excellence with energy-efficient manufacturing processes. We work with clients who appreciate the same values: handcrafted excellence with energy-efficient manufacturing processes.

What is it about leather that's so compelling?

For one thing, it's durable. Leather lasts a lifetime, even when it gets beaten up by your kids and worn down by the elements. It's flexible, too—you can bend it into any shape you need without fear of damage or waste. And because it's made from ethically sourced animal hides, it has a natural beauty to it that makes it feel more luxurious than other materials.

For Apparel, CultCart is your online shopping destination for the best quality clothing & apparel. We are a print on demand e-commerce company where we print on orders Men, Women and unisex T-shirts. Our T-shirts are made of 100% cotton which makes it an essential item in your wardrobe for summer & fall. We bring you a large collection of 100% cotton printed and basic tees with very popular niches, all these without burning a hole in your pocket. Name: Tricampeón - Tapizados y Fundas para motos
Description:
Tricampeón - Tapizados y Fundas para motos es una empresa familiar que tuvo sus inicios en el año 2012. Su fundador y creador de todos los productos de la marca, Víctor Hugo Rodriguez, fue un tapicero que empezó a aprender el oficio a los 12 años de edad, y se convirtió en uno de los mejores en su especialidad. Trabajó en los mejores lugares de Rosario con una carrera brillante y tuvo su taller propio.

Siempre estuvo vinculado al mundo de la belleza, el arte y la estética, estudió dibujo y pintura desde muy pequeño y se recibió de profesor a los 5 años de edad. Aparte de ser un experto en el trabajo artesanal de excelencia y en el arte de la tapicería en todas sus ramas, también se destacó en su carrera de artista y recibió muchísimos premios por sus pinturas y esculturas en distintos museos muy reconocidos, donde todavía se encuentran algunas de sus obras de arte. También incursionó en el mundo de la actuación en teatro y la música tocando el acordeón, otra actividad que le encantaba. Desde muy pequeños involucró a sus hijos en el mundo del arte y el dibujo, ya que siempre compartieron su encanto por él.

En el año 2012 fue donde su talento excepcional dio inicio a Tricampeón, una empresa dedicada a la fabricación de fundas para asientos de motos, mochilas y accesorios, que fue la primera en confeccionar fundas para asientos de moto enduro elastizadas, juegos completos de fundas para asientos de motos custom y scooter, aparte de la línea de calle; siempre destacándose con productos de altísima calidad y confección artesanal, un estilo delicado y sobrio, diseños y materiales exclusivos y el calce perfecto de los productos. La marca también cuenta con muchos modelos exclusivos.

La moto que dio nombre a esta empresa, es una Zanella Ceccato 1957 (el primer modelo de la marca Zanella) que ganó 3 campeonatos, y que forma parte de la imagen de la marca.

 2020 yılı boyunca marka, pazar ve bilişim alt yapı çalışmalarını tamamlayan firmamız, kaliteli hammadde sloganı ile 2021 yılı başlarken faliyete girmiştir.

Name: Zmem
Description:
ZMEM, c’est avant tout un carnet de voyage.
Un voyage dans notre patrimoine culturel, une traversée entre mémoire et modernité, où chaque page raconte l’histoire de la Tunisie et de ses racines amazighes.

Plus qu’un simple carnet, ZMEM est un ambassadeur de notre identité tunisienne. Chaque création incarne l’élégance, la richesse culturelle et le savoir-faire artisanal qui font la singularité de notre pays.

Notre essence :

Tradition & Héritage : des motifs amazighs gravés avec soin, symboles d’une mémoire vivante.

Artisanat d’exception : cuir naturel, finitions haut de gamme, papier noble.

Éthique & Durabilité : production responsable et respectueuse des matériaux.


Pourquoi ZMEM ?
Parce que la mémoire mérite un écrin.
Nos carnets sont conçus pour ceux qui apprécient l’authenticité, l’art du détail et les objets porteurs de sens.
Idéal pour les passionnés de culture, mais aussi pour les entreprises cherchant des cadeaux d’affaires premium qui reflètent l’élégance tunisienne.

 Notre mission :
Préserver un savoir-faire ancestral et promouvoir une image raffinée de la Tunisie à travers des pièces artisanales d’exception.

Envie d’explorer cet univers ? Collaborons pour écrire ensemble la prochaine page de cette histoire.

Description:
Exporio is a trading company based in Bangladesh that specializes in the export of high-quality leather goods to international markets.

At Exporio, we understand the importance of building strong relationships with our customers and suppliers. Whether you're a small boutique or a large retailer, we are dedicated to providing personalized service and tailored solutions to meet your unique needs.

Exporio offers a wide range of leather products, including bags, wallets, belts, jackets, and footwear. All of our products are made using locally-sourced materials and crafted by skilled artisans. We also provide customized products to meet the specific needs of our customers.

With a strong network of experienced manufacturers, we are able to offer a wide range of leather products that are both stylish and durable. From handbags and wallets to belts and jackets, we take pride in our attention to detail and commitment to quality.

We value open and transparent communication with our clients and partners. Feel free to reach out to us with any inquiries, collaboration opportunities, or requests for more information. Our dedicated team is ready to assist you.

Exporio is your trusted partner for sourcing high-quality, competitively priced leather products from Bangladesh.

Welcome to Leathercraft Garage, where passion and craftsmanship come together to create timeless pieces of leather artistry. Based out of our humble home garage, we pour our heart and soul into every creation, infusing each piece with a blend of tradition and innovation.

Our journey began with a love for the tactile beauty of leather and a desire to transform this raw material into something extraordinary. With a keen eye for detail and an unwavering commitment to quality, we meticulously craft wallets, bags, accessories, and more that not only stand the test of time but also tell a story.

What sets us apart is the personal touch that goes into every step of the process. Our creations are not just pieces of leather; they're a reflection of our passion, a celebration of individuality, and a commitment to authenticity.

As a small, home-based operation, we cherish the connections we build with each of our customers. Your satisfaction is not just a goal—it's a driving force that fuels our creativity and pushes us to consistently exceed expectations. Whether you're looking for a custom piece that resonates with your unique style or a thoughtful gift that speaks volumes, we're here to bring your leather dreams to life.

Thank you for being a part of our journey. Join us in celebrating the art of leathercrafting, and let us adorn your world with our handcrafted creations, one stitch at a time.

Name: Babazamen Leather Goods
Description:
Redefining Sustainable Luxury

Babazamen Leather Goods emerges as a beacon of sustainable luxury in the leather industry, championing a fusion of timeless craftsmanship and ethical practices. Rooted in a rich heritage of artisanal skill, Babazamen is dedicated to producing high-quality leather goods that encapsulate the essence of authentic style, while steadfastly committing to environmental responsibility and social ethics.

Core Identity:
- Authentic Craftsmanship: 
With a lineage of artisans who have perfected their craft over generations, Babazamen prides itself on its meticulous attention to detail and an unwavering dedication to the art of leather making. Each piece is a narrative of history, skill, and passion, crafted to be both timeless and personal.
- Sustainable Luxury: 
Babazamen redefines luxury through a lens of sustainability, utilizing eco-friendly materials and innovative practices that minimize environmental impact without compromising on quality or aesthetics. Our approach ensures that each product not only adds value to your life but also protects the planet.
- Ethical Excellence: 
Integrity is our cornerstone. We maintain an unwavering commitment to ethical sourcing, fair labor practices, and fostering a positive work environment for our artisans. Babazamen stands as a testament to the belief that luxury goods can be produced in a manner that honors both people and nature.

Ob für Gewerbe oder Privat – wir liefern maßgeschneiderte Lösungen für alle, die Wert auf langlebige, funktionale und ästhetisch überzeugende Lederprodukte legen.

Unsere Vision
Leder-Klaus strebt danach, als vertrauensvoller Ansprechpartner für hochwertigen Lederhandel in ganz Deutschland anerkannt zu sein.

Wir wollen das Bewusstsein für echtes Handwerk, langlebige Materialien und einen nachhaltigen Umgang mit Ressourcen stärken – in einer Zeit, in der Qualität oft der Schnelllebigkeit weicht.

Mit langjähriger Erfahrung im Umgang mit Leder möchten wir nicht nur Materialien liefern, sondern auch Inspiration, Verlässlichkeit und eine Verbindung zu echter Handwerkskunst schaffen.

Jedes Stück Leder, das wir anbieten, steht für Beständigkeit, Charakter und Verantwortung – für Produkte, die Generationen überdauern.

Name: Leatherwares
Description:
Leatherwares is a global luxury brand designed & forged in Sialkot, a city whose artisans have quietly crafted excellence for generations. From the same workshops that shaped the world’s finest leather goods emerges a brand that carries their legacy into the modern age — Leatherwares, where craftsmanship meets meaning, and design meets soul.

Founded by Ali Shahid, Leatherwares was born to give voice to Sialkot’s artisans — the unseen masters behind products worn by champions and icons worldwide. Every jacket is more than apparel; it is a chronicle of human touch, patience, and pride. Each curve, stitch, and fold carries the spirit of a city that has perfected the art of making over centuries.

At Leatherwares, luxury is redefined — not as status, but as substance.
We create wearable heirlooms that honor tradition while embracing contemporary design. Made with premium full-grain, vegetable-tanned leather and detailed to perfection, our pieces are built to evolve with time — recording the life and journey of their wearer.

Our mission is rooted in ethical craftsmanship and purposeful creation:
 Empowering artisans through fair, dignified livelihoods.
 Building sustainably and consciously, choosing integrity over mass production.
 Crafting timeless pieces that endure for generations.

Leatherwares stands as a testament to human craftsmanship and cultural pride, elevating Sialkot to its rightful place on the global luxury map. Because true luxury is not about what you wear — it’s about the story it carries.

 Designed & Forged in Sialkot.
#Leatherwares #LuxuryWithPurpose #MadeInSialkot #EthicalLuxury #HeritageRedefined #LegacyInLeather #ArtisanExcellence #CraftedForGenerations

Name: ADOLFO TURRION
Description:
A Adolfo Turrion se inspirou na trajetória de um homem que acreditou no Brasil. Hoje muitos especialistas estão envolvidos na fabricação de nossos sapatos: o formador, o modelista, o cortador, o costureiro. É o incomparável savoir-faire desses e de outros artesãos que torna o nosso sapato único. 

Desde o início, o estilo da Adolfo Turrion é conhecido pelo nosso virtuosismo técnico, criatividade e espírito artesanal. Continuamos inovando a cada novo capítulo da história de nossa marca, superando os limites da técnica e do estilo.

A Adolfo Turrion se posiciona no mercado como uma marca e fábrica de "luxo acessível", utilizando couro bovino de alta qualidade.

Desde a sua concepção como marca, nascemos com a ideia de fazer um calçado de qualidade a um preço razoável. Nos baseamos no conceito próprio de LEE - Laboratório Estilo Europeu que leva em conta a família e o time de trabalho coeso em conjunto com a máxima qualidade, respeito ao meio ambiente e ao consumo consciente, que resultam em um produto de referência mundial com uma marca legitimamente brasileira.

Em um negócio como a nossa manufatura, onde os processos são essencialmente manuais, o limiar da qualidade e a obtenção do equilíbrio em nossa fábrica dependem estritamente do relacionamento humano, da linha tênue entre o sentimento e o dever, entre o planejamento e a execução que resultaram em um "laboratório de ideias", o LEE.

Sohre-Leder produziert in einer deutschen Lohngerberei (LWG gold-rated) Rindleder für die Orthopädie- und Schuhindustrie, für Bekleidung und Handschuhe, für Hersteller von Gürtel- und Lederwaren, sowie für den Reitsport. 
Je nach Kundenwunsch werden diese Leder auf Basis von Wet Blue oder Wet White (chromfrei) hergestellt. 
Dabei kommt ausschließlich beste süddeutsche Rohware von ausgesuchten Schlachthöfen in Verbindung mit hochwertigen Hilfsmitteln zum Einsatz, unter Berücksichtigung der strengen sozialen und ökologischen Standards der EU. 
Unter dem Markennamen VegLine vertreiben wir ein IVN-zertifiziertes Naturleder, welches höchsten ökologischen und sozialen Standards entspricht!
Weiterhin führen wir ein breites Lagerprogramm für die verschiedenen Anwendungsgebiete.
Neben dem Verkauf von Leder bieten wir zusätzliche Dienstleistungen an, wie das Perforieren von Leder und anderen flächigen Materialien sowie CNC-gesteuerten Zuschnitt von Leder.

Name: (VVID) under Starwhisper Private Limited
Description:
VVID is an Indian Luxury Fashion House built on precision, purity of craftsmanship, and the timeless value of artisanal heritage.
Born from the belief that India deserves a place at the top of global luxury, VVID blends centuries-old craftsmanship with modern aesthetics, creating pieces that are intentional, rare, and deeply human.

At VVID, luxury is not mass-produced.
Luxury is crafted — slowly, meticulously, and with discipline.
Every detail reflects our commitment to excellence: from the choice of materials to the precision of construction to the cultural depth embedded in our design philosophy.

Our Purpose

To elevate Indian artisanship to global luxury standards and to build a world-class fashion house that stands shoulder to shoulder with the finest international maisons.

Our Vision

To establish a global luxury house rooted in India’s rich artisanal heritage — a brand that celebrates craft, culture, and modernity in equal measure.

Our Mission

To revive and uplift traditional craftsmanship through contemporary design, responsible creation, and unwavering attention to detail.

What We Represent
	•	Artisan-first philosophy
	•	Slow luxury processes
	•	Precision in every stitch
	•	Limited production, global relevance
	•	India’s cultural depth × international luxury aesthetics

Crafted in India. Worn Worldwide.

VVID is more than a brand — it is a movement to place Indian craftsmanship on the world stage with pride, discipline, and purpose.

All our products that are meticulously designed by specialist designers are launched in the market under noella brand name.

Name: Furnova
Description:
Furnova: High-end Fur and Wool Craftsmanship for Luxury Fashion
Furnova is an export company that processes natural fur and wool, one of the most exclusive raw materials of the luxury fashion industry, and offers high quality products to world-renowned brands. Furnova, which caters to high-end fashion brands such as Prada and Gucci, specializes in fur dressing and fur dyeing processes, reshaping fur as a work of art, not just a material.

Our Areas of Specialization
 Fur Dressing:
Starting from carefully selected raw skins, furs are subjected to special processes that increase softness, flexibility and durability. They are made fashionable by preserving the natural structure.

 Coloring (Fur Dyeing):
Furnova is a master at creating natural and special shades of color to suit the demands of the fashion world. The advanced techniques used enrich the color depth and texture of the furs.

 Niche and Valuable Raw Materials:
Furs from both farmed and wild animals such as fox, raccoon and sheep are carefully processed to achieve the unique textures and looks sought after by the luxury fashion industry.

 Sustainable and Ethical Production:
Furnova works with production principles that respect nature and the future. By offering long-lasting and timeless products, Furnova supports conscious luxury in the fashion world.

Description:
Hochwertige personalisierte Leder-Accessoires

Seit nunmehr über vier Jahren fertigen wir hochwertige Taschen & Accessoires aus Leder. Dabei haben wir uns auf eine Fertigung spezialisiert, welche das traditionelle Lederhandwerk mit moderner Technologie verbindet. Mit unserem eigenen Laser schneiden und gravieren wir unser Leder, um die Produkte dann in Handarbeit fertigzustellen.

Unser Sortiment umfasst neben Taschen, Geldbeuteln und Schlüsselanhängern auch Produkte für Büro, Gastronomie und Hotellerie. Zudem bieten wir die Möglichkeit Produkte nach Ihren Vorgaben anzufertigen und Ihre Artikel aus Leder mit unserem Laser zu personalisieren.

Das von uns verwendete Leder beziehen wir direkt von der Familiengerberei David-Schmid in Baden-Württemberg. Es handelt sich um rein pflanzlich gegerbtes Rindsleder vom Gürtelhals.

Name: North of Zion
Description:
Meet the Maker

I’m Brady, an engineer with a passion for making things that last. I grew up in Bend, Oregon and now live in Newberg, where I spend my time running, mountain biking, rock climbing, and creating. When classes went online in 2020, I found joy in leatherwork. My new hobby became North of Zion, a small leather goods brand rooted in craftsmanship and creativity. What started at my kitchen table has grown into a passion that allows me to express myself, work with my hands, and connect in my community. 



Handcrafted Design

Every piece is made by hand, from cutting and stitching to burnishing and finishing. I believe in crafting products that have tangible quality and gain unique character with age. That's what makes handmade different.

Name: CREA s.r.l. |Taglio pelle e cuoio
Description:
Siamo un' azienda che si occupa del taglio della pelle e del cuoio a San Giovanni Ilarione. 
La nostra soluzione basata su tecnologie avanzate come software di nesting intelligenti e taglio automatico a lama , analizza le superficie e i difetti di ogni singola pelle.

Il software calcola il modo migliore per posizionare le sagome da tagliare (piazzamento/nesting), massimizzando l'utilizzo del materiale e riducendo al minimo lo scarto. Questo porta a un risparmio diretto e misurabile sui costi della materia prima.

La Vision è quella di migliorare costantemente la vita dei nostri clienti attraverso soluzioni innovative, un servizio impeccabile e un impegno ineguagliabile verso la loro soddisfazione.

La missione di CREA è quella di accelerare il business del cliente, massimizzando l’efficienza tecnologica a nostra disposizione.

Name: Proper Penguin Goods
Description:
Hi! I'm Adam, the founder of Proper Penguin Goods. I am originally from Louisiana but now happily crafting in Colorado. My passion for leatherworking began in 2015 as a way to bond with my talented woodworker brother. As I honed my craft, I developed a deep appreciation for the process and take great pride in ensuring every cut, stitch, and finishing touch is executed with care and precision.

In 2019, I founded Proper Penguin Goods, inspired by my love of penguins. The name embodies the sophistication and quality that I strive to bring to each of my handmade leather goods. Penguins are known for their sleek appearance and tuxedo-like markings, reflecting my commitment to producing unique and stylish pieces that age beautifully over time.

I appreciate your time and interest in my handmade leather goods. If you have any questions or feedback, please don't hesitate to reach out!

Name: KHOANI Leather Manufacture
Description:
About us
The Blázek and Anni brand is taking on a new direction after 30 years. With even more modern production technologies and innovative developments, we are conquering not only the domestic but also the foreign markets, with the exceptionally high quality products and the collection of genuine leather products, as well as the non-standard leather products. Our renewed interior and exterior are now represented by the Khoani brand.

We offer a full range, with reduced shipping rates available at www.khoani.com.

Design philosophy
Classic sketching combined with innovative design solutions. The character of the bags and accessories is given by the harmony of the appropriate shades, design solutions and materials used. The design process is inspired by office and business design, as well as practical and clean structures, which are ultimately embodied in precisely crafted pieces.

Technology
The character of the bags is provided by the constantly rethought design technique. Only high quality leathers and vegan leathers are used in the manufacture of bags and accessories. The meticulous manufacturing technology and the deep attention to detail give the final shape, which also guarantees the value and durability of our bags. The production of hand-made, premium-quality bags and accessories is done by our master craftsmen in our own workshop. The entire design and manufacturing process takes place in-house.

Our history
Our company was founded in 1989 as a family business. The manufacturing experience of the last 30 years has made our products recognized both in Hungary and abroad.

Personalized products
We are happy to manufacture unique leather products according to the individual ideas of our customers! We work quickly and efficiently, even based on images, and our colleagues handle each order with high level of expertise. Ask for our individual offers at the email address info@khoani.hu or by phone +36307433358.

Name: FOHM
Description:
Marka Amacımız – Neden Varız?

Her şey bir ihtiyaçla başladı…
Kaliteli, şık ve uzun ömürlü deri ürünlere ulaşmanın ya çok pahalı ya da hayal kırıklığıyla sonuçlandığı bir dönemde, "Neden hem zarif hem dayanıklı hem de ulaşılabilir çantalar üretmeyelim?" sorusunu sorduk. İşte FOHM’un temeli bu soruyla atıldı.
FOHM olarak biz, sadece deri çantalar ve aksesuarlar üretmiyoruz.

Günlük hayatı kolaylaştıran, sade şıklığıyla tarzınızı tamamlayan ve uzun yıllar size eşlik edecek ürünler tasarlıyoruz.Amacımız; herkesin ulaşabileceği fiyatlarla, yüksek kalite standartlarına sahip, modern ve işlevsel ürünleri sunarak pazarda hak ettiğimiz yeri almak. Çünkü biz biliyoruz ki bir çanta sadece eşya taşımak için değil, aynı zamanda kimliğin, stilin ve yaşam tarzının bir yansımasıdır. Deri bizim için sadece bir malzeme değil, bir karakter meselesi.

Doğallığı, dayanıklılığı ve her geçen gün güzelleşen dokusuyla bizce zamansız
bir zarafeti temsil ediyor. İşte bu yüzden FOHM Deri ürünleri, hem estetik hem işlevsel hem de sürdürülebilir bir deneyim sunar.Bugün sektöre adım atarken yanımıza aldığımız en büyük güç: Kaliteye olan inancımız, tasarıma duyduğumuz tutku ve kullanıcıya verdiğimiz değer.

Ve bu yolda her geçen gün daha fazla insanın "İyi ki FOHM" demesi için çalışıyoruz.

Name: Haghi Charm
Description:
:

خانه چرم حقی: تولیدکننده و عرضهکننده محصولات چرمی با کیفیت و زیبا

خانه چرم حقی یک مجموعه خانوادگی است که در سال 1377 توسط محمد حقی، یک دانشجوی علاقهمند به صنعت چرم، تاسیس شد. این مجموعه با ایدهای نوین و جسورانه، به تولید و عرضه محصولات چرمی با بستهبندیهای مناسب و شایسته پرداخت. این اقدام باعث شد که محصولات خانه چرم حقی در بازار هدایای سازمانی مورد توجه و استقبال قرار بگیرند و با بسیاری از شرکتهای بزرگ داخلی و خارجی همکاری داشته باشند.

خانه چرم حقی همچنین در سالهای اخیر به فروش محصولات خود به صورت خرده فروشی نیز پرداخته است و با راهاندازی فروشگاه اینترنتی و پیج اینستاگرام، با رضایت و پاسخگویی به نیازهای مشتریان خود، در حال توسعه و رشد است.

خانه چرم حقی با بکارگیری دانش، تجربه، خلاقیت و اصالت در طراحی و تولید محصولات چرمی، به عنوان یک برند مطرح و معتبر در صنعت چرم شناخته شده است. این مجموعه همواره به تعهد خود در ارائه محصولات با کیفیت در بستهبندیهای شایسته پایبند بوده است و افتخار دارد که در لحظات خوب و پر احساس صدها هزار نفر از مردم عزیز کشورمان سهیم باشد.

The Human Era is more than just a brand; it’s a community of people who value craftsmanship, quality, and authenticity. Our collections reflect the belief that well-crafted items can enrich lives, offering both style and substance. From essentials to statement pieces, our range is thoughtfully designed to suit diverse needs.

We are proud of the relationships we’ve built with our customers, who recognize the dedication and care behind each item. Choosing The Human Era means embracing a legacy of craftsmanship, authenticity, and timeless elegance.

Explore our collections and discover leather goods crafted to be cherished for a lifetime. Welcome to The Human Era, where tradition and innovation meet.
