Description:
It all started in 1967, Dicky – The Designer grew up rapidly in India. In preview of its legacy, Saturn – The Bags Planet (sister brand) was established in 2017. Dicky & Saturn offer a wide variety of products like trolleys, duffels, laptop backpacks, messenger bags, pouches, everyday travel accessories, and short-haul essentials made from quality materials, exclusively manufactured in India.

Dicky & Saturn tests its products, fully loaded, in real-world conditions for strength, durability, and dependability. We provide a wide range of designs & product developments by using premium quality materials in Genuine Leather, PU, PVC, and Nylon fabrics. Our designs are highly preferred by Indian and Western markets, as we are accustomed to the market selections for more than five decades. Every year we introduce new innovations to our range and modify the old designs to adapt our customer desires and market trends.

Through manufacturing locally and aiming to distribute internationally, we believe in contributing to the constantly growing economy. Our products are reasonably priced with best-served quality. Our pricing rationally depends on various factors such as the design innovations, metal fittings & fabrics used. Our raw materials are sourced from India, Taiwan, and Korea. Most of our materials are customized by our expert designers and factory-made in India.

Dicky & Saturn value excellence, professionalism, respect, trust, and quality. Our major challenge is to gratify the customer needs with competitive pricing, product sustainability, and superior quality. Being a Made in India brand, we care for a better world. Our vision is to assure our customers with the best products and to provide high-quality solutions for the world traveler. Dicky and Saturn brands are now succeeded by Saturn Bags.

Name: Adroitva Industry Pvt. Ltd.
Description:
Welcome to our LinkedIn page! We are a leading manufacturer and supplier of top-quality industrial leather gloves, based in Kolkata, India. With a commitment to excellence, we have been providing reliable and durable gloves to industries worldwide.

Whether it's handling heavy machinery or working in extreme conditions, our gloves are designed to keep your hands safe and comfortable.

Our commitment to quality extends beyond our products to our customer service. We work closely with our clients to understand their specific needs and provide customized solutions that meet their requirements. As a company, we are also committed to sustainability and ethical practices. We source our materials responsibly and strive to minimize our environmental impact. We also ensure fair and safe working conditions for all our employees.
With our dedication to quality, safety, and customer satisfaction, we have earned the trust of industries worldwide. Whether you are looking for gloves for construction, mining, welding, or any other industrial application, you can rely on us for top-quality products and excellent service.

Our product offerings include handcrafted bespoke shoes, corporate and ceremonial footwear, leather belts, bags, and custom leather accessories tailored to individual style, comfort, and purpose. Each piece is meticulously produced using carefully selected materials and skilled artisanship to ensure durability, elegance, and a refined finish.

At Moss Maison Global, we go beyond production — we provide a personalized client experience. From design consultation and material selection to fitting and delivery, we work closely with our customers to transform ideas into timeless leather pieces that reflect confidence, identity, and excellence. Our strong customer relationships and attention to detail have earned us trust from professionals, executives, and style-conscious individuals.

We are also committed to sustainability and community development. By empowering local artisans, promoting ethical production practices, and integrating data-driven business processes, we create value that extends beyond our products. Our approach blends tradition with technology, enabling us to scale responsibly while maintaining quality and authenticity.

Driven by innovation, craftsmanship, and purpose, Moss Maison Global Ltd. is building a globally competitive African leather brand that celebrates heritage, supports livelihoods, and delivers premium products that stand the test of time.

مجموعه تولیدی پرچرم، از سال ۱۳۹۱ در استان گیلان با هدف توزیع محصولات چرمی در حوزه کیفها فعالیت خود را آغاز کرد. در مدت دو سال، با برونسپاری ساخت محصولات خود و جذب بیش از ۱۰ نماینده فروش فعال در استان، توانست به هدف اولیه خود دست یابد. در مرحله بعد، با تمرکز بر ارائه مصنوعات چرمی با کیفیت برتر و ارائه سرویسهای مناسب به سازمانها و موسسات گوناگون، به اهداف خود نزدیک شود.

در سال ۱۳۹۳، با هدف بهبود کیفیت طراحی و تولید محصولات و ایجاد تولید انحصاری، کارگاه تولیدی کیف چرم طبیعی با دوخت صنعتی تحت عنوان برند "پرچرم" تأسیس شد. این کارگاه با تولید محصولات متنوع و طراحیهای منحصر به فرد، به بهبود کیفیت و جذب مشتریان و سازمانها کمک کرد.

Name: A&Z International
Description:

Name: Highlands Leather
Description:
OUR JOURNEY
Highlands is a Belgian brand, born from a love of craftsmanship, a spirit of adventure, and a deep respect for people and nature. The spark? A journey through the rugged Scottish Highlands where raw beauty, silence, and strength came together in a way that stayed with us. That spirit shaped who we are, and gave us our name.

We design timeless leather companions that don’t just carry your essentials, but carry your story. Bags that feel like they’ve always been with you and only get better with time.

As Belgians, we’re grounded in quiet quality and attention to detail. But we’re also curious by nature, driven by a desire to discover highlands all over the world, places where nature is still in charge, where stillness and strength meet.

That same grounded curiosity guided us in finding the right people to create our bags. Our leather goods are crafted in Kolkata, India, in close partnership with two carefully selected ateliers. Over the course of a year, we visited more than fifteen workshops and factories before choosing the two that felt right, in values, skill, and heart.

Safe working conditions, fair wages, and respect for craftmanship were never up for debate. Both of our partners are SA8000-certified, a global benchmark for socially responsible practices. But beyond the standards, it’s the people that move us: the artisans, their communities, and the culture of care they bring to the craft.

Want to know more about our process or the people behind our bags? Reach out anytime: info@highlandsleather.com. We’d love to take you behind the scenes.

This is our adventure. And now, it’s yours.

Name: Glowleather Atelier
Description:
İki Çocukluk Arkadaşı, Bir Hayal: Glowleather Atelier Deri Çanta Üretim Atölyemiz

Bizim hikayemiz, çocukluk yıllarımızda başladı. Beraber okuduğumuz lise ve üniversite yıllarında, hayat bizi hep aynı yolda buluşturdu. Bu güçlü dostluk, iş hayatına da taşındı ve yıllar içinde birçok farklı iş yerinde yan yana çalıştık. Zamanla, edindiğimiz bilgi birikimi ve deneyimle, ortak bir hayal kurmaya başladık.

Kendi atölyemizi açmak.

Bu hayalimizi 2 yıl önce gerçeğe dönüştürdük ve birlikte ‘Yüksek Kaliteli Deri Ürünler’ üretim atölyemizi kurduk. Bizim için deri işçiliği bir sanat ve her deri ürünü, ustalığımızın ve detaylara verdiğimiz önemin bir yansıması. El yapımı her ürünümüz, seçkin malzemelerle ve özenli işçilikle hazırlanıyor.

Ortaklığımız, yılların dostluğu ve birlikte geçirdiğimiz iş deneyimleriyle güçlendi. Birbirimizi tamamlayan yeteneklerimiz sayesinde, kaliteyi ve müşteri memnuniyetini her zaman en üst seviyede tutmayı başardık.

Atölyemizde üretilen her ürün, işimize olan sevgimizin ve birlikte başardıklarımızın bir ifadesi.

Sizleri de bu özel hikâyeye ve kaliteli deri ürünlerimizle tanışmaya davet ediyoruz.

Name: Emilie Far
Description:
Emilie FAR, fondatrice de la marque Namasté Home Design lance sa marque éponyme de maroquinerie aux lignes de sacs « couture », structurés et audacieux.

C’est à travers les tendances, les matières rigoureusement sélectionnées, qu’Emilie FAR puise son inspiration pour exprimer sa vision de ce compagnon essentiel.

Les peaux utilisées dans la création des pièces sont des cuirs pleines fleurs véritables, précieusement choisis pour leur belle qualité, issus de tanneries Françaises et Italiennes. 
Certains cuirs sont embossés façon autruche, python, ou lézard et personnalisés par des motifs exclusifs qui en font des pièces uniques.

Matthieu BOULET, Artisan Sellier, qui a acquis son savoir-faire auprès des maisons de Luxe Françaises, apporte dans cette collaboration un regard et une expertise intraitable dans la confection et la fabrication méticuleuse de chaque pièce.

Tous deux mettent un point d’honneur pour réaliser une fabrication artisanale sans concession dans une démarche écoresponsable tout en limitant la surproduction.
 Ils recherchent en permanence l’alliance parfaite entre le design intemporel et une fabrication d’excellence pour des créations singulières et raffinées. 

La signature de la maison ÉMILIE FAR est identifiable par sa fermeture iconique de sac.

« Un sac représente bien plus qu’un accessoire de mode, c’est le premier élément que l’on distingue et qui définit la personnalité de chacun ».

Name: AVIAL STUDIO
Description:
AVIAL Studio is where architectural design meets enduring quality. We are an artisan design house specializing in premium, full-grain leather goods that are meticulously crafted not just to be carried, but to be treasured for a lifetime. The "Studio" represents our commitment to the creative process, intentional design, and the flawless execution of master craftsmanship.

Our Vision
To be the definitive global standard for accessories that balance minimalist design with uncompromising durability. Our vision is for every AVIAL piece to become a personal artifact, earning a rich, unique patina that narrates the journey of its owner.

Our Mission: An Unwavering Focus on Quality & Endurance
Our mission is to consistently design and deliver products of unparalleled quality and long-term durability. We achieve this by embedding excellence into every phase of our process:

Intentional Design: Our studio prioritizes functional, timeless forms. We design for utility and elegance, ensuring our goods are practical for the modern professional while defying fleeting trends.

Sourcing Excellence: We exclusively use full-grain leather—the strongest and most durable material available—sourced from partners who meet our strict ethical and environmental standards.

Master Craftsmanship: Every item is a direct reflection of our artisans' skill. We embrace time-intensive, hand-finished techniques, from edge painting to saddle-stitching, which maximize structural integrity and ensure the exceptional quality of every piece.

The AVIAL Studio Difference
The difference is in the detail. We are a conscious choice against fast-fashion and planned obsolescence. An AVIAL piece is a tangible asset, built to last, providing dependable quality and a tactile, satisfying sense of premium craftsmanship (the "quilty" feel) that improves with every passing year.

Connect with AVIAL Studio to discuss B2B opportunities, explore collaboration with our design team,

Name: Western Saddles USA
Description:
Parts of a saddle seat comprise of a fork, the cantle, horn, skirt, seat, neck, folds, and knee cushions. On the off chance that you are a novice horse rider, realizing each part exhaustively should be very overpowering. Be that as it may, it's anything but an unimaginable undertaking. You can find out about each piece once you fire by attaching up a pony. Prior to carefully describing each piece of a seat, it is fundamental to know the two popular pony riding disciplines; English and Western pony riding.
Parts of a Saddle: Difference between an English and a Western Riding Style
English riding can be traced all the way back to bygone eras. The main role of English riding, around then, was public appearance. Consequently, the English saddles were planned appropriately. In any case, as request expanded, further alterations were made to English saddles to satisfy the necessity with time.

Western discipline was more worried about the utilization of ponies for grouping or steer purposes. The thought was to keep the rider agreeable for a long and harsh excursion on rough territory. This is the point at which the expression "cattle rustler" was presented.

Presently, both English and Western horse riding styles have developed. There are various manners by which each riding discipline is utilized, whether in sports, work, or relaxation trails.

Difference between an English and a Western Saddle

One more fundamental contrast between the two styles is the seat and its frill. As the essential target of each style differs, the shape and style of the outfit are additionally changed. Western seats are typically large, have level bottoms, delicate covering under the seat, and have a handle or horns toward the front. They are additionally beautified with various trimmings and leatherwork.

Upcycling : Nous travaillons avec des cuirs existants provenant de grandes maisons de maroquinerie afin de limiter l'impact écologique

Julie Péneau, la créatrice du concept s'est lancée dans la folle aventure de l'entreprenariat après avoir obtenu son diplôme en maroquinerie au Canada, où elle est tombée amoureuse du cuir.

We create wearable art for pirates, paladins, misfits, and magic-makers—whether you're headed to a Renaissance faire, LARP campaign, cosplay event, or just living your fantasy out loud. Every piece is designed and crafted in our home workshop using a mix of traditional tools, modern tech (laser-cutting, AI-assisted design), and a whole lot of heart.
What we make:
• Handmade leather masks, armor, bags, accessories, and custom commissions
• Our iconic felt hat line—affordable, durable, and Ren Faire-approved
• Limited drops, one-of-a-kind pieces, and exclusive designs

 Who we serve:
• Cosplayers, LARPers, Ren Faire veterans and first-timers
• Kink and polyamorous communities who value expression and consent culture
• Creative adventurers, rebels, and those who don't fit neatly in boxes

What we believe:
We believe in craftsmanship over conformity, bold self-expression, and building a sustainable business that reflects our values—collaboration, inclusion, creativity, and a little bit of chaos. Our team includes our children and chosen family, all learning and creating together.

We vend at live events across the Southwest and beyond, and we’re building toward a future that includes digital products (like leatherworking patterns), online tutorials, and community collaboration.

Whether you’re upgrading your garb, commissioning something magical, or just vibing with the aesthetic—welcome to the sundry side.

We’re not just building products—we’re building a legacy. Follow us for event updates, new product drops, behind-the-scenes magic, and upcoming digital offerings. Whether you wear leather or felt, there's a place for you here. Come create the story with us.
Let’s make something unforgettable.

Name: MİR DER
Description:
Firmamız, 1982'den beri HATAY ilinde faaliyet göstermektedir. Kaliteli deri eldiven üretimi konusunda uzmanlaşmış bir üretici olarak sektörde önde gelen firmalardan biridir. Müşterilerimizin ihtiyaçlarına göre özelleştirilmiş ürünler sunmakta ve yüksek kalite standartlarını korumakta kararlıyız. Her adımda titiz bir kalite kontrol süreci uyguluyoruz, böylece müşterilerimizin güvenle kullanabileceği kaliteli ürünler sağlayabiliyoruz. Amacımız, müşterilerimize en iyi hizmeti sunmak ve onların memnuniyetini sağlamak için sürekli olarak gelişmek ve yenilikçi çözümler sunmaktır.
Firmamız, müşterilerimize birçok farklı deri ürünü sunmaktadır. Bunlar arasında deri montaj eldiveni, deri kaynakçı eldiveni, deri önlük ve deri kolluk da yer almaktadır. Her bir ürünümüz, özenle seçilmiş yüksek kaliteli deri malzemelerinden üretilmektedir ve müşterilerimizin ihtiyaçlarına göre özelleştirilebilmektedir. Ürünlerimizdeki kalite standartları, sektördeki diğer ürünlerden daha yüksektir ve her aşamada sıkı bir kalite kontrol süreci uygulanmaktadır. Böylece müşterilerimiz, güvenle kullanabilecekleri dayanıklı, rahat ve yüksek performanslı deri ürünlerine sahip olmaktadır.

Name: Pracownia Psima Morgan
Description:
Nasze wartości to piękno, jakość, elegancja… i tradycja. Cenimy kunszt dawnych rzemieślników, ich ręczną pracę i naturalne materiały – skórę, papier, tkaniny. Czasem potrzebujemy ich miękkiego, ciepłego dotyku, ponieważ na codzień żyjemy w nowoczesnym świecie stali, szkła i plastiku.
Skóra... Nieprzypadkowo od dawna jest symbolem prestiżu i luksusu. Trzeba jednak umieć się z nią obchodzić. Trzeba ją traktować z uwagą i szacunkiem. Dlatego zatrudniamy ludzi, którzy to potrafią.
Wiemy jednak również, że w nowoczesnym świecie coraz większego znaczenia nabiera troska o planetę i zamieszkujące ją istoty. Dlatego zaopatrujemy się w skóry pozyskane w sposób etyczny. Myślimy też o klientach, którzy nie chcą żadnych produktów pochodzenia zwierzęcego. Oferujemy im skóry wegańskie, materiały syntetyczne oraz inne surowce roślinne. Nowoczesne materiały wegańskie są trwałe i ekologiczne i w niczym nie obniżają jakości wykonanych z nich przedmiotów.

Description:
『革の未来を創造する』
弊社は1960年の創業以来、大阪で革小物メーカーとして歩んできました。

‘Creating the future of leather’
Since our company was founded in 1960, we have been a manufacturer of small leather goods in Osaka.
In the rapidly changing era of cashless and sustainable products, we are exploring manufacturing bases, sales routes and items we handle, and challenging ourselves in all kinds of leather-related businesses so that our customers will want to entrust their leather goods to Nadaya.
We aim to be a company that creates the future of leather.

We have our own manufacturing bases in Osaka and Thailand, and also cooperate with factories in China and Bangladesh.
We are developing manufacturing and wholesale of original items, planning and wholesale of licensed products, OEM manufacturing from various industries, and souvenir business for corporate clients.

Description:
We started ‘LE Leather’ to challenge the durability and quality of the leather products that we use every day. Most of them are good enough but they should be much better.

Our goal is to produce all of our products from 100% pure leather with maximum durability and quality, which will represent our leather craft worldwide.

Name: De Rosa
Description: De Rosa est une entreprise de maroquinerie « Do It Yourself » artisanale qui a pour vocation de vous proposer des articles ludiques, créatifs, intemporels et de qualité.

Name: Meidi Bags
Description:
Meidi Bags Company is a professional manufacturer of handbags and leather goods based in Guangzhou, China. With more than 25years of experience, we specialize in OEM & ODM services for global fashion brands, retailers, and designers.  

Our product range includes handbags, backpacks, wallets, and other leather accessories, crafted from a diverse selection of materials, including genuine leather, PU, canvas, and sustainable fabrics.  

Why choose us:  
- Strong production capacity with advanced equipment and skilled workers  
- Flexible MOQ to support both established brands and emerging designers  
- Competitive pricing with strict quality control  
- Export experience across Europe, North America, Asia, and the Middle East  

At Meidi Bags Company, we strive to support our clients with reliable manufacturing solutions, innovative designs, and consistently high-quality products. We believe in building long-term partnerships and helping brands grow with products that combine style and value.  

Let’s connect and explore how we can collaborate on your next collection!

Name: SVELG LEATHER GOODS
Description:
At SVELG , we specialize in the design, production, and supply of premium leather jackets and leather goods. Combining craftsmanship, tradition, and innovation, we create products that embody durability, timeless style, and unmatched quality.

With years of experience and a dedication to excellence, our manufacturing process uses only the finest materials, ensuring every piece we deliver meets the highest standards. From classic leather jackets to handcrafted wallets, bags, and accessories, each item reflects our passion for detail and our commitment to long-term customer satisfaction.

Located in Turkey — a global hub for high-quality leather production — we offer competitive advantages in logistics, tariffs, and manufacturing capabilities. Our mission is to be the trusted partner for brands, retailers, and entrepreneurs worldwide seeking reliable, flexible, and scalable leather goods production.

Whether you're looking for private label manufacturing, custom designs, or wholesale leather products, SVELG is ready to turn your ideas into enduring realities.

Let's build something lasting together.

Name: The Harker Company
Description:
Harker is a Colombian leather goods brand inspired by elegance of English heritage and the spirit of modern exploration. We craft wallets, weekender bags, and accessories from premium calfskin, designed to embody timeless style and lasting quality. 

Our vision is to make affordable luxury a reality: products that reflect sophistication and tradition, yet remain within reach for a new generation of discerning customers.

Each piece is created in partnership with the finest local artisans, blending craftsmanship with design language that evokes heritage, refinement, and understated class. Harker is not just about leather— it’s about carrying legacy with you.

Name: Artisan Streams
Description: We provide high-quality custom manufacturing services for leather and canvas products.  We strive to facilitate clear communication and provide a quick turnaround with reasonable MOQs and pricing.  Our work is also formed to develop and give back to the community and artisans with which we work

Name: Wenderfarer | Leather Accessories Manufacturer
Description:
We are a Ukrainian leather accessories manufacturer with over 8 years of production expertise. Founded in 2016 under the brand Skin&Skin, we’ve grown from a garage workshop into a full-cycle production company with in-house design, testing, and manufacturing teams.

Today, we operate under a new name Wenderfarer for the international market — offering customized leather solutions for business, gifting, and retail.

What we do:
– Manufacture leather accessories for daily use, workspace, travel, and tech
– Provide B2B services: corporate gifts, branded collections, team kits
– Offer product personalization: embossing, engraving, custom formats
– Ensure consistency: all products are tested, refined, and made in-house

We design timeless, durable pieces that serve real purposes. And we build lasting partnerships — not just process orders.

Let’s talk if you’re looking for a flexible, trusted production partner.

sales.skinandskin@gmail.com

Name: SVELG LEATHER
Description:
Founded in 2012, SVELG specializes in designing and producing premium leather jackets and leather goods. Combining tradition, craftsmanship, and innovation, we create durable, timeless, and high-quality products for clients across the USA, Canada, and Europe.

Based in Turkey—one of the world’s leading leather hubs—we benefit from strong logistics, competitive manufacturing, and access to the finest materials. Our production follows LWG (Leather Working Group) standards, ensuring ethically sourced leather, sustainable practices, and consistent quality.

Each jacket and accessory is crafted with meticulous attention to detail. From cutting to finishing, our artisans ensure durability, comfort, and long-lasting performance. We also offer private label manufacturing, custom designs, and the integration of various fabrics and trims to create unique, modern pieces.

With more than a decade of experience and a commitment to excellence, SVELG remains a trusted partner for brands, retailers, and entrepreneurs seeking reliable, flexible, and scalable leather goods production.

Let’s build something lasting together.

Name: Indïgenas
Description:
Welcome to "Indı́genas," where we redefine craftsmanship as an art form. Our philosophy centers around the essence of handcrafted elegance, utilizing noble materials and embracing a restrained, sober design aesthetic. Each product, be it gloves, belts, cufflinks, ponchos, wallets, or travel bags, is a testament to our commitment to the highest quality achievable.

Our dedication to sustainability echoes through every aspect of our process, ensuring eco-friendly practices at every turn. Every piece is a unique creation, a result of meticulous craftsmanship and a celebration of individuality.
"Indı́genas" is not just a product; it's a project that encapsulates our internal exploration and our outward gaze at the world. In a globalized era, we delve into the small, the essential, the local—finding meaning that speaks of us. Our inspiration is drawn from the perfect, mystical order of Nature, a geometry that harmonizes everything from a droplet to the moon-regulated tides. In this geometry, where nothing is superfluous, we find our ethos: the inseparable connection between ethics and aesthetics.

Name: Galcollab atelier concept
Description: Un atelier où l'artisanat traditionnel rencontre les technologies les plus avancées, pour donner vie à des créations uniques et originales. spécialisés dans la conception et la fabrication de sacs et d’accessoires en cuir.

Name: Ikunico
Description:
Siamo un azienda artigiana che produce accessori  e articoli in pelle italiana, anche su misura.
I nostri prodotti  si distinguono per qualità delle finiture, durevolezza dei materiali e da uno stile che si tramanda da generazioni di artigiani della pelle.

I pellami utilizzati sono tutti di provenienza italiana e conciati al vegetale, con certificato di garanzia
I prodotti più apprezzati sono i diari, le agende, le cartelle porta documenti, gli accessori per scrivania e ufficio, le borse e le cartelle di lavoro, la piccola pelletteria e gli album fotografici.
Un altro settore per cui ci distinguiamo è la legatoria e il restauro di libri antichi.

L'azienda è a conduzione familiare e l'abilità artigiana è tramandata da tre generazioni di artigiani.
La sede della nostra azienda è a Gubbio in Umbria.

Su richiesta realizziamo prodotti su specifiche esigenze del committente.
E' possibile acquistare i  prodotti a marchio Ikunico sul sito e-commerce aziendale.

Name: Mjacket Official
Description:
At Mjacket, we are passionate about bringing timeless style and unparalleled quality to your wardrobe. As a premier designer and retailer of Shearling leather jackets, our mission is to offer iconic outerwear that combines classic design with modern craftsmanship.

Our collection features a wide range of styles, from rugged aviator jackets to sophisticated shearling coats, all crafted from the finest materials to ensure durability and comfort. Whether you're looking for a statement piece to elevate your everyday look or a functional yet fashionable jacket for the colder months, Mjacket has something for every discerning taste.

We pride ourselves on our commitment to excellence, attention to detail, and dedication to customer satisfaction. Our team of skilled designers and artisans work tirelessly to create jackets that not only meet but exceed your expectations.

Discover the perfect blend of luxury and practicality with Mjacket, and experience the difference that quality craftsmanship can make.

Our stylish and sophisticated designs have made us a popular choice among fashion-conscious consumers around the world.

If you're interested in our products, please don't hesitate to contact us. We would be happy to provide you with further information or samples of our products.

Name: Deary Leather
Description:
A MODERN ECHO OF A TIMELESS TRADITION

For centuries, in the heart of Anatolia, leather was never just a material — it was a canvas of craftsmanship, resilience, and quiet elegance. Deary Leather is the modern echo of that timeless tradition. A brand born in London, crafted in Türkiye, and refined in the light of Lisbon

Name: Kasuri Enterprises
Description:
We are a Pakistani-owned & operated home decor company specializing in everything to do with leather and cowhides. We carry cowhide rugs, cowhides, cowhide pillows cowhide patchwork rugs, and cowhide bags.

All our cowhide rugs are sourced from the very bestKasuri tanneries where they are chrome tanned to a supple perfection using the latest technology, producing cowhides that are far superior in finish and luster compared to those produced in other countries using dated technology. With over a decade and a half in this business, we are the most trusted name when it comes to cowhides.
Cowhide rugs are a popular and stylish addition to any home decor. They are a versatile material that can be used in a variety of settings, from rustic to modern, and everything in between. Cowhide rugs are not only beautiful but also durable and long-lasting.

On our website, we offer a wide range of cowhide rugs in various sizes, colors, and patterns. Each rug is unique and one-of-a-kind, as no two cowhides are alike. Our rugs are made from top-quality cowhide leather, which is known for its durability and softness.

Our team of skilled artisans carefully selects and tans the leather to ensure that each rug is made from the finest quality materials. We take pride in our products, and each rug is crafted with the utmost attention to detail and quality.
Our cowhide rugs are perfect for adding a touch of elegance and style to any room. Whether you're looking for a bold pattern or a more subtle design, we have the perfect cowhide rug for you. Our rugs are also easy to care for, simply vacuum or shake them out regularly to keep them looking their best.

In addition to our cowhide rugs, we also offer excellent customer service to ensure that our customers are completely satisfied with their purchases. We provide fast and reliable shipping, and our customer service team is always available to answer any questions or concerns you may have.

Name: Abra srl
Description:
Innovazione Radicata nella Tradizione. Unendo tre decenni di esperienza con una visione rivoluzionaria.
La nostra storia inizia con una visione: rivoluzionare il settore conciario attraverso la tecnologia e l’innovazione.

Abra Srl nasce dall’ambizione di combinare la tradizionale lavorazione delle pelli con metodi avanzati, creando prodotti che non solo eccellono in qualità ma anche rispettano l’ambiente.

Da un semplice sogno a una realtà tangibile, la nostra azienda rappresenta il punto di incontro tra l’artigianato di qualità e l’innovazione tecnologica.

Una Nuova Era nella Rifinizione delle Pelli
In Abra Srl, siamo orgogliosi di presentare Abratech, il nostro innovativo sistema di rifinizione delle pelli. Questa non è solo una nuova soluzione, ma una rivoluzione nel settore conciario. Abratech è il frutto di una ricerca avanzata e di un impegno per l’eccellenza, offrendo una rifinizione di alta qualità rispettosa dell’ambiente.

Thank you again,
Rizwan Siddique
CEO

La nostra filosofia è semplice: pochi pezzi, unici e irripetibili, perché da ogni pellame ricaviamo solo una piccola serie di articoli che non verrà mai riprodotta uguale.

Crediamo in un lusso autentico, fatto di qualità, durata e valore umano. Ogni prodotto Ispirazione racchiude la storia di chi lo ha creato e diventa parte del percorso di chi lo sceglie.

Name: The Leather Sense
Description:
At The Leather Sense (TLS), we’ve been at the forefront of high-quality leather manufacturing since 2010, specializing in creating premium shoes, bags, and accessories for B2B clients worldwide. Our commitment to craftsmanship and durability has made us a trusted partner for businesses seeking to deliver exceptional leather products to their customers.
We pride ourselves on offering a diverse range of construction techniques, including Goodyear Welt, Genuine Handsewn, and Simple Stitchdown constructions, ensuring that our leather footwear and accessories are built to last while maintaining superior comfort and style. Whether it’s a classic or contemporary design, every product we manufacture reflects our attention to detail and mastery in leather craftsmanship.
With over a decade of experience, we offer tailored solutions to meet the unique demands of our partners, combining traditional craftsmanship with modern techniques. From classic designs to contemporary styles, we ensure that every piece represents the finest in leather manufacturing.
Our expertise in these time-honored methods ensures that every product we produce is built to withstand the test of time, providing unparalleled quality and value to every you. We understand the demands of the B2B market and are dedicated to offering products that not only meet but exceed the expectations of our clientele.
At TLS, we believe in sustainable practices and ethical sourcing, ensuring that our products are not only crafted to perfection but also aligned with global standards. Whether you’re a brand looking for a reliable leather manufacturer or a business searching for custom solutions, TLS is your go-to partner for excellence in leather goods.

Global Reach. Quality Craftsmanship. Trusted Partnerships.

Name: TiTiTi C
Description:
Looking for high-quality leather goods? Look no further than "TiTiTi & C" LTD!

Back in 1990, the company started small with just 18 employees and a production area of 120 m2. But over the years, "TiTiTi & C" LTD has grown to become a major player in the leather goods industry, now boasting a team of 725 skilled workers and a spacious production area of 7000 m2.

Equipped with state-of-the-art technology, including production robots and advanced sewing machine software, "TiTiTi & C" LTD offers exceptional manufacturing services for a wide range of leather products. From stylish bags for both men and women to small household and office accessories, their premium-quality leather goods are sure to impress.

So if you're in the market for top-notch leather goods, choose "TiTiTi & C" LTD for unparalleled craftsmanship and quality.

Description: MOIRÉ est né de la rencontre entre un Français et un Chilien, un instant où deux mondes se sont entrelacés pour créer une alchimie magique. À Santiago, nous avons tissé des liens avec une famille d'artisans dont le talent pour le cuir est inégalé, transmis de génération en génération. Nous avons engagé une étroite collaboration pour concevoir et fabriquer à la main nos produits en plein coeur de Santiago, en utilisant du cuir chilien de la "zona centro sur precordillera, ciudad de Talca". Chaque pièce MOIRÉ raconte cette histoire, fusionnant l'authenticité chilienne avec l'élégance intemporelle de la France.

Our philosophy is simple: discipline, precision, and respect — combined with authenticity.
For over six decades, this principle has defined Kazım Süren Leather every day, by meeting tradition with innovation.

This balance can only exist through respect —
for the creative makers who trust our materials,
for the skilled craftsmen who treat every hide with care,
and for the planet that makes this craft possible.

We bring your vision to life — crafting custom leathers in more than 1,000 colors, from large-scale productions to small creative samples. With worldwide shipping, in-stock products are ready to be delivered within 48 hours, bringing every texture, tone, and finish from our factory to your imagination.

Your idea. Our craftsmanship. Realized in leather.
Kind regards,
Kazım Süren Leather

Name: Guangdong Boman Leather Co.,Ltd.
Description:
Boman Leather Co., Ltd., established in 2001, is renowned for its expertise in crafting high-quality mobile phone cases and leather accessories. We pride ourselves on our focus on OEM and ODM services, catering to the bespoke requirements of our esteemed clientele.

Our state-of-the-art factory boasts a team of approximately 100 skilled workers and operates 4 production lines, ensuring a robust monthly capacity of around 300,000 pieces. This infrastructure is the backbone of our ability to meet diverse demands with agility and precision.

At the heart of our operations is a robust R&D department, dedicated to delivering innovative and perfect solutions that exceed client expectations. We uphold a stringent quality control regime, meticulously inspecting every stage of production from raw material to finished product. Our multi-tiered inspection process includes 100% checks at various stages: Incoming Material Control (IQC), In-Process Quality Control (IPQC), and Final Quality Control (FQC), among others.

Our commitment to excellence is further reinforced by our professional inspection equipment, which includes a color fastness machine, tensile tester, D65 light source, high and low temperature chamber tester, and abrasion tester, ensuring that our products meet the highest industry standards.

Leveraging more than 8 years of experience in international trade, our team is adept at addressing a myriad of client needs, from product design and photography to packaging customization, shipping, and navigating customs and duties.

We eagerly anticipate the opportunity to collaborate with international partners. Reach out to us via phone, fax, or email, and let's embark on a long-term, mutually beneficial business relationship. Your satisfaction is our priority, and we are here to ensure that every interaction is a step towards a prosperous partnership.

Name: Mosay International Pvt Ltd
Description:
As a tannery-based leather and leather goods manufacturer, since our establishment in 1980, we have steadily emerged as pioneers in the manufacturing and export of Leather Bags, Leather Wallets, Industrial Leather Safety Gloves, Leather Accessories, Leather Belts, and Apparel, hailing from the vibrant city of Kolkata, India. With a legacy spanning three generations in the industry, Mosay International is guided by a blend of experience and youth, driven by a professional management team. This dynamic and ambitious organization is fervently committed to making a lasting mark on the global market. Our aspiration is to become synonymous with unparalleled quality and unwavering commitment in the minds of customers around the world. Every step we take is fueled by this vision, as we persistently strive to provide superior quality and unmatched services for enduring customer contentment.

At the heart of our manufacturing lies leather, our prime raw material, and we're proud to share that we operate our own LWG Gold Rated tannery. Our tannery seamlessly fuses traditional leather craftsmanship with modern machinery, adhering to strict monitoring across all four stages: Raw skins, Blue, crust, and finished leather. This meticulous approach results in high-quality leathers offered at an attractive price range. We are immensely proud to hold the distinction of being a GOLD-rated LWG tannery.

The bedrock of our organization's continuous growth is its visionary founder, Shakil Ahmed. His unwavering optimism, deep understanding of raw hides, courage to innovate, and integration of modern technology are the driving forces behind our journey. As the second generation, represented by Mohammed Mobashir and Mohammed Firaz, steps into the business, our focus sharpens on modernization, compliance, sustainability, and achieving zero emissions.

Name: Raja & Mitsu Fashions
Description:
Raja & Mitsu Fashions is a government of India recognized manufacturing company and export house of premium leather goods. 

We are a female-founded 2nd generation family-owned business based in Kolkata, India. 

We produce an eclectic range of ladies’ handbags, men’s briefcases, soft luggag.e, belts and small leather goods

We adhere to thorough international auditing standards and are also an ISO 9001: 2008 certiﬁed organization with ETI/SMETA/SEDEX social compliance certiﬁcation.

Our factory is a state of the art facility located in Kolkata Leather Complex. 
We have a monthly production capacity of 20,000 handbags and 30,000 small leather goods.

Our corporate policy is to "Go Green" and focuses on sustainability and reducing our carbon footprint. Along with our tanners, we are putting in a lot of R & D and have created a range of full veg, eco-friendly leathers. We also offer locally sourced 100% organic cotton and canvas.

All our leathers are top grade skins sourced from the best LWG tanneries of Calcutta. Our linings and ﬁllers come from various parts of India; our hardware is imported from countries with strict labour law regulations and fair wages for their workers.

Our factory is spread over 5,000 sq meters of land and has more than 40% open space covered by lush greens to sustain local flora and fauna, and add to the biodiversity.
The facility has a septic tank to treat effluent in-house and there is segregation of recyclable and biodegradable waste. Biodegradable waste is put in compost pits to use as fertiliser for plants. 

Connect with us:
info@rajamitsu.com

Pelletteria Mistura has been at the forefront of luxury craftsmanship since 1953, rooted in the heart of Milan as a third-generation, family-owned company. From initial concept and prototyping to full-scale production, we partner with our clients throughout the entire value chain to bring bespoke luxury products to life.

La Pelletteria Mistura è all'avanguardia dell'artigianato di lusso dal 1953, con radici nel cuore di Milano come azienda familiare di terza generazione. Siamo specializzati nello sviluppo di prodotti, ingegneria e produzione per borse di lusso e piccoli accessori in pelle, combinando l'eredità italiana con l'innovazione moderna. I nostri artigiani e ingegneri possiedono una profonda esperienza nel lavorare con materiali diversi, dalle pelli esotiche più pregiate alle alternative vegane all'avanguardia, garantendo che ogni progetto soddisfi le esigenze uniche dei nostri clienti esigenti.

Con capacità verticalizzate nel settore della pelletteria, offriamo soluzioni complete, che includono lo studio dei materiali, la costruzione del prodotto e lo sviluppo. Dal concetto iniziale e prototipazione fino alla produzione su larga scala, collaboriamo con i nostri clienti lungo l'intero procedimento per dare vita a prodotti di lusso su misura.

Name: Lesa Collection
Description:
LESA Collection from its very start, when it originated in the early 1940’s never compromised with the quality of its product range. This has helped us create a unique identity in a market where there is a large pool of other suppliers, yet our identity has sustained a strong reputation for the immense appreciation that has been received from our customers world-wide.

Here at Lesa Collection, one of the things we always talk about is taking pride in the quality of our products. The reason why we are so proud of our merchandise is because of the hard work and dedication it took for us to get to where we are now. We are a team of designers, craftsmen and dreamers, we work together to come up with new designs to appeal to our customers and ensure we are delivering the highest standard of service worldwide. Lesa Collection started off as a small business of leather shoes in Kashmir and we slowly expanded our range. Without a passion for leather and outstanding quality this would never have been possible.

With our products being handmade and being manufactured by our team, it has earned us a very distinct reputation in the leather industry. We are mostly known for our leather waistcoats and hats, we also supply leather caps, gloves and accessories.

We are also well-known for our reasonable prices and our ability to understand our customers. We work hard in building positive relationships with our customers and would like to ensure they walk away with positive experiences.

Our diverse product range includes Wet Blue Goat Skins, Wet Blue Sheep Skins, Wet Blue Cow Hides, and custom-finished leather with unique patterns inspired by crocodile, buffalo, and elephant textures. These products are meticulously crafted to meet the highest international standards, catering to clients across global markets.

At Mas Tannery, quality and craftsmanship are at the heart of everything we do. By blending traditional expertise with modern techniques, we ensure every piece of leather reflects the finest attention to detail and durability.

Discover the essence of Kenyan leather innovation with Mas Tannery—where heritage meets premium quality.

We implement systems and procedures to minimize our carbon footprint and achieve zero waste. Name: BAOBAB TRADING COMPANY LIMITED
Description:
Baobab Trading Company Limited is a micro-manufacturer of luggage, bags & associated items, based in Nanyuki, Kenya.  Baobab was established with the main objective to produce premium quality items at relatively affordable prices using the skills of Kenyan artisans both through employment within (and) through outsourcing to individual artisans.

Where possible, it sources its raw materials locally from independent suppliers, as it hopes this has a positive effect on the micro-business network in Kenya.  The leathers it uses are not factory farmed. They are primarily from Maasai herds which have been allowed to roam freely, living full lives.

Where possible, Baobab usually prefers to use metal fittings and zippers in its products. It generally prefers to use hand made brass from local artisans (but will use alternative materials if requested).

Name: Gold Filled
Description:
Founded in 1913 by brothers Chandulal, Ratilal, and cousin Maneklal Shah, Gold Filled has become a symbol of quality and craftsmanship in the leather industry. Starting with gold-plated buttons, Gold Filled soon ventured into premium leather goods, driven by its commitment to excellence and its motto, "Legacy in Every Stitch."

Gold Filled's journey began when Chandulal Shah identified a market need for gold buttons, leading to the establishment of the Gold Filled Manufacturing Company. A pivotal moment was a client's request for a leather wallet, which expanded the company's focus to leather goods. 

Over a century, Gold Filled has grown its product range, established retail shops, set up a leather tannery, and embraced online marketing. Today, the company continues to deliver exceptional leather products, upholding a legacy of innovation and quality.

At Rift Africa, we specialize in developing and manufacturing premium leather and canvas products, serving both local and international markets. With a focus on quality craftsmanship, we offer a wide range of bespoke products including bags, accessories, home décor, and customized gifts for individuals, corporates, and private labels.

Our products are designed to meet the ever-changing needs of our clients, with flexible customization options, fast turnaround times, and the ability to handle both small and large-scale orders. Whether you're seeking high-end gifts, corporate giveaways, or personalized leather goods, Rift Africa is your trusted partner.

With a commitment to excellence, we continue to evolve and improve our offerings to stay at the forefront of the leather goods industry. From local clients in Nairobi to international export markets, we pride ourselves on Kenyan Leather, Kenyan Crafted, International Quality.

Name: Maison Barberis
Description: Maison Barberis est une entreprise spécialisée dans la restauration de sacs à main de luxe et de bijoux vintage. L’atelier parisien allie techniques artisanales et innovations modernes pour redonner vie à des pièces uniques. Engagée dans une démarche de durabilité, l’entreprise met un point d'honneur à préserver le patrimoine tout en réduisant le gaspillage. Expertise, exigence et créativité sont au cœur de chaque projet, avec une attention particulière portée à chaque détail.

Name: Due2 Store
Description:
Due 2, Dide Kırımtayif Mert ve Naro İşlibilek tarafından kuruldu. Tutkumuzu daha çok kişi ile paylaşmak üzere yola çıktık. Deri konusunda 3 kuşaklık birikimimizi özenle tasarlanmış, tarz sahibi, kaliteli ve uzun ömürlü ürünlere aktardık. Suni deri kullanmadık; sağlık dostu, anti kanserojen gerçek deri ile bir sezonluk değil, bir ömürlük ürünleri ulaşılabilir fiyatlarla sizlere sunduk!

Kaliteli alın, ömürlük kullanın ve siz de sürdürülebilir sosyal sorumluluk projemizin bir parçası olun!

Due 2'da işini tutkuyla yapan bizlerin ürünlerini bulabilirsiniz.

Keyifli alışverişler...
Şehir hayatındaki hızlı yaşantıya ayak uyduran pratik, rahat ve şık, kaliteli görünüme önem veren kadınlara yönelik koleksiyonumuzu keşfedin.

Name: Karizma International
Description:
Karizma International is a trusted trading and manufacturing company based in Dhaka, Bangladesh, specializing in premium leather goods, corporate gifts, and garment accessories.
We offer a complete solution for brands and businesses looking for high-quality leather and PU products, including:
•	Leather & PU patches for garments and fashion labels
•	Corporate gifts such as wallets, belts, and key Ring, Note Books
•	A wide range of leather goods — bags, wallets, belts, and accessories
With a strong focus on quality, craftsmanship, and timely delivery, we work closely with both local and international buyers to create customized, durable, and stylish products that reflect their brand identity.
Our Strengths:
•	In-house production and custom design capability
•	Commitment to consistent quality and innovation
•	Fast and reliable delivery service
•	Experienced and dedicated management team
At Karizma International, we believe in building long-term partnerships through honesty, efficiency, and excellence in every product we deliver. Proudly made in Bangladesh — crafted for the world.

Description: Welcome to the broad spectrum of leather apparel. UBN is continuously making new improvements, to be a long-term strategic partner with the clients, searching for options in lowering costs to give the best price with the best quality to our valuable customers.

Name: B•A-G
Description:
B•A-G's origin dates back to the 80s when Beatrix Anton-Groenemeyer crafted her first handbag from leather scraps in Saarbrücken, Germany. Her creations quickly gained acclaim, notably at a leather fair in 1989 where her design was permanently exhibited by the Deutsches Ledermuseum. Despite a pause for family and a career in finance, B•A-G was rejuvenated in 2019, inspired by timeless design and familial encouragement.

Today, B•A-G epitomizes functional elegance, blending high-quality, sustainably sourced Italian leather with impeccable craftsmanship. The brand prioritizes transparency, traceability, and ethical practices, ensuring materials meet international standards and environmental efforts. B•A-G’s commitment extends beyond fashion to fostering women’s entrepreneurship and supporting sustainable initiatives globally.

Each B•A-G product is a testament to meticulous craftsmanship and innovative design, representing a fusion of functionality and luxury. The brand's dedication to sustainability, social responsibility, and ethical production highlights its vision for a better world through fashion. 

Look good and feel good. We value transparency and traceability. Our commitment extends beyond handbags: women are not only our clients, but we also care about fostering women’s entrepreneurship in the developing world. We contribute 10% of our net profit to foundations. Education and innovation are key for PPP (People, Planet, Profit): we support ENACTUS, the global student platform for sustainable and social innovation.

B•A-G selects hand-picked leather skins directly from closely partnered tanneries, ensuring all leathers are natural. The materials range includes various calfskin prints that adhere to strict environmental and safety standards and are certified by STANDARD 100 by OEKO-TEX.

In line with its commitment to environmental responsibility, B•A-G packages its handbags in special cotton bags. 

Local Shop: Potsdamer Straße 81-83, 10785 Berlin
